chapters.text: Mose’n thu hicheng hi Israel mi jouse jah a Jordan gal lang gamthip lai, Suph gal-a Arabah gamsunga Paran le Tophel, Laban, Hazeroth chule Dizahab kikah a anaseipeh ahi.
Horeb molsanga pat Kadesh-barnea gei hi Seir molsang lampia akiche leh nisom le nikhat lampi ahi.
Kum som li lhin kum, lha som le lha khatna, nikho masa nin Mose’n Israel mite jah a chun Pakaiyin amaho seipeh dinga athupeh chengse abonchan asei bang bangin aseipeh tai.
Hichu aman Heshbon a cheng, Amor mite lengpa Sihon le Ashtaroth toh, Edrei a cheng Bashan lengpa Og ajo nung ahitai.
Jordan gal Moab gamsunga Mose’n hiche thudan hi hilchet ding anagot ahin, hitin anaseiyin ahi:
“Horeb molsanga chun Pakai i-Pathen uvin eiho jah a hitin aseiye, ‘Hiche molsanga hin nang ho naumsot beh seh tauve,

kiheiyun lang nakholjin banjop’uvin, chule Amor mite thing lhang gam le Arabah gama cheng akihetpi jouseu chenna thing lhang gam toh, gam nem lai Negeb gam dung, chule lhanglam twikhanglen pang, canaan mite gam le Lebanon, Euphrate vadung len chan geiyin chetauvin.

Vetan, keiman na masanguva gam kakoipeh tauve; che lut-uvin lang, Pakaiyin napu napateu Abraham, Isa ac chule Jacob le amaho nunga ason achilhah jouseu peh dinga anakihahselna sa gam chu galo tauvin,’ ati.
“Hichepet chun keiman nang ho jah a kaseiyin, ‘Keima kachangseh a nang ho pojou hoi kahi tapoi;
Pakai na-Pathen’uvin nang ho napunsah tauvin chule tun nang ho kive tem’uvin, tulaiya mihem tamtah nahiuva vana ahsi te jat naphah jengu ahitai.
Pakai, napu napateu Pathen chun nang ho tua namijat’uva kon hin jong asang sangin napunbe sah jengu hen lang, chujongle aman nang ho nathutep banguvin phatthei naboh uhen!
Keiman nang ho kiphinna hitobang loma gihsa hi changseh a iti kapoh jou ding ham?
Naphung phunguva konin miching thu sep khen them le tohna neisa mi lhengdoh uvin lang, keiman amaho chu nang ho lamkaiya kapansah ding ahiuve,’ tin kanaseiye.
Chuin nang hon neidonbut’uvin, ‘Nangman keiho jah a nathusei ho hi keiho dinga bol dingin apha thei lheh jenge,’ natiuvin ahi.

Hiti chun keiman naphung phunguva konin mi lamkai cheh, miching le tohna neisa mi kalhengdoh in, amaho chu nang ho chunga lamkai din kapansah in asang sang chunga thunei ding, aja ja chunga thunei ding, som nga chunga thunei dingleh, som khat cheng chunga thunei dingin kapansah soh keiyin, chule naphung lah uva vaihom dingin kapansah soh keiyin ahi.

Chule hiche pet chun keiman nathutan vaihom jouseu phate chan thu kapen, ‘Nasopiteu kah a kihehna jouse chu athu ngaipeh uvin lang, mihem khat le asopi kah a hihen lang, chule achen khompi kholgam mi le ama kah a thusoh hijongle dih tah tah in thu tanpeh jiuvin.

Thutan vaihomna chung changa nang hon lang neina nabol louhel diu, mi aneo alen kibang nga athu nabolpeh uva, mi khat mai nagin chomlou dingu ahi; ajeh chu thutan vaihomna kiti hi Pathena ahibouve; chujongle kihehna thu nang ho dinga bol hahsa behseh chu keima koma hin lhut tauvin, chuleng keiman athu ngaito nange,’ tin kanaseitai.
Chuti chun hichepet hin keiman nang ho bol dinga thil khohjouse abonchan thupeh dolin kapetai.

“Chuin eiho Horeb’a kon chun ikipatdoh’uvin, chule Pakai thupeh bang bangin namusau gammang lentah le tijat um tah, Amor mite thing lhang jotna lampi ijot paipeh uvin, chujouvin Kadesh-barnea ilhung tauve.
Hiche chun keiman najah uva kaseiye, ‘Pakai i-Pathen’uvin eiho eipeh-u, Amor mite thing lhang gama hung lhung nahiu ahitai.

Vetan, Pakai na-Pathen’uvin na masanguva agam hi anakoisa ahitai; Pakai, napu napateu Pathenin nahil bang banguvin chetouvun lang agam hi galo jenguvin, kichat jong bol dauvin, meidoi jeng jong bolthu dauvin,’ kati.

Hiche phat chun nang ho nabonchan keima henga nahunguvin chule naseitauve, ‘Eihon imasanguva mi sol masau tin, amaho hin agam chu eigavet lhih peh masah-u hen, chule ito bang lampi pen tah ijui touvuva akhopi chengseu hi asunga ilut thei diu ham, ti eiho henga thu hin nung lhut kit’uhen,’ natiuvin ahi.
Nang ho thusei chu ken jong pha kasa lheh jengin, hijeh chun phung khat’a konin mi khat cheh kalhengdoh in, nalah uva mi som le ni kalhengdoh pai tan ahi;
chule amaho hi akitol’uvin thing lhang lama achetouvun, Eshcol phaicham ahung lhunguvin, aphaicham chu agave lhiuvin ahi.

Chule gamve ho chun akhut’uva gamga phabep jong eiho henga ahinpo suh peh uvin, ahinpo lut’ uve; chukit jongleh amaho hin eiho henga thu ahinpo lut’uvin aseitauve, ‘Pakai i-Pathen’uvin eiho eipeh nau khu gampha ahi,’atiuve.
Ahivangin nang hon chetou ding nago pouvin, Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh dou nan adoumah mah naboljo tauvin ahi;
chule nang ho napon in dung tin’ uva naphun phun jenguvin naseitauve, ‘Pakaiyin eiho eihot jeh uva Amor mite khut’a peh doh a suhmang sah dinga Egypt gama kona eihinpuidoh-u ahibouve.

Hoikoma eiho ichetou tou dingu ham? Isopi teuvin eiho eilung thoisah uva asei tah-u chume, “Agam miho chu eiho sangin alen theiyun, sang jong asang thei jouve; akhopi jouseu jong alen theiyin chule vanlaijol geiyin kulpi akikaikhum soh keiye, hiche kalval jong hin keihon agamsunga chun Anakim chate jong kamuuvin ahi,” tin aseiyuve’ native.
Hiche phat chun keiman najah uva kaseiyin, ‘Hiche miho chu chubang tah in kichat dauvin lang, tijat nan jong gelda jenguvin;
nalam kaiyuva pang Pakai na-Pathen’uvin nang ho din gal nasat peh uvin tin, Egypt gama nang ho mitmu chang tah a nabolpeh bang banguvin, ama mong mongin nang ho dia gal nasatpeh tei tei diu ahinai;

chule nache nau lam lam dung lhung keiya napuiyuva, hikom mun nahung lhun kahseuva gamthip noi jenga jong, min achapa apoh banga Pakai na-Pathen’ uvin nang ho itobanga nahin poh-u, hitam ti namu sau tobang bang chu hi jing ding ahi,’ tin kaseiye.
Ahivangin thu hiche kasei jeng jong chun nang hon Pakai na-Pathenu chu natahsan dehsam pouve.

Hiche Pakai Pathen chu ahi, na masanguva lamkaiya panga, ponbuh nason na diu ngahmun nahol peh peh jenguva, jan teng le meikonga napuiyuva, sun teng leh meilhanga napuiyuva nachena diu lampi nahil’uva navetsah pau chu ama ahiye.
“Chuin Pakaiyin nang ho thusei abonchan ajasoh tan, hijeh chun ama alung hangin akihahsel jengin hitin anaseiye;
’Hiche khang gilouva mite hi khat’a khat chan jong napu napateu peh dinga kaki hahselna sa gampha tah khu amulou diu ahi;
Jephunneh chapa Caleb-in bou agam chu muntin, chule aman agachotsa gam chu ama le achate kapeh ding ahi, ijeh-inem itileh aman lolhing tah in Pakai nung nung ajuiye,’ tin anaseitai.
Nang ho jal’in Pakai chu keima chung jenga jong alung hang jengin, hijeh chun aseiye; ‘Nangma jong hiche gama hi nalut louhel ding ahi;
na masanga dingpa, Nun chapa Joshua chubou lut ding ahi, ama chu tilkhou jon, ajeh chu ama hin agam khu Israel alosah ding ahi.

Hiche kalval jong hin nang ho nunao cha pang ho hi, mi ding bep ahiuve, tia nasei chengseu joh hi leh nachateu tulaiya apha ase hetna neilou ho hin gamsung khu ahin jot’uva, keiman jong amaho chu hiche gam hi kapeh a, amahon alouva chenna a anei diu ahi.
Nangma dingin vang kihei yin lang, twikhanglen san jon in gamthip noi lama jinsuh suh tan,’ einati.

“Hiche nungchun nang hon neidonbut’uvin kajah a naseiyuvin, ‘Keiho Pakai dou nan kachonse tauve; Pakai i-Pathen’uvin eithupeh bang bangu chun keiho kontou vung kating, chule gal chu gasat jeng tau vinge,’ natiuve. Chujongle nang ho amichang cheh in ama ama gal manchah cheh nakigot’uvin nakong nakigah soh hel tauvin ahi; hiti chun thing lhang gamsunga kontou ding chu thil bailam chan bou nagel’uvin ahi.

Chuin Pakaiyin keima jah a aseiyin, ‘Hiche hoa hin seipeh-in lang, ‘Chetou dauvin lang gal chu gasat hih hel’uvin, ajeh chu keiman nang ho kaumpi pouve; che jong leu chun nagal teu angsunga gal nalel tei tei diu ahi,’ tin aseiye, seiyin anati.
Hita chu keiman nang ho kaseipeh van gin nang honla nei kho ngai tapouve; Pakai thupeh nadouvun, chule ahisa to ban gin nagel’uvin, hiti chun thing lhang lama nakon tou jenguvin ahi.
Hichun thing lhang gama cheng Amor mite chu nang ho dou nan ahung kondoh pai pai jengun, khoipin mi a del bangin nadel’uvin, Seir chan gei, Hormah mun geiyin nahung satchap deh duh jeng tauve.
Hichun nang ho nahung kile kit’uvin, Pakai angsunga nakap kap nauvin, ahinla Pakaiyin nang ho ka ogin najah peh pouvin, naheng lam’uva jong anakhang jeng cha jong ahinsung go tapoi.
Chuphat’in nang ho ning kihal leuvin Kadesh kiti laiya hin nikho tamtah nathamden tauve.
“Hiche nung chun eiho ikiheiyun, hiti chun Pakaiyin keima eihil bang bangin twikhanglen san lam jonin gamthip laiya ijinle leuvin, nikho tamtah sungin Seir molsang kimvela ichele le tauve.
Hichun Pakaiyin keima jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati.
“Hiche molsang kimvel gamsunga hin nang ho nache khopset tauve, hijeh chun sah lama kihei tou tauvin.

Chujongle mipi chu thu pen lang hitin seiyin, ‘Nang hon Seir gama cheng nasopiu Esau chate gamgi najotpa ding kon chau ahitai; amaho chun nang ho nagin diu ahi. Hijeh chun veuvin, phatah a nadep them diu angaiye;

amaho hi toh kina hih hel’uvin; ajeh chu keiman amaho gam khu them’a them cha jong nang ho kapeh lou diu, chotpha kham, kengpeh thol jeng cha jong kapeh louhel ding nahiuve; ipijeh-inem itileh Seir molsang hi keiman Esau chenna dinga kapehsa ahitai.
Nang hon Esau chatea kona anneh jeng jong suma nakichoh diu, don ding twi jeng jong sum ma ma a nakichoh tho diu ahibouve.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin nakhut’a na natoh jouse abonchan phatthei aboh soh keiyin, hiche gammang lenpi napal galkai jeng jong hi ahaimo pon ahi; hiche kum som li sung hin Pakai na Pathenin nangma naumpi jing jengin, hijeh chun nangman imacha lhah samna naneipon ahi,’ ati.
Hiti chun eiho Seir gama cheng isopiu Esau chatea kon leh Arabah lamlena kon chule Elath le Eziongeber a kon chun ikitol pai tauve. Chujouvin eiho ikihei kit’uvin Moab gamthip noilam jonin ichetauve.

Hichea chun Pakaiyin keima jah a aseitai, ‘Moab mite chu del khum jeng din got dan lang, gal kisatna mun jenga jong kisatpi dingin gel dan; ajeh chu keiman ama gam hi them’a them cha jong nangma chenna mun dinga kapeh louhel ding nahibouve; ajeh pentah chu keiman Ar gam hi Lot chate chenna dia kapehsa ahitai,’ ati.
Hikoma hin masang laiyin Emim mi, milen tah tah atama jong tam, chule Anakim san a jong sang miho chu ana chenguvin ahi.
Anakim tobangin amaho jong chu Rephaim mi ahi, tin min anaheuvin ahinai; Moab miten vang amaho hi Emim mi anatibouvui.

Hor mite jong masang laiyin Seir gama anachenguvin, ahin Esau chaten amaho hi gam neilou anasouvin, chule amasanguva konin asumang hel’uvin, chuin amaho chenna muna Esau chate joh anacheng den tauve; Israelin achenna gam, Pakaiyin amaho apehsa gamsung abolna tobanga anabolu ahi.
’Tun kipatdoh’uvin lang Zered vadung galkaiyuvin,’ ati. Hijeh chun eiho jong Zered vadung igalkai jeng tauve.

Chule Kadesh-barnea idalhah uva pat’ a Zered vadung igalkai chan geiyu, Pakaiyin amaho ahahsel banga, chuche khanga galsat mi jouse abonchauva ngahmuna kona amanthah chan geiyu chu kum somthum le kum get alhingin ahi.
Ijeh-mem itileh amaho abonchauva amanthah hel masanguva, ngahmuna kona abonchauva suhmang hel dinga Pakaiyin aban thahatsana amaho anadou mong mong ahitauve.
“Hita hi galsat mihem jouse amanthah uva chule mipi lah a kona amaho chengse athigam hel phat’uvin,
Pakaiyin keima jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati,
’Tuni nikhoa hi nangma Ar gama Moab gamgi nagalkai tei tei ding ahi;

chule nangman Ammon chate gamgi nailam nahin phah teng leh amaho chu del khum dan lang, kinahpi din jong got dan; ajeh chu keiman Ammon chate gamsung hi nangma chenna dinga them’a them cha jeng jong kapeh louhel ding nahi; ipijeh-inem itileh keiman Lot chate chenna dia kapehsa ahitai,’ ati.
Hiche gam jong hi Rephaim gam tin akihei; masang laiyin Rephaim mite hikoma hin anachenguvin, ahinla Ammon miten amaho chu Zamzummim anatiuve.

Anakim miho tobanga milen le mitam chule misang ahiuvin, ahivangin Pakaiyin amaho masanga hiche miho chu anasumang jengin, chuin amahon jong hitobang miho chu gam neilou asouvin, amaho khelin agama acheng den tauve;

Esau chate dinga Seir a chengte anasuh mang peh bang chun, aman Hor mite jong chu amaho dingin anasuh mang peh jengin, hijeh chun amahon gam neilou asouvin, tuni geiyin hin agamuva amaho khelin achengtauve.
Chujongle Avvim mite Gaza geiya akho khoa cheng ho le Caphtor a kona hungdoh Caphtor mite jong chu asumanguvin, amaho khelin achengden tauvin ahi.

Kipatdoh uvin, nakholjin banjop’uvin, chule Arnon phaicham gal galkaiyuvin; vetan, keiman Amor mi Sihon kitipa, Heshbon lengpa le agam nangma khut’a kapeh ahitai; agama cheng dingin kipat’in lang, chule Sihon toh ngahmuna khun gakisat lhon tan.

Tunia pat keiman vannoi pumpi chunga cheng mihemte dinga nangma ginna leh kichatna achunguva kakoisoh kei ding, amahon nangma umchan thuthang ajah tengu leh kiti hot hot jeng diu, chujongle nangma jeh a abonchauva lung thacholsoh hel ding ahiuve,’ ati.
“Hiti chun keiman jong Kedemoth gamthip noiya konin Heshbon lengpa Sihon henga sottol ho kasolin, chamna thu hijat hi kapohsah jengin kaseiye;
“Nagamsung neijot paisah tei teiyin, lamlen laiseh seh a bou kache ding, jet le veiya jong kiheidoh ding kahipoi.

Neh ding le chah ding jeng jong nangman suma neichoh sah ding, aman kapeh a kaneh ding, don ding twi jeng cha jong suma neichohsah a chulengle bou kadon thei ding ahi; nagamsung chu keng mai maiyin neijot galkai sah pou pou tan;

Seir molsanga cheng Esau chate le Ar gama cheng Moab miten keima eibolna bang chun, Pakai keiho-Pathenin eipeh nau gamsunga lut dinga Jordan vadung kagalkaiya, agamsung kalut masang sen neijot sah tan,’ kati.

Ahinla Heshbon lengpa Sihonin eiho ama heng eijotpa sah tapouvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin ama chu alungthim atahsah tan, tuni nikhoa tobang hin, ama chu nangma khut’a apehdoh thei theina dingin alungthim sunga louchalna akhumpeh tai.
Chuin Pakaiyin keima jah a aseiyin, ‘Vetan, keiman Sihon le ama gamsung khu nangma kapeh pan pan nahitai; agamsunga khu nachen theina dingin galo pan tan,’ eiti.
Hiche phat chun eiho to kisat dingin Sihon ahung kondoh jengin, ama ahin chule amite ahiuvin abon chauvin Jahaz galmuna chun ahung kitol lut jenguvin ahi.
Ahinla Pakai i-Pathen ‘uvin am a chu eiho eipedoh jenguvin, ama ahin achate ahiuvin chule amite abonchauvin eihon gal kisatna a chun ijoutauve.
Hiche pet chun eihon Sihon khopi jouse abonchan ilasoh hel’uvin, khopi ahi kiti tapou chu isumang jenguvin, pasal numei, chule chapang isumanguvin, khen nei louhel’uvin ikoitauve.
Khopi jousea kona thilkeo kichomdoh chengse leh eiho dinga ikilah cheh-u gancha bong ho chubou ahingdoh a umah ahiye.

Amon phaicham gamgi china um Aroer a pat le phaichama kisadoh khopi, Gilead chan geiyin, eiho dinga that lei ding khopi khat’a khat cha jong anaumpon ahi; Pakai i-Pathen’ uvin khopi jouse chu abonchan eiho khut’a apehdoh hel jengin ahi.

Ammon chate gamsung seh seh chubou nangman nanai lut lou anahi, Ammon chate gam chu Jabbok vadung pang jouse le thing lhang gamsunga khopi jouse ahin, Pakai i-Pathen’uvin ajah da gamsung jouse chu ahiye.

“Hichun eiho ikiheiyun Bashan lang lampia ichetou tauve; chuin Bashan lengpa Og kitipa chu eiho sat din ahung kondoh tan, ama ahin amite aboncha ahiuvin Edrei kiti galmuna chu kisatpi dingin ahung kon jenge.

Ahin Pakaiyin keima jah a thu aseiyin, ‘Og kitipa khu kicha hih hel in; ajeh chu keiman ama ahin, amite aboncha ahiuvin chule agam leiset jeng jong khu nangma khut’a kapehdoh ahitai; hijeh a chu nangman Heshbon a cheng, Amor mi Sihon lengpa nabolna bang banga nabol kit ding ahi,’ eiti.

Chutobang chun Pakai i-Pathen’uvin Bashan lengpa Og le amite abonchauvin eiho khut’a anapedoh tan ahi; Og dinga mihing khat’a khat cha jong akiholmo hel masangsen ithat’uvin ama geiyin isugam hel tauve.

Hichepet chun eihon Og khopi jouse abonchan ilauvin, amahoa kona lah louva ikoiyu khopi khat’a khat cha akikhendoh anaum hih hel jenge; Bashan gamsunga Og leng gamsungse sea Argob gam hop sungsea khopi aboncha ahin, khopi somgup alhingin ahi.

Khoneo cha cha tampi sim louvin, pal kiget khumlou jouse akisimda a ahijongleh, khopi hijat hi phatah tah a kulpi kikaikhum jeng leh palsang tah tah a kiget khum, kelkot tampi neiya kisem, kelkotgot tamtah tah kikam khum khopi jeng ahinalaiye.
Eihon khopi hijatpi hi Heshbon lengpa Sihon kibolna bang chun isumang hel jenguvin, akhopia akhopi jouse abonchan isumanguvin, pasal numei chule chapang abonchauvin isumang hel jenguvin ahi.
Hichea chun gancha bong jouse le khopi sung dunga thilkeo jouse chu gal laiya kichomdoh thilkeovin ikichom ngimhel jenguvin ahi.
Hitobang hin eihon hichepet chun Jordan vadung gal a Amor mite leng ni jen leng gam jeng jong ama ni khut’a konin ilahpeh jeng theiyuvin, Amon phaichama konin Hermon molsang geiyin ilouvin,
hiche Hermon hi anahi Sidon miten Sirion atiuva, chule Amor miten Senir anasah jiuvin ahiye.

Hiti chun dokhang banga kidocham deng gamsunga khopi jouse leh Gilead gamsunga khopi jouse toh, chule Bashan gamsung jouse chutoh, Bashan gamsunga Og lengpa leng gamsung khopi jouse Salecah le Edrei chan geiyin ilasoh hel’uvin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Rephaim mite lah a Bashan lengpa Og changseh anaum ah ahin, vetan, ama chu alupna jal khun jeng jong thih jeng anahi; hiche jal khun hi Rabbah a Ammon mite jal khun ma ma chu hi lou ham? Min tong ate na ngaiya atang gola akitea ahileh asao dan chu tong ko alhingin, availam alet dan tong li alhingin ahi.

“Hichepet a agam chu chenna dinga ilah phat’uvin keiman Reuben chate le Gad chate chenna ding tin Amon phaicham chin a um Aroer gamgia pat’in Gilead thing lhang akeh khatse se chu asunga khopi jouse chutoh kapeh than ahi;
Gilead gamsung amoh chengse le Hushan gamsung Og leng gam abonchan, Argob gamsung chu keiman Manasseh phung keh khat kanapen ahi. Hiche Bushan gam pumpi hi aboncha Rephaim gam, tia anakisei ahiye.

Manasseh phunga mi Jair chun Argob gamkolse se Bashan gama pat Geshur mite le Ma acath mite gamgi chan geiyin abonchan alasoh keiyin, akhoneo jouse chu ama min mong mongin ana minvon, amin aputsah in, Jair-ngahmun anatin, tuni geiyin jong hiti hin akiseiye.
Machir chu Gilead gamsung kapen,
chujongle Reuben chate leh Gad chate chu Gilead gama pat, Amon phaicham geipeh hi alai lunga phaicham hi gamgin kapansah jengin, Jabbok vadung chan gei, Ammon mite gamgi chan geiyin kapen ahi;
Arabah jong ahin, Jordan vadung hi gamgia kimang jeng ahi; Chinnereth gama pat Arabah twikhanglen, chi twikhanglen chan gei, Pisgah molsang apang kensuh lam langa niso lam chan gei hi anahi.

“Chujongle hichepet chun keiman nang ho thu kapeuvin kaseiye, ‘Pakai na-Pathen’uvin hiche gam hi nang ho chenna dinga napeh-u ahi; nang ho lah a gal hang miho chu abonchauva galvona kivonsoh keiyuva, nasopiteu Israel chate masanga galkai masa ding ahiuve.
Najiteu numeiho le nachasen jouseu, chule nabong jouseu ahin, ajeh chu bong tampi naneiyui, ti keiman kahetsa ahi, hichengse hi abonchauva keiman nang ho kapehsa khopi dunga hi umden diu,

nang ho nabolna banguva Pakaiyin nasopiteu Israel chate dang jong kicholdona apeh a, amahon jong Jordan vadung gal a chen mun akimu uva Pakai na-Pathen’uvin amaho apehna gam alo masangseuva napan diu, chujou teng leh nang ho jong amitakip keiman kapehsa achenna mun cheh a nahung kile kit diu ahi, ‘kati.

Chujongle hichepet chun keiman Joshua thu kapen hitin kaseiye, ‘Hiche leng teni chunga Pakai na-Pathenu thilbol hi nangman namit tah a namu ahitai; hitobang banga hi nache lutna gam, leng gam jouse jong chu Pakaiyin abolsoh kei ding ahiye.
Nang hon miho chu nagin lou dingu ahi; ajeh chu nang ho dinga gal sat jia chu Pakai na-Pathenu ama ahibouve,’ katin ahi.
“Hichepet jong chun keima Pakai henga katao tao jengin hitin kaseiye,

’O Pakai Pathen, nangman nalhachapa hi nalet dan le naban thahat dan namusah pan ahitan; ijeh-inem itileh nangma bol tobang hitobang thil nasa tah tah hi abol thei ding vana hihen lang leiya hijongle pathen ito bang ham auma?
Keima jong neigalkai sah tei teiyin lang hin katao ahiye, thing lhang gam nom tah le Lebanon gam chu kamutei tei na dingin Jordan neigalkai sah tan,’ kati.

Ahivangin nang ho jeh-in kei chung jenga jong Pakai analung hangin, hijeh chun kataona jong eingaipeh tapon ahi; chujongle Pakaiyin keima jah a aseiyin, ‘Nang din aphaset jeng tai; hiche thudol hi kajah a seipoh kit ta hih hel’in,
Pisgah molvuma khun kaltouvin lang, khodah-in nilhum lam, sah lam, lhang lam chule niso lam kiheiyin namit te nin vekimvel soh keiyin; ajeh chu nangma hiche Jordan vadung hi nagalkai lou ding ahitai.

Ahin Joshua hi phaten thulhah-in lang, tilkhouvin, thahatsah jon; ijeh-inem itileh ama hin hiche mite hi alamkaiya Jordan galkai ding, nangman namit’a namu ding gamsung khu amite hi alosah a achensah ding ahi, ‘einati.
Hijeh chun keiho jong Beth-peor gal a phaichama chun kacheng den tauve.

“Tun vo Israel, keiman nang ho kahilji chonha dan jouse le chondan jouse hi lung lut tah in ngaiphau vin lang, hichengse se hi boldoh din gel phauvin; chutileh Pakai napu napateu Pathenin nang ho napehsau gamsunga khu nalut theiyuva agama khu nachen thei dingu ahi.

Keiman nang ho kapehsa thupeh hi gop jong nagopbe thei louhel diu, lahdoh jong nabol thei louhel dingu ahi; hitobanga hi keiman nang ho kathupeh Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh chengse chu nanit thei diu bou ahiye.
Ba al-peor a chu Pakaiyin ipi tobang thil anaboldoh hi tam, ti namit’uva namusau ahitai; hichea chun Pakai na-Pathen ‘uvin nalah uva Peor muna Ba al nung jui miho abonchauvin asugam hel jengin ahi;
ahin nang ho Pakai na-Pathen’uva dinga kitah tah a chon chengse vang chu tuni geiyin damselin naum nalaiyuve.

Vetan, keiman chonna dan jouse leh chondan jouse abonchan Pakai ka-Pathenin eithupeh bang bangin nang ho kahil tai; hita hi nang hon jong chenna dinga najot lut nau gamsunga hichengse kahilu hi najui theina diuva kati ahi.

Thupeh hicheng chonna dan le chondan hi nit jinguvin; ijeh-inem itileh mipi mu dinga jong chihna le hetkhen themna hi ding, amahon jong chonna dan hijatpi hi ajah doh tengu leh hita asei diu ahiye, ‘Dih mong mongin hiche nam len tah mite hi chingtah le thil hekhen them tah tah ahimong mong nauve,’ ati diu ahi.
Ajeh pentah chu eihon Pakai i-Pathenu ikou tengu leh ikom chauva aum jing jeng thei banga hi akom naicha um jing thei pathen neiya koi nam pen tah hibanga nasa hi um nga nam?

Chutobangma a chu keiman nang ho masang tah a kakoipeh tobang danthu hijatpi hibang lom loma dih le kichen hi chonna dan hihen lang chondan hijeng jong leh anei jouva koipen nam len um kham ong tuni geiya hi?

“Phate chan ching theiyin lang, nalungthim le nalhagao ching thei tah in um jing jengin, achutilouva ahileh nangman namit’a namusa thil ho jeng jong nasuhmil thei ahin, nahinkho sunga chonna dan hijatpi hi nalungthim sunga kona kitol mang jeng thei jong ahiuve; chonna dan hijat hi nachate le natute geiyin jong nitsah soh keiyin.

Horeb molsang chunga nangma Pakai na-Pathen angsunga nadin a, Pakaiyin keima jah a anaseiya, ‘Kahenga hin mipi hin khomin, keiman amaho chu kathusei jouse hi ngaisah ing ting, chuti chun amahon jong hiche leiset chunga ahinlai seuva keima gin ding dol kithem chuh uhen lang, hitobangma hin amahon jong achateu hilje them uhen,’anati.

Hichun nang ho jong nahung kikhin lut soh keiyuvin, molsang bul thing lhang chin a nadinguvin ahileh, hichepet chun mol sang pumpijong meiyin akan, vanlaiya meikhu akitungdoh jengin, muthim lhangkhal akiheh let lut jengin, meibol akaiyin, chule athim let lutjenge.
Chule meilhang lah meikonga kon chun Pakaiyin nang ho henga thu ahinseiyin, nang hon jong thu kisei gin chu najauvin ahivangin alim le agong imacha namupouve; a ogin mai mai chubou najah-u ahiye.
Hichea chun Pakaiyin nang ho henga najui diu, nang ho nathupeh sau ama kitepna chu aphongdoh tan ahi; hiche thupeh kiti hi thusom chu ahin, aman hichengse chu song pheng ni chunga sutsan akoitai.

Chujongle hichepet chun Pakaiyin keima eithupeh tan, hicheng chonna dan jouse le chondan jouse hi nang ho kahil’uva, nang hon jong Jordan galkaiya nacheuva nagachen nadiu gamsunga chu hichengse hi najuisoh kei diu, ati ahiye.
“Hichejch chun nangma nangma cheh phaten kigin them ‘uvin. Pakaiyin Horeb molsanga meikong lah a kona nang ho henga thu asei nikhoa jong nang hon alim le agong ∑namudoh deh louvu ahin,
ching theiyuvin, achutilouva ahileh nang hon nang ho le nang ho dinga milim kilhajol doilim tobang nanop nop’a nakisemthu uva, achalpou anupou nasemdoh diu,
leiset chunga cheng gamsa lim tobang pou, alha a leng thei vacha lim pou jong nasemthu jeng theiyu,
tola kithol tho ganhing ho lim hijongle nasem’uva, leiset noilam twi lah a cheng nga lim tobang hijongle nasemthu jenguva nahou theiyu ahi.

Hijeh chun van lam navet’uva nisa lhathah chule ahsite leh van loupina jouse namu tengu jongle hichengse jong chu chibai naboh uva Pathen banga najenle louna dinguvin ching theiyuvin; hicheng thil hijat hi Pakai na-Pathenin vannoi pumpia cheng mihem te dinga, amaho phatchomna ding joh a apeh ahibouve.

Nang ho dinga vang akitileh, Pakaiyin nakoudoh uva, thih al leng lunga kito meilhum sung tobanga anaum Egypt gamsunga kona nahin puidoh-u ahin, tulai nikhoa banga hi ama mite hisah ding, ama nei agoulo mong mong hisah dia nahin puidoh mong mongu anahi.

Hiche kalval jong chun nang ho chung chang jeh in keima chung jenga jong Pakai analung hangin, keima hi Jordan vadung kagal kailouna ding leh, Pakai na-Pathenin gouva nanei dinga napeh ding gampha sunga chu keima kalut louhelna dingin anakihahsel khum jengin ahi.

Hijeh a chu keima hiche lai gamsunga kathi den tei tei ding, Jordan vadung kagal kai lou ding ahitai; nang ho vang Jordan vadung nagal kaiyuva, hiche gampha tah khu chenna naneiyuva nagalo diu ahinai.

Ching theiyuvin lang nang ho le nang ho kiging phauvin; ajo leh Pakai na-Pathenu kitepna sumil khauvin natin, nang ho toh akitepna chu nasuhmil uva, Pakai na-Pathenin ajah nomlou thil nabola, hitobang thil khat tou lima jong milim kilhajol doilim nasemthu jeng thei ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathen hi mi kavam hel thei meikong ahijengin, Pathen tom ngaitah ahiye.

“Nangman chate tute naneiya, chujongle agamsunga hi nateh den teng, ijemtia nang hon thilse nabol’uva, milim kilhajol doilim thil khat ham toh kiloa nasem’uva, Pakai na-Pathen mitmua ipi hijongle thilsea kisei chu nabol jeng tah a ama naphin lung hang tah leh,

keiman nang ho douna hettohsah a pang dinga tuni nikhoa banga hi van le leiset kahin kou ding, tua acheng dinga alo dia nache nau Jordan gal kaiya najot nau gamsunga kona hi nang ho chomkah louva namanthah hel jeng diu ahi; agamsunga chu nang ho sot pi nachen louhel diu, nakisu mang hel jeng diu ahiye.
Chutah leh Pakaiyin nang ho hi mitin lah a nathe thanguva, Pakaiyin nadel lut nau namtin vaipi lah a chu nang ho mijat lhomcha bou nahi diu ahitai.
Hiche gamsunga chu nanghon thing le songa Pathen lim kisemthu ho, mihemte khutsoh thil, kho mu thei loule kho ja thei lou, ima nethei loule ima gimnam nah thei louho nagajenle diu ahi.
Amavang hiche gama kona chu nangman Pakai na-Pathen nahol diu chutengle ama chu nakimu doh ding, hita chu ama hi nangman nalungthim pumpi le nalhagao pumpia nahola ahileh namutei tei ding ahi.
Genthei hesoh nathoh a chule thil hijat hi nachung a ahung lhun teng, hitobang nikho nung chuleh, nangma Pakai na-Pathen henga nahung kile kit“a, chutah le ama ogin jeng bou na ngai ding ahitai.

Ijeh inem itileh Pakai na-Pathen chu hepina lhingset ahin, aman nangma donlouva nakoi louhel ding, suh jong nasuh mang lou ding, napu napate henga akihahselnasa akitepna jong chu asuhmil louhel ding ahi.

“lpijeh-inem itileh nangma masanga achesa nikho laiya thilsoh chu dong tem in ong; Pathenin leiset chunga mihem asema pat'a thilsoh jouse dongin, van mong langa pat among lang khat geiya thilsoh hijongleh, hitobang thil nasa hi anasoh khasa hitam ahilou jongle akijah khahna anaum kham.
Nangman najah tobanga hi mihem koipen hin meikong lai lunga kona apathenin thu asei ogin ajah a hingdoh kha mong mong hinam?

Ahilouva ahijongleh pathen hoiche pen chun mihem nam khat lah a kona mihem nam khatma chu ama mite hisah dinga chea agakipui got’a, patepna tamtah le melchihna tamtah abol khum jenga, thil kidang tampi aboldoh a, gal akisatpi jenga, bantha hat tah le banjang kikhang hel a abola, tijat umtah tah thil abola, Egypt gamsunga Pakai na-Pathen’uvin namit mu tah uva nang ho dinga abol tobang banga bola pathen dang umkham?
Nangma henga hiche hi kivetsah a, hita hi nangman Pakai kiti hi Pathen ahin, ama tailou adang khat’a khat cha jong aumpoi, ti nahetna dinga kibol ahitai.

Vana konin aman a-ogin nangma najah sah tan, hitobanga hi nangma khigahna ding ati ahin; chule leiset chunga jong ama meikong nasa tah chu namusah tai; hichea hin nangman jong meikong lah a konin athuseijouse najatan ahi.

Chujongle Pakaiyin napu napate angailut’a, amaho bana mite achilhah jouseu alhendoh kit’a, hijeh a hi nangma jong Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh a naumpi jing jenga athahat nasa tah a chu nahin puidoh ahin,

chule nangma namtin vaipi chujat nang sanga lenjo jo leh gamchenga hatjo jo jong nadel mangpeh jenga, tuni nikhoa bang banga hi nachen theina dinga, hiche gamsunga hi nahin puilut’a, miho gamsung chu nangman gouva naloa nachenna thei dinga napeh ahi;
hijeh chun tunin kihet jengin lang chule nalungthim sunga melchih jing jeng tan, Pakai kitipa hi van chunga Pathen jong ahin, noi leiset'a Pathen jong ahiye; pathen dang aum hih hele.

Hiti ahijeh a hi nangman ama chonna dan jouse nanit a tunia keiman nangma kathupeh ama thupeh jouse jong nanit ding, chuti hen lang hileh nangma dinga jong pha a, , chule nangma bana nachate dinga jong hung phathei ding ahin; chulengle Pakai na-Pathenin atonsot’a nagam dinga napehna gamsunga hi nangma hin nikho jeng jong sot thei ding ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Mose’n jong Jordan gal niso lama chun kiselna ding khopi thum atumbeh in akoidoh tan,

hiche khopi dunga hi mithat pen pen chu ajamlut theina dingin agon, gutupna beiya aheng akom that ham, masanga amato kitomona nei jong ham hilou, hitobanga mithat pen pen chu jamlut ding, hiche khopiho khat pen pen a hi ajamlut man a ahileh ama chun ahinkho akihuhhing thei ding ahi,

Reuben chate dingin dokhang do tobanga kido gamsunga Bezer khopi chu akhenpeh in, Gad chate dingin Gilead gamsunga Ramoth khopi akhenpeh kit’in, chule Manasseh chate dingin jong Bashan gamsunga Golan khopi chu akhenpeh tai.
Mose’n Israel chate angsunga anakoipeh danthu chu hiche hi ahiye;
Egypt gama kona ahung kitoldoh uva Mose’n Israel chate jah a anaseipeh hettohsahna jouse leh chonna dan jouse, chondan jouse chu hichengse hi ahin;

aseina mun jong Jordan gal phaicham lai, Beth-peor toh kimai ngat lai, Amor mi lengpa Sihon gamsung, Egypt gamsunga kona ahung kitoldoh laiyuva Mose le Israel chaten akisat piuva anajo pau, Heshbon khopia chengpa gamsung lai chu anahi.
Israel chaten Sihon gamsung jong analauvin, chennan ananeiyun, Bashan lengpa Og gamsung jong analauve; amani hi Amor mite leng ahi cheh lhonin, Jordan gal niso lama cheng gel ahilhone;
agamsung mong mong chu Amon phaicham chin a um Aroer a pat’a Sirion molsang gei ahin, Sirion kiti hi Hermon jong ahiye;
chule Jordan niso lama Arabah gamsungse se toh ahithan, Arabah twikhanglen geiyin ahung kilhung lutpeh in, Pisgah molkai kaiya ahung kilhungpeh in ahi.

Mose’n Israel chate chu abonchauvin akouvin chuin ajah uva aseitai; “Ngaiyin Israel, tunia keiman nang ho jah dinga nanabenguva kaseipeh-u chonna danjouse leh chondan jouse hi, aboncha boldoh soh kei ding nang ho nakithem chuh diu ahiye.
Pakai i-Pathen’uvin Horeb molsanga chun eiho toh kitepna khat anasemtan ahi.
Hiche kitepna hi ipu ipateu chutoh anasem ahipoi, eiho mong mong hitoh anasem ahin, eiho tuni geiyin ihing nalaiyuve.
Molsang chunga chun Pakaiyin nang ho kimaiton nakihou piuvin, meikong lah a konin thu ahinseitai;

hichepet chun keima Pakai le nang ho kah a chun kana ding jingin, nang ho jah a Pakai thusei phongdoh son dingin kana um jingin ahi; ajeh chu meikong maiya chun nang ho nakichauvin, molsanga chun nang ho nakaltou ngam tapouve: aman hitin aseiye;
“Keima hi Pakai na-Pathen kahin, Egypt gamsung, kihenna ina kona nangma hinpuidoh pa chu kahiye.
“Nangman keima angsunga pathen dang nanei louhei ding ahi.
“Nangman chunga vana hihen lang, noi leiset chunga hijongle, chule leiset noilam twi lah a hijongle thilsem lim tobang khat’a milim kilhajol doi nasemthu louhel dmg ahi;

hitobang thilsem kisemthuho hi Pathen bola nabola akom’ uva nabonkhup’a chule najenle louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathen keima hi Pathen tom ngai tah kahin, keima eiho amitechu apu apau themmona jeng jong atu achate chunga khang thum khang li chan geiya phul jingji kahiye.
Ahinla keima eingailute ding le kathupeh jouse nitsoh ho dinga lungset long louva musah jing jeng kahi kit nai.
“Nangman Pakai na-Pathen min chu mohseh seh a napat louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu ama min mohseh seh a phapoh jingpa chu Pakaiyin themmona beiya akoi louhel ding ahiye.
“Cholngah nikho chu nit’in lang, Pakai na-Pathenin nathupeh bang bangin athengin umsah jing jengin.
Nigup sunga nangman na natoh a, natoh ding chan natohsoh hel ding;

ni sagi lhin ni vang hi Pakai na-Pathen dinga cholngah nikho ahin, hiche nikhoa hi nangman natoh kitipou pou khat'a khat cha jong natoh louhel ding ahi; nangma hin lang nachapa hihen lang nachanu hijongle, nasoh pasal hihen nasoh numei hijongle, nabongchal hihen lang nasangan hileh, nagancha kitipou pou hijongleh, chujongle nakelkot hinkal lhahsa nahenga lhung kholjin mi hihen lang koi hijongle natonga um thei louhel ding ahin, hitobanga hi nangma nakicholdo banga nasoh pasal hihen nasoh numei hijongle kicholdo theiya umsoh hela kicholdo ding ahiuve.

Nang jong Egypt gamsunga chu soh a gapangsa nahi, ti nageldoh jing jenga, hichea kona chu Pakai na-Pathenin a ban thahat ajedoh a chule akhut banjang alhundoh a nangma nahin puidoh ahi, ti nagel jing ding; hijeh a chu Pakai na-Pathenin cholngah nikho hi nanit jing jeng dinga thu napehsa ahitai.
“Pakai na-Pathenin nathupeh bang bangin, napa le nanu jabolin, chuti hen lang hileh Pakai na-Pathenin napehna gamsunga hi nahinkho sot’a nadam thei ding ahiye.
“Tol natha louhel ding ahi.
“Chule mi najonpi louhel ding ahi
"Guhchat jong nabol louhel ding ahi.
“Naheng nakom douna a jouthua hettohsah a napan louhel ding ahiye.

“Naheng nakompa jinu jong nadeichat louhel ding; naheng nakompa in jeng jong nadeichat louhel ding ahi, alou hihen lang asoh pasal hihen, asoh numei hileh, abongchal hihen lang asangan hijongleh, ipi thil hijongleh naheng nakompa a kitipou pou chu nadeichat peh louhel ding ahi,’ ati.

“Molsang bula nahung kikhomsoh hel pet tah uva Pakaiyin thu hijat hi nang ho Houbung pumpi jah a anasei ahin, najah theisoh helna diuvin meikong lailung, meilhang lom lah chule muthim lhangkhal kiheh laiya kon chun ogin kithong tah in thu ahinseitai. Hichea chun Pakaiyin aseibe tapon ahi; asei chengse chu song pheng ni chunga ajihdoh soh keiyin, hiche song pheng teni chu keima einapetai.
“Molsang meikong tobanga akon jeng pet’a muthim lhangkhal kiheh laiya kona ogin najah phat ‘uvin nang ha keima henga nahunguvin, naphung phunguva lamkai jouse le nalah uva upa jouse nakimsoh hel’uve.

Chuin nang hon keima jah a naseiyuvin, “Vetan, Pakai i-Pathen ‘uvin aloupina le aletna eimusah tauvin, eihon jong meikong jalah a konin ama ogin ija cheh tauve; tuni nikhon Pathenin mihem akihoupin, ahivangin mihem ahingdoh jeng theiye, ti eihon imusoh keiyuve.
Chuti ahile ipibola eiho imoh thi jeng diu ham? Ajeh chu eiho Pakai i-Pathen ‘uvin eiho henga anivei lhinna thu asei ja kit leu hen, hiche meikong nasa tah hin eiho ileugam gamhel jeng diu ahi.
Ipijeh-inem itileh tahsa hing mihem koipen tah hin eiho banga meikong lailunga kona Pathen hing chun thu asei ajah a, a ogin ajah tah vanga hingdoh kit jeng theiya um kha mong nam?

Nangma kikhin lut ‘in lang Pakai i-Pathenu thusei ding chu abonchan ngaisoh keiyin; chujou tengle keiho henga hin Pakai i-Pathen’uvin nangma henga asei jouse chu abonchan neiseipeh kit’uvin; keihon jong ngaiyu ving ting asei sei chu kabol diu ahi,’ natiuve.

“Hitobanga nang hon keima jah a naseiyu nathusei jouseu abonchan Pakaiyin ajadoh soh tai; hijeh chun Pakaiyin keima jah a aseiyin, ‘Hiche miten nangma jah a aseiyu athusei jouseu keiman a bonchan kajasoh tai; amahon asei jouseu hi asei dih lheh jenguvin ahi.

O kadeh, amaho hin hitobang lungput hi aphat jousea avop jing jeng theiyu hitave leh ong! Hiti hin keima eigingu hen, keima thupeh jouse nit jing jeng theiyu hen lang hileh amaho dinga jong pha lheh jeng ding, atu achate diuva jong atonsot kumkhoa pha lheh jeng ding ahi’
Kile kit’in lang amaho jah a khun gaseipeh in, “Nangma nangma ponbuh cheh kijot kit tauvin,” gatin.

Nangma vang keima koma hin ding jing jengin lang, amaho nahil son ding thupeh jouse leh chonna dan jouse chule chondan jouse aboncha keiman kaseipeh ding nahi, hichengse hi keiman amaho kapeh gamsunga achen tengu leh atohdoh thei cheh na diuvin,’ tin aseiye.
Hichejeh a chu hicheng hi natohdoh tei teina dinguva nang ho nachih theiyuva, Pakai na-Pathen ‘uvin nathupeh bang banguva naboldoh diu ahin; jet le veiya nakihei mangsan louhel dingu ahi.

Pakai na-Pathen’ uvin nache nadiu lampi ahi, tia nang ho nathupeh nau lampi jenga chu nacheuva, nava le diu ahin, chulengle bou nahin thei diu, nang ho dinga jong thilpha hiya, chujongle nachenna dingu gamsungjenga jong chu nahinsot thei dingu ahi.

“Pakai na-Pathen ‘uvin nang ho kahil dinga keima eithupeh chonna dan jouse le chondan jouse chu hiche hi ahin, agamsunga cheng dia nacheuva galkai ding nakigot nau gamsung naphah tengu leh hichengse naboldoh theina diu ati ahi;

Hitobangma a chu nangman jong Pakai na-Pathen nagin theiya, nangma hin lang nachapa hileh, natupa hijeng jongleh nagin cheh uva, nahinkho lhum keiya keiman nangma kathupeh chonna dan chengse hi nanitsoh helna ding kiti ahin, chutihen lang hileh nangma hin nikho jeng jong sot thei ding ahi.

Hijeh chun vo Israel ngaiyin lang, hichengse hi naboldoh tei teina din ching theiyin; naboldoh soh keiya ahileh nangma dinga thilpha tah hi ding, nang ho jong nasa tah a napunbe beuva, Pakai napu napateu Pathenin nangma nathutep bang banga, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gamsunga chu naphat thei ding ahi.
“Ngaiyin vo Israel: Pakai i-Pathenu hi Pakai khatseh bou ahi.
Hijeh a chu nangman Pakai na-Pathen chu nalungthim pumpia nahinkho pumpia chule natha neina jousea na ngailut mong mong ding ahi.
Tuni nikhoa keiman nang kathupeh thu kisei hijatpi hi nalungthim sunga cheng jing jeng ding ahi;

chule hichengse hi nangman insunga natoupet hihen lang lampi dunga navale pet hijongle, nalup pet jeng hihen lang nathodoh pet hijongleh, aboncha hi nachate naseipeh a lung lut mong monga nahil jing jeng ding ahi.
Chujongle thupeh hijat hi nangman nakhut’a nasom lhop jing jenga melchih thei tah a nakoi ding, namit teni kah a nachalpanga nakhai jing jeng ding ahi.
Hita chu aboncha hi na insung kotpi khom dung jousea jong najih soh keiya, chule na in kelkot dung jousea jong najih ding ahiye.

“Pakai na-Pathenin napu napateu Abraham, Isa ac chule Jacob peh dinga chule nangma peh ding a tia, nangman nasahsa hilou hel khopi len tah tah le phatah tah ho napeh diuva akihahselna gamsung chu nahin puilut teng leh,

chujongle nangman nakhol louhel thilpha pha dimset in tampi nachan khah a, nangman nasemlou twikul kijem hoisel sel nachan khah a, nang ma tulou lengpilei phatah tah le Olive thing phung hoitah tah nachan khah a, hicheng hi naneh khah a chule na oivaset teng vang leh,
kichih theiyin, achutilouva ahileh Egypt gamsung kihenna insunga kona nahin puidoh pa Pakai chu nasuh mil jeng thei ahiye.
Nangman Pakai na-Pathen jeng nagin ding, chule ama jeng najenlea ama min jenga nakitep ding ahi.
Nanghon pathen lim kisemthuho nung najui louhel diu, nakimvel’uva cheng mite pathen lim semthuho chu anung najui louhel diu ahi;

ijeh inem itileh nang ho lah a cheng Pakai na-Pathen chu Pathen tom ngaitah ahin ahi; ajo le nangma douna a Pakai naPathen lunghan hung deujah jenga, leiset chunga kona hi aman nangma nasuh mang hel thei ding ahiye.
“Nang hon Massah muna Pakai na-Pathenu nalhep patep banguva ama chu nalhep patep thei louhel diu ahi.
Nang hon Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh jouse leh ama thu hettohsah jouse, achonna dan jouse aman nangma nathupehsa chu nang hon lung lut tah a nanit soh kei dingu ahi.
Chule nangman Pakai mitmua adih le apha jeng boljon, chutile nangma din pha lheh jengin tin, chule Pakaiyin napu napate peh dia akihahselna gamsung, gampha tah chu najot lut’a nalo thei ding ahi,
chujongle Pakaiyin athutepsa bang banga nangma masanga kona namelmate abonchauva adelmang soh hel ding ahi.
“Khonung teng nachapan nangma nadoh a, ‘Pakai i-Pathen’uvin nang ho nathupeh sau hettohsahna le chonna dan ho, chon dan kiti ho hi ipi kiseina ham?’ tia aseiya ahileh,
nangman nachapa jah a chu naseipeh a, “Keiho Egypt gama Pharaoh soh in kapanguvin, ahin Egypt gama konin Pakaiyin keiho hi ban thahat tah a eihin puidoh-u ana hi;

chujongle keiho mitmu Jaitah in Pakaiyin melchihna tampi avetsah in, thil kidang tampi jong aboldoh in, hitobang chun Egypt gamsung douna, Pharaoh douna chule Pharaoh in-sung dou nan thil nasa tah tah le doumo hel hel anabol jengin ahi;

hichea chun Egypt gamsunga konin keiho eihin puidoh uvin, hita chu Pakaiyin i-pu i-pateu peh dia akihahselna gamsung hi keiho eipeh thei na dinguvin hiche gamsunga hi eipui lut theina diuvin anabolin ahi.

Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin eiho dinga phatchomna ahina dingin, hiche chonna dan jouse hi kaboldohna dinguva a bola, chule Pakai i-Pathenu chu kagin jing diuvin eina thupeh cheh uvin ahi; hitobanga chu tulai nikhoa banga hi eihin hing hoi jing theina diuva ati ahi.
Chuti ahijeh chun aman eithupeh bang banguvin eihon Pakai i-Pathenu angsunga athupeh hijat hi boldoh teina ding ngaiton ching thei leu hen eiho dinga thildih hi ding ahi,’ nati ding ahi.

“Pakai na-Pathenin chenna dinga najotna gamsunga khu nahin puilut teng, chujongle nangma masanga namtin vaipi khu adelmanga, Hit mite hiuhen, Girgash mite hiuhen, Amor mite hihen lang, canaan mite hijongle, Periz mite hiuhen, Hivi mite hileh, chule Jebus mite hijeng jong leh nangma sanga hatjo le nasa jo jo khu nam sagi jen ahin, aboncha nadeldoh peh teng leh,

Pakai na-Pathenin abonchauva nangma napehdoh ahitan, hijeh a chu nangman abonchauva najosoh hel ding ahiuve; abonchauva khen beihela nasuh mang jeng ding ahi: amaho khutoh kitepna jong nasemdoh thei lou ding, achunguva hepijong nanei louhel ding ahi.
Chujongle amaho khutoh nakijontoa kichen nabol thei lou diu, nachanute jong amaho chapate dinga napeh thei lou ding, nachapate dinga jong achanuteu napuipeh thei lou ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem iti leh chuta nabollouva ahileh nachapate chun keima eijui nauva konin pui manguvin tin, pathen lim kisemthu ho chu ajenle sah diu, chutengle nang ho douna Pakai lunghan hung deujah jeng ding ahin, hetman louva Pakaiyin nangma nasuh mang hel jeng thei ahiye.

Hijeh a chu nang hon hiche nam sagia miho hi hita nabol diu ahi: amaicham phung jouseu navoh chimpeh uva, milim houna khompi kiphut jouse jong navoh boh peh soh hel diu, Asherim milim jouse jong nakal lhuh peh soh hel uva, amilim kilhajol doilim kisem jouse jong meiya nagovam peh diu ahi.
“Ajeh chu nangma hi Pakai naPathen dinga nam mitheng nahi; leiset chung cheng mitin hijat lah a kona hi Pakai na-Pathenin ama gouloa anei ding mong monga nang hi nalhendoh ahitai.
Nam dang dang mihem hijat sanga hi nang ho natampen jeh uva Pakaiyin nalungset ‘uva nalhendoh jengu ahipoi, ajeh chu nang ho hi mihem hijat lah a alhompen tah nahiu ahijoi.

Pakaiyin nang ho nalungset uva chujongle napu napateu henga akihahsel nasa chu amolso nom jeh joh a aban thahat apat jenga nahin puidoh jengu ahin. Egypt lengpa Pharaoh khut noi, kihenna ina kona nalhatdoh joh-u anahi.

Chuti ahijeh chun Pakai na-Pathen hi Pathen mong mong ahi, ti kihet jengin lang, kitah tah Pathen hiya, ama ngailute dinga akitepna le alungset longlou pe jing jeng thei ahin, athupeh chengse jong mihem khang sang khat geiya nit jing jeng Pathen ahiye.

Chujongle ama hi ama hotbolte dinga amaiyuva lethuh jeng thei jong ahin, abon chauva asuh mang jeng thei ahiye: ama hotbolpa dinga imacha bolthei louva umji ahipoi, ahotbolpa chu amaikoh tah a alethuh jeng ding joh ahibouve.

Hichejeh a hi thupeh chengse tohdohna dia nangma nachih thei ding, tuni nikhoa banga hi chonna dan jouse hihen lang chondan jouse hijongleh keiman nangma kathupeh chengse naboldohna dinga nachih thei ding ahi.

“Nang hon hiche chonna dan jouse hi na ngai them jinguva, aboncha hi nit ding nagel jinguva natoh a poh doh ding nagot jingu leh Pakai na-Pathenin jong nangma dinga akitepna chu a nit jinga, napu napate jah a akihahsel nasa lungset longlou nang hoa kanei jing ding ahi, tia asei chu anit jing jeng ding ahi.

Aman nangma nalungset’a, phatthei naboh ding chule napunsah sah jing ding ahi; nangma tahsa sung peng mi jong phatthei aboh a, nalousoh jong phatthei aboh ding, nachang hihen lang nalengpithei hileh. chule nathaotwi jeng hijongle phatthei naboh peh ding ahin, nangma peh dinga napu napa te henga akihahselna gamsunga chu hitobanga hi nabong jong apunsah ding, nakelngoi jong anou apunsah sah jing ding ahiye.

Mitin hijat chunga hi nangma bou phatthei boh nachan ding: namite lah a jong numei hi hen pasal hijongle achinga cha neilou um thei louhel ding, nagancha lah uva jong chutobanga aching chu umlou ding ahi.

Chujongle Pakaiyin nangma chunga veisetna jouse aboncha alah manga, nangman nahetsa Egypt gamsunga thilse vetsetna tobang chu khat’ a khat jeng cha jong nangma chunga achuhsah a nabolgim sah louhel ding ahi, hitobang thilse ho hi nangma hot tah a nabolte chunga alhunsah joh ding ahibouvin ahi.

Chule Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napeh doh ding mitin vaipi abonchauva nasuh gam hel ding, namit vet’a jong amaho chunga voujang natna naneipeh louhel ding ahi; nang dinga kipalna ahiding jeh a nangman hitobang mite pathen lim semthuho jong chu najuipeh lou ding ahi.
“Nangman nalungthim sunga naseiya, ‘Hiche nam mite hi keima sangin anasa jouvin ahi, keiman amaho hi iti kadel mang jou thei ding hi tam?’ natia ahileh,
hichea jong chu nangin amaho hi nagin louhel ding ahi, hisanga Egypt gamsunga Pakai na-Pathenin Pharaoh le Egypt mite abonchauva abolna chu nageldoh jing jeng ding ahijoi;

namit teni mong monga namusa patep ijat hitam, melchihna ijat hiya thil kidang ijat kiboldoh hitam, Pakai na-Pathenin nangma puidohna dinga itobang loma ban thahat ajedoh a chule akhut ahin lhundoh jeng ham, ti namusa ahitai; hitobang banga hi nangman nagin mitin hijat jong chu Pakai na-Pathenin abo kit ding ahithou thouve.
Hiche kalvala jong chu Pakai na-Pathenin nangma mu dinga kisel mang jouse leh akikhen nalai ahingdoh chasun sun jong chu asuhmang hel kahsea alah uva khoingalte ahinlha khum nah lai ding ahi.
Hijeh ahi nangin amaho nagin gin jeng thei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-mem itileh Pakai na-Pathen chu nalah uva a um jingjengin, Pathen nasa tah le tijat kichat um chung nung pen ahiye.

Pakai na-Pathen nangma masanga namtin vaipi hijat hi athem thema asuhmang manga asuh theng ding, nangman khatveiya nasuh mang hel thei lou ding ahi; achutilouva ahileh mibei teng nang dinga gamsa hang hung hat ding hahsajo ahi.
Hijongle Pakai na-Pathenin amaho hi nangma nahin peh doh jeng ding, akisuh gamhel kahseuva nasa tah a akisuh lung dong sah ding ahi.

Pakaiyin alengte jouseu jong nangma khut’a ahinpeh doh jeng ding ahin, chulengle nangman vannoiya hi hiche leng ho min geiya jong nasuh mangpeh ding ahitai; nangin amaho hi nasuh beihel masangsea mihem khat’a khat cha jong nangma dou dinga hung ding joudeh louhel ding ahi.

Milim kilhajol doilim pathen lima asemthu jouseu chu nang hon meiya nahalvam jeng diu ahi; hiche milim chunga atomna kinei dangka le sana nadeichat thei louhel ding, lah jeng jong nakilah lou ding ahi; achutilouva nakilah a ahileh kipalna naneilo ding ahiye; ijem-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathen dinga hitobang thil hi hi thet umtah ahibouve.

Chujongle nangman na insunga hitobang thet umtah thil hi hi napoh lut thei lou ding, napoh lut a hiche ho jeh a hi gaosap nachan khah louhela pha ahi; aboncha hi pum thet a nathet ding, nakidah jenga lohsona nagel ding ahibouve: ajeh chu hitobang thil hi gaosap changsa ahitai.

“Tuni nikhoa keiman nangma thu kapeh hijat hi aboldohna dinga nang ho nachih thei diu ahi, chutileh nahin theiyuva napunbe thei diu, chujongle nacheuva Pakaiyin napu napateu peli dinga akitepnasa gamsung chu nagalo thei diu ahiye.

Chule lam dung lhung keiya nangman hiche kum som li sunga gamthip laiya nahin pui pui jenga Pakai na-Pathen chu nageldoh jing jeng ding ahi, aman chuta nabol chu nangma nasuh nem theina ding, ama thupeh hijat hi nangman nanit mong mong hinai, nanit lou ding ham, ti vetdohna dinga nangma lungthim sunga um chu ipi pi mong mong ham, tia napatep anahi.

Hijeh chun aman nangma nasunem jengin, chule kel nathohsah kit’in, chujouvin mannan navah nalaiyin, ahinla hiche jeng jong hi nangman jong nahepon, napu napa ten jong ahepouve; kel nathohsah hi nangman mihem hi changlhah mai maiya hing ahipoi, ahin Pakai kamsunga hung potdoh chu ipi pi hijongle mihem hin hinna anei ahijoi, ti nahetdohna dia anabol ahibouve.
Hiche kum som li sung chun nachunga kai naponsil jouse jong a-eh deh pon, nakengphang jeng jong apomdoh hih hel e.
Pasalin achapa atuhgah banga Pakai na-Pathenin nangma natuhgah ji ahi, ti hi nalungthim sunga nahetdoh ding ahiye.
Hijeh a chu nangman Pakai na-Pathen thupeh jouse nanit soh hela, ama lamlhah jenga nachea chule ama jeng bou nagin ding ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin nangma hi gampha tah khat sunga nahin puilut ahin, hiche gamsung hi twidung jeng jeng ahin, twinah le twisamputna jeng jeng, phaicham thing lhang jousea twi jeng jeng long long ah ahin,
suhlou chang le sakol chang dimsetna gam, lengpigui le theichang phung chule kolbuthei jeng dimsetna gam ahin, olive thing phung jeng kedimsetna le khoiju lonna gam ahi,

agamsunga hi nangman changlhah neng jeng junga naneh neh jeng ding ahin, hijeh a chu imacha lhahsamna nanei louhel ding gam ahi, agamsunga song jouse jong hi thih bep bep ahin, chujongle agamsung thing lhang lah a jong hi nangman dah-thih nalaidoh thei ahi.
Chuti ahijeh a hi nangman agamga naneh a navaset teng leh hi to bang gampha napeh jeh a nangman Pakai na-Pathen chu phatthei naboh ding ahiye.
“Chingtheiyin lang kiging phan, ajo leh tunia keiman nang kathupeh chengse Pakai na-Pathen thupeh jouse le achondan jouse, achonna dan jouse nit louvin hung umin natin, ama nasuh mil lo ding ahi.
Ama sumil jengle chun an naneh a na oivaset teng hi hen lang, asunga chenna thei in nom tah tah nakisah doh a ahiphat jong leh,
chujongle nagancha hon le kelngoi hon hung pungjal jeng hen, nadangka le nasana jong hung kikeh jah jeng tahen, ipi hijongle nangma nei nathil jouse hung pungjal jeng ta leh,
chuteng nalungthim sung hung kithang at jah jengin tin, hita chu Egypt gamsung, kihenna ina kona nangma nahin puidoh pa, Pakai na-Pathen chu nahin suhmil jeng thei ahi:

Pakai ama chun gamthip gillai tah le tijat umlah tah a nahin pui galkai peh a, gul gunei tah tah le aipi tamtah lah a napuidoh a, tollhanga twi akiholmoa abeihel phat jenga jong songpi tahbel bul sunga kona twi navoh doh peh jeng ahin.

ama hin napu napate het khah louhel manna kitia hi nangma gamthip noiya nahin vah hing ahin, hitobanga hi akikhon ni leh nangma dinga thilpha nabolpeh theina dinga nangma hi suhnem deh a patep ding nagot anahi.
Nangman nalungthim sunga, ‘Keima kathakang le keima ban thahat’in hitobang haona hi eiholdoh peh ahi,’ tia nasei louna din kichih theile chun aphai.

Chule nangman Pakai naPathen chu nageldoh jing jeng ding ahi: ijeh-inem itileh haona nakiholna ding thahat napea chu ama ahibouve: chujongle nageldoh jing jenga ahileh aman tuni nikhoa tobanga hi napu napate henga akitepna chu asuh det jing jeng ding ahi.

Ijemtia nangman Pakai naPathen chu nasuh mil tah a, pathen lim kisemthuho nung najuiya, hitobang semthuho kinbola chu napan khah a, hiche ho chu chibai naboh a ahivang leh, tunia keiman nang ho hi kichentah a kagihsal nahiuve, itijongle thon louhela namanthah tei tei diu ahijenge.
Nang ho masanga namtin vaipi chujat Pakaiyin asuhmang banga chu, nang hon Pakai na-Pathenu thusei ogin na ngailou jeh uva namanthah tei tei diu ahi.

“Ngaiyin vo Israel, tuni nikhoa hi nangma Jordan vadung nagalkai ding, nang sanga nasajo jo leh hatjo namtin vaipi khujat khu nadel manga gam neilou naso ding, khopi nasa tah tah le van vum geiya kulpi kikai khum jouse jong khu nalah ding ahi;
nangin nahetsa Anakim chate, mi nasa tah tah le asana sang thei jeng ahiuvin, amaho chung chang thudol hi min, ‘Anak chate masanga koi ham a pang jou ding,’ tia kisei najahsa ahin;

Tuni nikhon kihet jengin, nang masanga lamkaiya pang hi Pakai na-Pathen ahin, mi leugop jeng thei meikong tobang ahi; aman Anak chate chu sumangin tin na masanga amaho chu asuhnem jenga, hijeh a hi nangin amaho nadel mang jeng ding, abonchauva hetman louhela, Pakaiyin nathutep bang banga, naman thahsah jeng ding ahi.

“Nang masanga Pakai na-Pathenin amaho adeldoh jeng phat hin nangin nalungthim sunga hitin seidan, ‘Keima kadih jeh a Pakaiyin hiche gamsung lo dinga keima eihin puilut ahi,’ tin. Ama chule hiche namtin vaipi hijat hi agitlou behseh jeh uva Pakaiyin nang masanga amaho hi adelmang ahibouve.

Nang nadih jeh ham ahiloule nalungput adih jeh ham khat jeh a hiche mite gamsung lo dinga nang hung lut kha nahipoi; hiche namtin vaipi hijat hi agitlou jeh uva Pakai na-Pathenin nang masanga amaho hi adelmanga, hita chu Pakaiyin napu napate Abraham le Isa ac chule Jacob henga akihahselnasa thusei chu suh bulhit ding, suhdet ding agot jeh joh ahivouve.
“Hijeh chun kihet themin, nang dihna jala Pakai na-Pathenin hiche gampha tah hi nang lo dinga nachenna dia napeh ahipoi; ijeh-inem itileh nang hi milouchalte tah nahiye.

“Gamthip laiya chu itobang tah a Pakai na-Pathen chu nalungsat sah a naphin lung hang ham, ti sumil loujenin; Egypt gamsunga kona nahung kipatdoh nikhoa pat hiche mun nahung lhun kahseu hin, nang hon Pakai douna jeng jengin thil nabol’uvin ahi.
Horeb molsang jenga jong chun nang hon Pakai naphin lung hanguvin, hijeh chun Pakai jong nang ho chunga ahung lung hangtan, chuti chun nang ho suhmang hel din nagotauve.

Molsang chunga keima song pheng teni, Pakaiyin nang ho toh akitepna ajihna song pheng teni la dinga kakaltou kah jengin jong, molsang vuma chun nisom li jan som li gatham nang, an jong nelou twijong donlou helin kagathamin ahi.

Chujouvin Pakaiyin song pheng Pathen khut’a kijihsa teni chu keima eipen, achung lhona chun kikhoppi len kikhop nikhoa molsang vuma meikong jalah tah a Pakaiyin nang ho henga anasei thu kisei jouse chu abonchan akijihsoh keiyin ahi.
Hiti hin nisom li jan som li akichai phat’in Pakaiyin hiche song pheng teni, kitepna song pheng teni chu keima eipetai.

Hichun Pakaiyin keijah a aseiyin, ‘Kipatdoh loiyin lang hikoma konin kumsuh loitan; ajeh chu Egypt gama nahin puidohsa namite khu melse tah in achontauvin, ken amaho kathupehna chonna lampia konin jong man gangtah in akihei mang jengun, amaho le amaho ding tin milim kilhajol doilim kisem pou akisemthu tauvin ahi,’ eiti.
“Hicheng kalval jong chun Pakaiyin keijah a aseikit’in, hitin ati: “Keiman hiche mite hi kamuchen mong mong tan, ven, milouchalte mong mong ahiuve;
amaho hi neisuh mangsah jengin, ken jong vannoiya hin amaho min noimang hel jeng inge; nanga konin keiman amaho sanga hatjo le nasa jo nam khat semdoh nange,’ ati.

Hijeh chun kei jong kakihei loi jengin molsanga konin kahung kumsuh pai pai jengtai; hichea hin molsangpi chu meikongin akou kou jeng nalaiye; chujongle keiman kakhut lang ton song pheng, kitepna pheng teni chu kachoiton ahi.

Hichun keiman kaven ahileh, vetan, nang ho Pakai na-Pathenu dou nan nachonseuvin, nang ho le nang ho ding tin bongnou lim kilhajol houdin nakisemthu jenguvin; man gangtah in Pakaiyin nang ho chonna dia nathupehna lampiuva konin nakihei mang loi jeng tauve.
Chuphat’in ken jong song pheng teni chu kasatdoh loi jengin, anigela chu kakhut’a konin kasep than, nang ho maikoh tah a kasep keh jengin ahi.

Chujouvin keiman masanga kabol ngai bang bangin nisom li jan som li sungin Pakai angsunga bohkhup’in katao tao jeng tai; hichea chun keiman an jong kanepon, twi jeng jong kadonpoi; nang hon Pakai phin lung hangna dinga ama mitmu changtah a thilse nabol bot jenguva, chonset chujat nabol jeh uva kabol ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh nang ho suhmang jeng dinga agot’a, nang ho douna Pakai alunghan a alung lhai louhelna save vua um jengpi chu kagin anahi. Hijeh chun hichepet jeng jong chun Pakaiyin kataona ana ngai nalaiye.
Pakai chu Aaron chunga alung hang behseh jengin ama chu suh mangjeng din agotai; hijeh chun hichepet hin Aaron din jong katao tao jengin ahi.

Chutah chun keiman jong chonset lo na thil kisemthu chu kalan, bongnou lim nasemthuu chu, meiyin kagounem in, kaheh ngim ngimin, vutdi tobang ahi kahsen, sumheiyin kagoi goi jengin chuin vutdi banga kagoidisa chu molsanga kona hung longdoh vadung laiya kaleh lutsoh tan ahi.
“Taberah le Massah, chule Kibroth-hatta avah mun dung jenga jong chun nang hon Pakai naphin ‘uvin nalungsat sah tauve.

Kadesh-barnea kona Pakaiyin nang ho nasol’uva hita aseiya, ‘Kaltou vun lang ken nang ho kapeh nau gam khu galouvin lang gachenpha tauvin,’ tia asei jong chun nang hon Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh dou nan thil nabol’uvin, Pakai chu tah jong natahsan pouvin, athusei ogin jeng na ngaipeh pouvin ahi.
Hiti hin keiman nang ho kahet niuva pat nang ho hi Pakai doumah mah in nachon chon jenguve.
“Hichejeh chun kei jong Pakaiyin nang ho hi kasuh mang ding ahitai, tia aseijeh in, nisom li jan som li sungin Pakai angsunga bohkhup’in katao tao jengin ahi.
Hichea katao chun keiman Pakai henga kaseiyin, ‘0
Nangma dinga lhacha ho Abraham, Isa ac, chule Jacob chu geldoh jing jengin hiche mite louchalna le agitlou nau chule achonset nau hi iman gelpeh datan,

achutilouva ahileh nangman keiho neihin puilut nau gamsunga mite hin, ‘Pakaiyin ateppehna gamsunga amaho hi ahinpui lut jou lou jeh ahitai, chujongle Pakaiyin amaho hi ahotbol jeh a gamthip noiya thigam sah dinga ahinpuidoh ahibouve,” tia asei diu ahi.
Amaho hi nangma mite mong mong la ahiuvin, nangma goulo mite ahiuve; nangin nathahat nasa tah le nahan tha kilhungdoh thoa nahin puidohsa la ahi ngal’uvin,’ kati.
“Hichepet chun Pakaiyin keijah a anaseiyin, ‘Amasa a tobang bang song pheng ni suiyin lang, chule molsang chunga khun hung kaltouvin lang, chujongle thing lan thingkong khat semin.
Chule nangman nasuhkehsa song pheng masa teni chunga kisunsa thuho chu keiman tua song pheng teni chunga hin sundoh kit ing ting, chujou tengleh nangman thingkong sunga nakhum ding ahi,’ einati.

Hijeh chun ken jong thinggi thing kalan thingkong khat kasemin, chuin song pheng ni jong kasuiyin, amasa a tobang bangin kasuiyin chule asong pheng teni chu kakhut’a kachoiyin molsang chunga kakaltoutai.

Hichun Pakaiyin amasa kisun tobang bangin song pheng teni chunga chun asundoh in ahi, athu kisun ho chu khoppi len kikhop nikhoa molsang chunga meikongsan laiya Pakaiyin nang ho jah a anaseisa thusom kipe chengse chu anahi; Pakaiyin hicheng thu kisun ho hi keima eipetan ahi.

Chujouvin kei jong kakiheiyin molsang chunga konin kahung kumsuh pai paiyin, kasemsa thingkong sunga chun song pheng teni chu kakoitai; Pakaiyin keima eithupeh bang bangin asong pheng teni chu thingkong sunga aum lhontai.

“Israel chate chu Be-eroth kiti laiya Beneja-akan laiya konin Moserah geiyin akitol kit tauve. Hikoma hin Aaron athitan, hijeh chun ama hikoma hin avuitauve; Achapa Eleazar chu Aaron khelin thempun apang pai pai tan ahi.
Hikoma kon hin Gudgodah geiyin akitol pai kit’uvin, Gudgodah a konin Jotbathah geiyin akitol paiyuvin ahileh, Jotbathah kiti lai hi twidung tha lhinna gam khat anahi.

Hiche lai hin Pakaiyin Levi phung hi achombeh in anakhendoh tan, Pakai kitepna thingkong pole ding, tulaiya banga hi Pakai angsunga ding jing le akinbol jing jeng din anakhendoh tai, ama min phatthei bob dingin anakoiyin ahi.
Hichejeh chun Levi hin asopite lah a chan jong anei pon, goulo ding jong aneipoi; Pakai na-Pathenin ama jah a anasei bangin Levi goulo chu Pakai hi ahijenge.
“Amasa a bangin molsanga chun keima nisom li jan somli kanichongin kathamtai; hichea hin jong Pakaiyin kei taona ana ngai kit tan, hijeh chun nangma nasuh mang nom tapoi.

Chujongle Pakaiyin keijah a aseiyin, ‘Kipatdoh in lang mipi lamkai kit’in, nakholjin banu jop kit tan, hita hi keiman amaho pule pate peh dinga kakihahselnasa gamsunga alut’uva chenna anei theina diuvin,’ tin eiseipeh tai. Pathenin angeh khoh chu ipi ham

“Chuti ahijeh chun tua hi vo Israel, Pakai na-Pathenin nanga kona angeh khoh pen tah chu ipi ham, Pakai naPathen nagin jinga, chule ama lamlhah tin a najuilea navale ding, ama na ngailut’ a, Pakai na-Pa then chu nalungthim pumpi le nahinkho pumpia najenle ding,
tunia nangma phattheina dia keiman nang kathupeh son Pakai chonna dan jouse leh ama thupeh chengse nit ding hi hilou ham?
Ven, van le van jouse van jeng jong, leiset le asunga thil um jouse jong hi aboncha Pakai na-Pathena jeng ahibouve;

ahivangin Pakaiyin napu napate chunga atumbeh a lungsetna ananeiyin, amaho ahin aban’uva ason achilhah jouseu ahin analhengdoh tan, achung chondeh in tulaiya ahibang hin nang ho hi mitin chunga nalhengdoh jenguvin ahi.
Hijeh chun nalungthim sungu chep kitan cheh uvin lang, louchal bol kit ta hih hel ‘uvin.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenu hi pathen jouse Pathen ahin, pakai jouse Pakai, nasa tah, thahat tah, tijat umtah Pathen ahin, lang neina jong neilou, nehguh jong kilah lou ahi.
Aman chaga paloute le meithaiho din thu adih dih chan atanpeh jin, khopem jong alungset jin, an neh ding le ponsil ding apejin ahi.
Hijeh chun nang hon jong khopem mi lungset’uvin lang hiuvin, ajeh chu nang ho jeng jong Egypt gamsunga khopemsa nahiuve.
Nangin vang Pakai na-Pathen chu ging jingin lang, amajenlen lang chule kolchah jing jengin; chujongle ama min jenga bou nakitep ding ahi.
Nangin navahchoi ding chu amabou ahin, ama hi nangma Pathen ahi; namit te nin amusa hiche thil nasa tah tah le tijat umtah tah ho boldoh a jong ama ahiye.
Napu napate chu mihing som sagi bou Egypt gama anachesuh ahiuvin, tunla Pakai na-Pathenin napunsah ben mihon tamtah nason, vana ahsite jat naphah sah hel jeng tai.
“Nangin Pakai na-Pathen na ngailut’a, ama thusei lhahna chengse leh achonna dan jouse jong, achondan jousejong chule athupeh jouse jong aboncha phat tina nanit jing jeng ding ahi.

Tunia hi amu khalou lai nachateu henga thusei kahi loujeh-in nang bon kathusei hi melchih jing uvin lang, Pakai na-Pathen mi tuhgahna, ama aletdan, aban thahat tah le abanjang hung kilhungdoh sa chu geltoh jing jenguvin;
aman melchihna chujat aboldoh le Egypt gamsunga Pharaoh lengpa le agam mite jouse henga athilbol chengse pijongchu geldoh jingun.

Chujongle Egypt mite sepai galsat ho chu itobanga i-aloa, asakol jouseu leh kangtalai jouseu i-alo hi tam; amaho hin nang ho nung ahindel’uva chu Pakaiyin itobanga amaho hi twikhanglensan twipi chu anachup sah hitam, tulaiya banga hi itobang loma Pakaiyin Egypt mite chu anasuh mang hi tam;
chule hikom mun nahung lhun kahseuva gamthip lai najot laiseuva Pakaiyin ipi pi naboldoh hiya hitam;

chujongle Reuben chapa Eliab chapa teni Dathan le Abiram jong chu i-analo hi tam; hichea chu itobang tah a melsea leiset hung kamka jenga amani le ainsung mite lhon jouse, aponbuh gei gei lhon ahin, Israel chate chujat lah a amani kilhonpi gancha hing chujat chu iti kidana kidanga aval lhum jeng ham; melchih jingun.
Ajeh chu nang hon namit tah uvin Pakaiyin aboldohsa athilbol chu namu tauve.

Tuni nikhoa keiman nang ho kathupeh hijatpi hi aboncha nanit jing jeng diu ahi; chuti hen lang hileh nang ho nathau hatdoh theiyin tin, agamsunga lut dinga Jordan galkaiya najot nau gamsunga nalut theiyuva, chen jong nachenpha thei diu ahi;
chujongle Pakaiyin napu napateu le amaho bana ason achilhah jouseu peh dinga akihahselnasa gamsung, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gamsunga chu nahin khou sot thei ding ahiye.

ijeh-inem itileh agamsung chenpha dinga najot lut ding gam hi nang ho hung potdohna Egypt gamsung tobang ahipoi, Egypt gamsunga chu honlei, anche lei kibolna banga, nangin muchi natu teng jongleh nakeng napat jenga twi nachapdim demji ana hi;
amavang agam sunga chenga nachenau gam hi thing lhang le phaicham kikahse chet ahin, vana hung lha gotwi neng jeng junga akimuji ahi;
hiche gam hi Pakai naPathenin akhohsah na gam ahin, kum kipat’a pat’in kum kichai geiyin jong hiche gam leiset chung hi Pakai naPathenin ave lhi jing jengin ahi.
“Nang hon jong tunia nang ho kathupeh hijatpi hi athu na ngaiyuva, Pakai na-Pathenu chu na ngailut’uva, nalungthim pumpi le nahinkho pumpia ama najen’uva ahileh,

keiman aphat cha nang ho gamsunga gotwi kajuh sah a, go masa le go nukhah kajuh sah cheh ding ahin, chulengle nangman nachang jong, nalengpithei jong, nathaotwi jong nakikhop tup jing jeng thei ding ahitai.
Chujongle keiman nabong hon ganchate dinga naloujao dunga hamhing kapousah ding, nangma jengin jong an nava va a naneh ding ahiye.

Nang ho le nang ho kichih theiyuvin, achutilouva ahileh nalungthim ‘uvin nalhem lhauvin tin, nakihei mang jenguva pathen chom chom lim kisemthuho chu najen leu diu, hiche ho chu chibai naboh jeng theiyu ahi;

chuti hen lang hileh nang ho dou nan Pakai lunghanna hung deujah jeng get’in tin, hijeh a chu aman van mun jouse asinbing ding, chulengle gotwi hung lha louva um ding, louma jengin jong aga asodoh sah thei louhel ding ahin, hiche phat chuleh Pakaiyin nang ho napeh nau gamsung, gampha tah a kona jong hi hetman louhela namanthah jeng theiyu ahiye.

“Hijeh a chu nang hon keima thusei hijat hi nalungthim sunguva nachensah uva, nahinkho sunguva nachin jing jeng diu, nakhut’uva jong melchihna banga nasom lhop jing jenguva, namit teni kikah nachalpanga jong maidal banga nakhai jing jeng ding ahi.

Chujongle nang hon aboncha hi nachate nahil’uva, insunga natou thim pet hihen lang, lampi najot pet hihen, nalup pet jeng hita hen lang chule nahung thodoh teng hijongleh, thupeh hijatpi hi naseipeh peh jeng ding dol ahi.
Nangman thupeh hijatpi hi na inpi kotpi khom dung jouse le nakelkot dung jousea jong najihsoh hel ding ahi,

chuti hen lang hileh Pakaiyin napu napateu peh dinga akihahselnasa gamsunga chu nang ho hin nikho le nachateu hin nikho jong akoibe cheh cheh ding, leiset chunga van akidallai sungsea nalo thei dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh keiman nang ho kathupeh chengseu hi boldoh tei tei ding nachih theiyuva, Pakai na-Pathenu na ngailut jing jeng uva, ama lamlhah lhah a nacheuva, chule ama jeng nakolchah jing theiyuva ahileh,

Pakaiyin nang ho masanga namtin vaipi hijatpi hi delmang jengin tin, chulengle nang hon jong nang ho sang sanga gamchenga nasajo jo leh thahat jo jo namtin vaipi hijat hi nadelmang uva aneilou naso diu ahiye.

Nakeng phanga nachot pha na muntin chu nang ho gam hi jeng ding ahi; nang ho gamgi chu gamthip lai le Lebanon a hung kipat, luipi dunga, Euphrates vadunga hung kipat peh chun nilhum lam twikhanglen chan gei ahung hipeh jengin ahi.
Mihem koimachan jong nang ho nakidintepi jou louhel diu, aman nang ho nathutep bang banguva Pakai na-Pathenin najotpa diu gamtina mite chunga nang ho ginna le kichatna akoisoh hel ding ahi.
“Ven, tuni hin keiman nang ho masanga phattheina jong gaosapna jong kakoipeh cheh uve;
tunia keiman nang ho kathupeh, Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh chengse chu nanit’uva athua nanun uva ahileh phatthei channa hitin,

amavang tuni nikhoa keiman nang ho kathupeh Pakai na-Pathenu thupeh chengse hi ngailouva, hichea kona hi nakihei manguva, nahet toh louvu pathen lim kisemthuho nunga nakiheiyuva ahileh, nang ho dinga gaosap nachan khah lo diu ahi.
Acheng dia najotna gamsunga hi Pakai na-Pathenin nangma nahin puilut teng leh, Gerizim molsang chunga phattheina nasemdoh a, chule Ebal molsang chunga gaosapna nadalhah ding ahi.
Hiche molsang teni hi Jordan vadung gal lam, nisa lhahsuhna nilhum lang lampi, Arabah gamsunga cheng canaan mite gamsung, Gilgal to kigaldot lai, Moreh a gangpi thing phung koma chu umah hilou ham?
ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin nang ho napehsau gamsunga galut’a agacheng dinga nang ho Jordan vadung nagalkai diu ahin; hiche gamsung chu nalo uva, asunga khu nachen tengu leh,
tuni nikhoa keiman nang ho kakoipeh chonna dan jouse le chondan jouse hi natoh doh theina diuva nang ho nachih thei diu ahiye.
“Leiset chunga nachen laiseuva nahin kho lhum keiyuva Pakai na-Pu napate Pathenin nachenna dinga napeh gamsunga nang hon nanit jing jeng diu chonna dan jouse le thupeh chengse chu hicheng hi ahi.

Nanghon agam nalah peh uva gam neilou naso diu namtin vaipite chenna pathen lim semthu a ahouna mun jouseu, molsang chung dung hihen lang thing lhang dung hijongle, thing nadum noi dung hijeng jong leh nasuh beihel dingu ahiye;

hitobanga chu nanghon amaicham jouseu nasuh chimsoh hel ‘uva, adoikhom jouseu navoh chip hel diu, Asherim milim ahouvu jong chu meiya nahalvam peh diu ahi; chujongle amahon pathen semthuu doilim kisem kilhajol chengse jong chu nakaldoh soh keiyuva, ahou nau mun jeng jong chu amin nasuh beihel diu ahiye.
Hitobanga hi Pakai na-Pathenu nabol thei louhel diu ahi.
Amavang Pakai na-Pathen’uvin nang ho phung lah a ahin lhendoh ding mun, ama min chensahna ding le aman chenna anei ding mun nang hon naholdoh tei tei dru ahibouve. Hikoma chu nang ho nacheuva,

hilaiya chu nang ho pumgo thilto hihen lang nakilhai nau gantha hijongle, natodoh diu nahopsom chengseu hihen lang nathilto diu dang hijongleh, deichoma nathiltou hihen lang chule nabong nou peng masau hihen chulengle nakeilngoi hon lah uva apeng masa nato diu hijongle nahin choilut cheh diu ahi;

hikom laiya chu nang hon Pakai na-Pathenu angsunga thilto naneh uva nakipa diu, nakhut’uva thil natodoh chengseu jala nathangvah diu ahi; nang ho nahiuvin na insung miteu ahin, Pakai na-Pathenin nangma phatthei naboh jala nathangvah ding ahiye.
Tunia eihon hikoma ithilbol banguva hi nang hon hitobang hi aboncha nabol lou diu ahi, hita hi mihem jousen ama ama mitmua adih ahisah chu abol louhel ding ahibouve.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenuvin napeh nau gam goulona, kicholdo muna chun nang ho nahung lhung hih laiyuvin ahi.

Ahin tuhin nang ho Jordan vadung galkai ding kon nahiu ahitan, Pakai na-Pathen uvin nang ho napeh nau gamsunga chenga gouloa nei ding kon nahitauve; Pakaiyin nakimvel dunguva melmate jousea konin nakicholdo sah uvin tin, chulengle nang ho jong lung mong tah a nachen diu ahiye.

Pakai na-Pathen uvin ama min chensahna ding ina alhendohna muna chu nang hon keima thupeh a kasei jouse nahin choilut diu ahi: hiche ho hi napumgo thilto jouseu le nakilhai nau gantha chengse toh, nahopsom jouseu le thiltodi nahin choi chengseu ahin, chujongle Pakaiya nakithenso nau thenso thiltoa nato chengse chutoh ahi.

Hikoma chu Pakai na-Pathenu angsunga nakipauva, nang ho hiuvin lang nachapateu hi hen, nachanu jouseu hi hen, nasoh pasal jouse le nasoh numei jouse hijongle nakipa cheh diu ahi; chujongle nakhopiuva chenga Levi mi jong chun nang ho chan nei khom hih hen lang, gou nalokhompi louvu hijongle nakipapi diu ahiye.
Nangman namu phahna mun tin a pumgo thilto natonom chu namoh to to jeng louhelna din kichih theiyin;
amavang hoi koikom hijongle Pakaiyin adeilhen naphung mite lah a phung khat pen pen a chu nangin napumgo thilto ding natoa, hikoma chubou keiman nang kathupeh jong hi nabol ding ahibouve.

“Ahoi hita jongleh Pakai na-Pathenin nangma phatthei nabohna nangin nadei dei chu ipi sa hijongle nakhopi sung dung jousea natha a naneh thei cheh ahinai; a then le athenlou aboh dungjuiya nalhena, sapeng hihen lang sakhipi hijong naneh thei cheh ahi.
Athisan vang naneh thei louhel diu, tola twi sunlhah banga nasun lhah diu ahi.

Nangin nakhopi sung dung pou pouva naneh jeng thei lou ding thilto chu nachang hopsom ahin, nalengpitwi hopsom ahin, nathaotwi hopsom ahin, nagancha hon lah a hihen nakelngoi hon lah a hijongle apeng masa jouse chu ahin, nakithensona thenso thilto chengse jong hiding, deichoma nathilto jouse jong ahin, chule ipi pi hijeng ta jongle nahin choiya nato thilto tapou chu ahijenge:

thilto hijat hi aboncha Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhenna mun, hiche Pakai naPathen angsunga chu naneh thei ding joh ahin, hikoma chu nang nahin, nachapa le nachanu ahin, nasoh pasal le nasoh numei ahin, chule nakhopi sung dunga cheng Levi jong ahin naneh thei cheh diu ahi; nangman nakhut’a natohdoh nathilbol jouse chung changa chu Pakai mi-Pathen angsunga kipana nanei ding ahiye.
Nagam sunga nachen laisea Levi mi hi nasuhmil louhelna din kichih theiyin.

“Pakai na-Pathenin nagamgi akeh let’a akitepna banga abol phat leh, ijemtia nangman ‘Sa kaneh nome’ tia naseiya ahijongleh, chutobanga sa ngai geuva naum jeh a chu nangin nadeijat jat naneh jeng ding ahiye.

Ijemtia Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhenna mun, ama min chensahna dinga adeilai chu nang dia agamlat behseh jenga ahileh, keiman nangma thu kapeh banga Pakaiyin nang napehsa nagancha hon a hihen lang nakelngoi hon lah a hijongle gancha khat pen pen nakitha thei ahin, hiche hi nangman nadei jat jat’a nangma khopi sung dunga naneh den thei ahiye.
Sapeng le sakhipi akineh thei banga, nangin nasatha chu naneh thei ahi; mi aboh hi hen atheng hileh kibang banga aneh thei ding ahiye.
Athisan puma naneh tha louna dingin vang kichih thei jing jengin; ijehinem itileh thisan hi hinna ahin, hijeh a chu nangman hiche hinna hi tahsa to naneh tha louhel ding ahiye.
Thisan chu naneh louhel ding, tola twi kisung lha tobanga nasun lhah jeng ding ahibouve.
Nangman thisan hi naneh louhel ding ahi: hitobanga adih hi Pakai mitmua naboldoh teng nang le nangma bana nachate dinga jong thilpha sohdoh a phatna hung hidoh thei ding ahi.
Amavang nangin nakoi thil thengse leh thensana thilto nathensosa chu nakichoiya hoilai hileh Pakaiyin adeilhenna lai laiya nache ding ahiye.

Chujongle nangman pumgo thiltoa natodoh ding chu natodoh a, Pakai na-Pathen maicham chunga a tahsa le athisan nagatodoh ding; hiche nakilhaina gantha thisan hi Pakai naPathen maicham chunga kisung lha ding ahin, atahsa vang hi nethei nan nate.

Keiman nang kathupeh chengse hi khohsah jing jengna dingin ching theiyin, hita hi nangman Pakai na-Pathen mitmua apha le adih chu nabol tengleh nang le nangma bana nachate dinga aitih chan geiya dia thilpha soh jing jeng thei ding ahi.
“Pakai na-Pathenin na masanga namtin vaipi hijat hi asuhgama, nangman jong agamsung lahpeh dinga najot lut hi nalahpeh a gam neilou nasoa chule amaho gamsunga nachen teng,

nangma masanga amaho akisuh bei banga hi nakisuh mang louna din, amaho nung najui lou din kichih theiyin, amaho milimdoi pathen lim asemthuu thudol jong hi nakhol le lea hita naseiya, ‘Hiche namtin vaipi ho hin amilimdoi pathen lim semthuu hi itobanga anajen jiu hiya, ken jong amaho bol banga kabol thei lou ding ham?’ tia nasei louna din ching theiyin.

Nangin vang Pakai na-Pathen kom a hitobanga nabol thei louhel ding ahi: ijeh-inem itileh hiche mite hin Pakai dinga thet umtah tah thil jeng amaho milimdoi pathen lim asemthu u henga anabol’uvin, hitobang hin achapateu le achanuteu jong hiche milimdoi pathen lim asemthu chengseu ding chun meiya anagouvam vam jenguvin ahi.
“Ipi pi hijeng jong leh keiman nang ho kathupeh tapou hi naboldoh theina diuvin ching theiyun; hichea kona hi nangman nalahdoh thei lou ding, bejong nabelap thei louhel ding ahi.

“Nang ho lah a hi themgao khat tou hung umdoh tahen lang, ahiloule mangsan a kicheh thim khat ‘in mang hin neihen, hitobang mi chun nangma melchihna ham, kidang tah thil datmo um khat vetsah jeng ta jong leh,

chujongle aman nangma jah a anaseisa, thil chu hung jong hung guilhung tah bah jeng hen, ama hin hitin sei hen, ‘Eihon pathen lim kisemthuho nung jui taute, hiche ho khu gajen le tau hite,’ tin sei jeng hen lang, nangman la hitobang hi nahet khah lou thil hileh,

nangman hi to bang themgao ahiloule mangsan thempa nung hi najuiya athusei jouse hi na ngailou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin nang ho napatep’uva, nang ho hin Pakai na-Pathenu hi nalungthim pumpia, nahinkho pumpia na ngailut mong mong hinam, ti ahetdoh nom ahibouve.
Nang hon Pakai na-Pathenu nung nung najuiyuva, ama jeng nagin diu, athupeh jouse nanit’uva, ama thusei ogin na ngai jing jeng diu, chule amabou najen leuva, nakolchah jing jeng diu ahiye.

Ahin hitobang themgao ahiloule mangsan them mi vang hi thadoh jeng ding ahibouve; ijeh-inem itileh hitobang mi hin Pakai na-Pathen doumah mah nabolna ding jeng nahil’uvin ahi; hiche Pathen hin Egypt gama kona nang ho nahin puidoh uva, kihenna ina kona nahin lhatdohsau ahi; hita hi bola Pakai na-Pathenin nachena dinga nathupehsa lampia kona nangma kihei mangsah ding nagotji ahiye. Hijeh a nangman nalah a kona thilse hi nasuh theng ding angaiye.

“Ijemtia nanu chapa nasopipa mong ham, nachapa ham, nachanu ham, nakiangkoipi najinu ham ahilou jongle nahinkho kijoppi mong mong tobang nagol ngai tah khat hamin jong guhthim cha najol a hita aseiya, ‘Eiho cheu hitin pathen lim kisemthuho khu gajenle taute,’ atia, nangman nahet khah louhel milimho koma che dinga natema,

nakimvel dunguva cheng mitin vaipi ho pathen lim semthuho hou dia pui mang ding nagot’a ahileh. hitobang thil chu nangma komcha um hihen lang, ahiloule nanga kona gamla tah a um hita hen, vannoi leiset mong lang khat’a kona alang khat geiya um hijongle,

hitobang mi thuseiya chu nangma nanun louhel ding, thu jeng jong na ngaipeh lou ding, namit vet jenga jong nadip dampi lou ding, hinghoi dia jong nagot’a athemmona selmang peh dinga nabol louhel ding ahi;
nangman ama chu natha tei tei ding ama thana dinga nangman achunga khut nalap masah pen ding, chujou tengleh midangin jong akhut alha cheh diu ahi.
Nangin ama hi songa naselih hel ding ahiye, ijeh-inem itileh aman Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh pa, kihenna ina kona nahin puidoh pa Pakai na-Pathen henga kona napuidoh a napui mang got ahiye.
Hijeh chun Israel pumpin ngaiyuvin lang kichatnan neiyuvin, nalah uva hitobang gitlouna hi bol kit din gel hih hel ‘uvin.
“Pakai na-Pathenin nachenna dinga napehsa khopi sung dung khat’a kisei najah khah a, hita hi akiseiya,

’Nang ho lah a kon hin milungneo phabep avah manguvin, khopi sunga cheng mite jong phabep apui manguvin hitin aseiyuve, “Eiho cheu hitin pathen lim kisemthuho gajenle tau hite,” tia aseiyuva nang hon nahet khah louhel’u milim hou ding agot’uva ahileh,

nangman phatecha kholtohna naneiya, naphot chetsoh keiya kichen tah le limgeh cha nadoh ding, chule hichea vetan, hitobang thu kisei hi adih ahikhah pou pouva, thet umtah tah thil ho hi nang ho lah a ahung kipoh lut khah tah a ahileh,
nangman hiche khopi sunga cheng mite chu chemjama nathagam hel a, asunga um jouse nasuh beihel jeng ding, gancha jouse jong chemjama nasat lih lih jeng ding ahitai.

Chule nangman akhopi sunga thilkeo thang jouse chu kholai kimtah a nakhop khoma, akhopi le athilkeo thang kichomkhom jouse chu meiya nahalvam hel a, Pakai na-Pathen henga aboncha apumpia chu pumgo thiltoa nagovam hel ding ahiye. Akhopi chu aitih geiya jong khogema kisong den ding, kithah sah phat kit louhel ding ahitai.

Kithoina kimangsa thil ho khat’a khat cha jong natham khah thei louhel ding ahi; chuti hen lang hileh Pakaiyin a lunghan deuje ju chu tolmang jengin tin, nangma nahepi theiya, nachunga navoujang natpi thei ding, napu napate henga akihahselna tobanga nangma napunsah thei ding ahiye;
nangman Pakai naPathen thusei ogin najah a, tunia keiman nang kathupeh chengse jong hi aboncha nanit soh hel a, Pakai na-Pathen mitmua adih jeng ‘nabola ahileh hita hi um ding ahi.
“Nang ho Pakai na-Pathenu chate nahiuvin, hijeh a chu mithi dinga thi-opna nang ho le nang ho nakimavo vouva chujongle nachalsam nakivotol thei louhel diu ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itileh nang hi Pakai na-Pathen dinga nam mite nahin, leiset chunga cheng mitin vaipi hijat lah a hi Pakaiyin nang hi ama goulo ama a ding mong monga nalhendoh sa ahiye.
“Nangman thil thet umpou pou naneh louhel ding ahiye.
Nang hon naneh thei diu ganhing chu hicheng hi ahi: bongchal ho ahin, kelngoite ahin, kelchate ahin,
