sakhipi jouse ahin, sapeng ho ahin, sakhi chal ho ahin, gamkelcha ahin, gamloiho ahin, sangaite ahin, lhang gam kelngoite ahiuve.
Sa atin kikhen a atin nia kika a, chule anehsa ihdoh kit’a anuloh lhai tapou chu sa lah a nang hon naneh thei cheh diu ahi.

Hijongle anehsa an ihdoh kit’a anuloh lhai hihen lang atin kikhen jongleh hicheng hi naneh thei lou diu ahi: sa-ngongsang ho, talep te, ailai ho hicheng hin anehsa aihdoh kit a anuloh alhai nah vangin atin akika hih uvin, hijeh a hi nang ho dia aboncha aboh jeng ahiuve.
Chule vohcha jong hi atin akikat vangin ama hin anuloh alhai loujeh hin nang ho dinga aboh ahibouve. Hijeh a hi nang hon atahsa naneh louhel diu, athiho jong khu along natoh khah louhel diu ahiye.
“Twi lah-a hing ganhing lah-a nang hon hicheng hi naneh thei diu ahi: alhaphe neise se leh alip neise se chu naneh thei cheh dingu ahi.
Ipi nga hijeng jong leh alhaphe le alip beise se chu nang hon naneh thei lou diu ahi: hitobang hi nang ho dia aboh ahibouve.
“Vachate aboncha naneh thei diu ahin:
hijong leh nang hon naneh thei lou diu chu hiche ho hi ahiuve: Muvanlaite, muthong ho, mu-ngagal ho jong ahin,
mubongte, mu pou pou, amaho toh kilimlo jouse jong,
va-ah jouse le amaho toh kilimlo chengse jong,
vangongsangte ahin, vabah ho ahin, twivakhu ahin, muvanlai lhem ho ahin, amaho toh kilimlo chengse jong ahin,
simbuchanglit ho le simbupi ho ahiuvin, twi-ah ahin,
vatot-kamkabah ho ahin, muthong-lhem ahin, vatot-muhkon ahin,
twilungva ahin, twi-vakang ho le amaho toh kilimlo jouse ahin, sel-ehva le bah jouse jong ahi.
Chule ganhing akeng nei alha a leng thei jouse nang ho dinga aboh jeng jeng ahiuvin, hiche tobang hi neh thei ahipouve.
Alhaving nei hijongle atheng ho vang hi naneh thei diu ahinai.

“Ipi ganhing hijongle ama chama moh thia thi tapou chu nang hon naneh thei louhel diu ahin, nakhopi sunga hung vahlutsa kelkot kal lhahsa kholgam mi auma ahileh ama chu napeh thei ahi; ajeh chu aman neh jong aneh thei mai ahi ; ahilou jongle gamchom mi henga najoh doh thei jong ahi; ajeh chu Pakai na-Pathen dinga, nangma hi namtheng mite nahiu ahiye. “Nangman gancha nou kithat sa chu api noitwiya nahon thei louhel ding ahi.
“Kumseh kumsima nalouma soh agajat’a kona nangman namuchitu jousea hopsom nate tei tei ding ahi.

Chule Pakai na-Pathen angsung, aman amin chensahna dia adeilhen muna nang in nachang hopsom, nalengpitwi hopsom, nathaotwi hopsom, nabong nou peng masa le nakelngoi nou peng masa naneh a nadon thei ahi; hitobanga hi phatseh a Pakai na-Pathen, ginje nakihil them ding ahi.
Alampi agamlat behseh jenga Pakai na-Pathenin phatthei nabohna hopsom chu nahin poh lut jou hih a, Pakai na-Pathenin amin chenna dia adeilhen mun hi nang dia agamlat behseh tah jongle
nangman hopsom thil jouse chu suma najoh doh a asuma chu nakhut’a achuna nakichoi ding, Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhen muna chu nachea,

hikoma chu nangin nadei dei nakichoh a, bongchal ho ahin, kelngoiho ahin, lengpitwi hihen khamna thei don ding hijongleh, nalol sungin aduchat chat chu nakichoh a, hikoma chu Pakai na-Pathen angsunga naneh a nakipa ding, nangma jong na insung mite jong nakipa khom cheh diu ahiye.
Chujongle nakholen dunga cheng, Levi mi jong chu nasuhmil thei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ama hin nang bangin chan jong anei pon, goulo ding jong aneipoi.
“Kumthum alhin phat phat leh nangman hiche kum sunga chu nalhosoh hopsom aboncha nahin poh jia, nakholen sung dunga nakhol ding ahi;

nangma to chan neikhom thei lou, gou jong nalokhompi thei lou Levi mi le kholjin mi, chaga paloute, meithai ho, aboncha nakholen sung dunga um jouse hunguva ahung neh diu ahin vaset’a aneh cheh diu ahiye; chutileh nakhut’a natohna chana Pakai na-Pathenin phatthei naboh ding ahi.
“Kum sagi lhin kum kum leh nangman kilhadohna naboljiji ding ahi.

Chule kilhadoh ding dol chu hiti ding ahi: koi hileh aheng akoma thil batna kilah jeh a aikhat khat henpeh jousen alhadoh peh ding ahi; Pakai mi lhadohna akiphondoh tah a chu aheng akom∑asopipa kona akan jong alah thei lou ding, apehdoh ding ahi.
Kholgam mi chunga vang nangman akan nalah thei ahinai, nasopi thil ipi hijongle nakhut’a nahenpeh chan chu namoh lhadoh peh jeng ding ahibouve.
Nang ho lah a mivaicha aum thei louna dinga chuti ding ahi, ajeh chu Pakai na-Pathenin nagoulo ding le chenna dinga napehna gamsunga chu Pakaiyin nangma nasa tah a phatthei naboh ding ahi;
nangin Pakai na-Pathen thusei ogin nangai them pou pouva, tunia keiman nang kathupeh hiche thupeh tohdohna dinga nachih thei pou pouva ahileh, chuti ding ahiye.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin nathutepsa bang banga phatthei naboh ding ahin, hijeh a chu nangman namtin vaipi thil nabatsah ding, nangman bat a thil nalah lou ding ahitai; chujongle namtin vaipi tamtah chunga nangma navaihom ding ahin, amaho vang nang chunga vaihom lou ding ahiuve.

“Nalah a chu Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna gamsunga nakholen kho khat touva nasopi mi vaicha khat tou a um khah tah a ahileh, nangin nakhut nakikhoituma imacha pelouva nasopipa dinga nalungthim natahsah louhel ding ahi;
amavang nakhut nalhandoh a, ipi pi hijeng jong leh aman angai chat chan chu thalhingset’a nangman napeh ding ahiye.

Ching theiyin, achutilouva ahileh nangma lungthim jenga jong lungneona hung lut khan tin, hita nasei ding, ‘Kum sagi lhin kum, kilhadohna kum chu ahung naitai,’ natia, nangman nasopi vaichapa chu namit thip’a, imacha jong napeh nom lou ding, chutengle ama chu Pakai henga nang dou nan hung kap jeng ta leh hichu nang dinga chonset hi ding ahiye.

Nangin ama chu moh peh a napeh jeng ding, thil napeh teng leh nalungthim ama chunga vetsetna nanei sah louhel ding ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh hita hi nabola ahileh nangman nakhut’a nabol chan chu ipi hijeng jongleh Pakai na-Pathenin phatthei naboh peh ding ahi.

Ajeh chu gamsunga hi mivaicha gentheiyin beitih anei louhel ding ahi; hijeh a chu keiman nangma thu kapeh nahi∑, nakhut pomtah a thil nanei chu nasopi napeh a, angaite napeh ding, mivaichate napeh cheh ding, gamsunga um jouse chu napeh ding ahi.

“Nahenga nasopi Hebrew mi a hung kijoh a ahileh, pasal hihen lang numei hijongle, kumgup sunga aman nangma kin abol ding ahin, kum sagi lhin kum vang leh nangin ama chu nanga kona nachamlhatsah a nasoldoh ding ahitai.
Chule nahenga kona nasoldoh tengleh, nangin ama chu nakoma akhut goh keova nasoldoh ding ahipoi;

nangin nakelngoi hon lah a peh ding hihen lang, nachangphola kona chang napeh ding lom hileh, chule nalengpitwi chilna muna kona napeh ding dol hijeng jongleh hongphal tah a napeh a nasoldoh ding ahi; Pakai na-Pathenin nangma phatthei nabohna bang banga nangin ama chu napeh ding ahiye.
’Egypt gamsunga chun nangma soh a pangsa nahin, Pakai na-Pathenin nahin lhatdohsa anahi, ti nageldoh jing jeng ding ahi; hijeh a chu keiman tunia hiche thupeh hi kapeh nahiye.
Amavang nasoh vul chun nang jah a aseiya, ‘Kei vang nahenga konin potdoh ponge,’ tia asei jeng tah a, nangto kilungset tah a naum jeh a aman nang le na insung mite alungset den jeng leh,
nangman thihtul khat nalah a kotpi sung lama abil navivang peh ding, chuteng leh ama chu nang dinga aitih chan geiya akihena um jing jeng ding ahitai. Nasoh pa jong chutobangma a nabol ding ahiye.

Nangin nakoma kona ama napotdoh sah ding, chamlhat napeh ding chu nang dia hahsa lou dinga kilom ahi; ajeh chu a man kumgup sunga soh thalah kipejat akeh man a nang kin anabolsa ahitai. Hitobanga nabola ahileh Pakai na-Pathenin natohna jousea nangma phatthei naboh ding ahi.

“Nabong hon le nakelngoi hon lah a apeng masa jouse achal tapou chu Pakai na-Pathen dinga nathensoa napeh doh ding ahi; nabong apeng masa jouse chu natohna naman thei lou ding, nakelngoi peng masa jouse jong amul nakivo thei lou ding ahi.
Hiche ho hi nangma nahin na insung mite ahiuvin, kumseh leh Pakaiyin adeilhenna muna chu Pakai na-Pathen angsunga naneh diu ahi.

Amavang agancha chun atichunga nolna khat tou aneikhah a, amitcho ham, aelbai ham, itobang ham khat nolna thei tah auma ahileh, hitobang chu nangin Pakai na-Pathen henga kilhaina naman louhel ding ahivouve.
Hitobang gancha chu nangma kholen sung dunga nakihen den ding ahitai; sapeng le sakhipi tobang banga chu aboh in jong athengin jong aneh thei cheh ding dol ahitai.
Nangman athisan chubou naneh thei louhel ding ahin, twi kisung lha tobanga tola athisan chu namoh sun lhah jeng ding ahiye.
“Abib lha hi nit jingin lang, Pakai na-Pathen henga kalchuh kut bol jing jengin; ijeh-inem itile Abib lha sunga hi Pakai na-Pathenin Egypt gamsunga kona nangma nahin puidoh anahi.
Hita hi nangman nabong hon lah a hi hen lang nakelngoi hon lah a hijongle Pakaiyin amin chensahna dinga adeilhenna muna chu Pakai na-Pathen kilhaina gantha kalchuh kut nabol ding ahi.

Kalchuh kut sa chu nangman cholsosa changlhah to name thei louhel ding ahi; ni sagi sunga a sa chu cholsolou changlhah lo name ding, lungkin lung bonga kibol changlhah chutoh name ding ahi; ajeh chu Egypt gama kona lungkin lung bonga hung jamdoh nahin, hitobanga hi nahinkho lhum keiya Egypt gamsunga kona nahung potdoh nikho chu nageldoh jing jeng thei ding ahiye.

Ni sagi sunga nagamgi sung pum pia cholsosa changlhah kimudoh louhel ding ahin, chujongle ni masa nikhoa nilhah lama kilhaina gan natha jong a sa ajing khovah geiya kikoi khovah den thei lou ding ahi.
Pakai na-Pathenin napehna kholen dung pou pouva nangman kalchuh kut kilhaina gan natha thei louhel ding ahi;
Pakai na-Pathenin ama min chensahna dinga adeilhenna mun, hikom laiya chubou nilhah lam nilhum don, Egypt gama kona nahung potdoh phat tah a chu kilhaina ganlha kalchuh kut chu natodoh ding ahibouve.
Chujongle Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhen na mun muna chu nangman asa naki hon mina naga neh ding, jingkah teng leh nahung kile kit’a naponbuh cheh nakijot ding ahi.
Nigup sungsea cholsolou changlhah naneh ding, ni sagi lhin ni leh Pakai na-Pathen henga kikhoppi theng khat nabol ding ahin, hiche nikho chuleh nangman na natoh louhel ding ahi.
“Nangman changkung ding lai pet nakoite toh natoa na-at pat nia pat hapta sagi nasimpat ding, hita hi hapta sagi alhinna dinga nasim ding ahi;

chule hapta sagi alhin teng leh nangman Pakai na-Pathen henga hapta chujat kut kiti chu nabol ding, nakhut tah a deichom ta a thilto kai kidong chu napeh a, Pakai na-Pathenin phatthei nabohna chu toh kitoh toh a napeh ding ahiye.

Chutah le Pakai na-Pathenin ama min chensahna dinga adeilhenna mun lai tah a chu Pakai na-Pathen angsunga nakipa thanop ding ahi, nangma nahin, nachapa ahin, nachanu ahin, nasoh pasal a hin, nasoh numei ahin, nakholen dunga cheng kha Levi mi jong, khopem le leh chaga palou jong, nalah a cheng meithai geiya nakipa diu ahi.
Nang jong Egypt gamsunga soh a pangsa nahi, ti nageldoh jing jenga, hijeh a chu chonna dan jouse hi nanitna dia nachih thei jing ding angaiye.
“Nachang phola kona chang napoh khoma, nalengpitwi chilna a kona lengpitwi naloh khom teng, nangman ni sagi sunga lhambuh kut naman ding ahiye.

Hiche kut sung jong hi leh nangma nakipa a, nangma nahin, nachapa le nachanu ahin, nasoh pasal le na soh numei ahin, Levi mi ahin, khopem mi leh chaga palou jong chule nakholen dunga cheng meithai jong kipah cheh ding nahiuve.

“Ni sagi sunga chu mmgman Pakaiyin adeilhenna ding muna chu Pakai na-Pathen henga kut nanit ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin nakhut’a natohna jousea chu phatthei naboh ding ahin, hijeh a chu nang jong cham kim keiya nakipa lhingset ding ahiye.

“Kum khat sunga thumvei cheh nami pasal jouse chu Pakaiyin adeilhenna ding muna Pakai na-Pathen angsunga kilah cheh diu ahi; cholso lou changlhah kut a jong, hapta sagi lhinna kut a jong chule lhambuh kut’a jong kilah cheh diu ahiye. Ahung kilulah jouse chu abonchauva khut goh keova hung thei lou diu ahi;
amitinin ajokham cheh dungjui, Pakai na-Pathenin nangma phatthei nabohna dungjui cheh a ato diu ahi.
“Nangin Pakai na-Pathenin napehna kholen dung jousea naphung phung phung dungjuiya thutan vaihom tampi napansah ding ahin, amaho hin mipi chunga thu adih tah a atanpeh diu ahi.

Nangin thutan dihna akaleh a nahei thei louhel ding ahin, mi mai vea lang neina jong nanei thei lou ding, chule nehguh jong nalah lou ding ahiye; ajeh chu nehguh hin miching tah mit achotsah jeng jin, midih ho dihna jong aheikonpeh jin ahi.
Adih a adih chubou nadel ding, chutia nabola ahileh Pakai na-Pathenin napehna gamsunga chu nachen theiya nalo thei ding ahi.
“Nangin Pakai na-Pathen dinga nasemdoh ding maicham vel’ a chu Asherah ding ahi, tia thing phung khat’a khat cha jong naphudoh thei louhel ding ahi.
Chujongle Pakai na-Pathen hotlam tah doikhom jong naphu thei louhel ding ahi.

“Bongchal hihen lang kelngoi hijongle nolna nei, achunga ipi khat ham nolna umpen pen chu nangin Pakai na-Pathen henga kilhaina gantha a naman thei lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hitobang gancha hi Pakai na-Pathen dinga thet umtah thil ahi.
“Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna kholen sung dung, nalah a kona pasal ham numei ham khat touvin Pakai naPathen mitmua thilse aboldoh a akitepna chu asuh keh teng ama chu akimatdoh a ahileh,

hichea hin aman potdohna ananei hen lang pathen lim semthuho pou kinbolin anapang jeng hen, hitobang ho hi chibai anaboh hen, ahiloule keiman kajah da thil, nisa ham lhathah ham, ahilou jongleh van loupina khat tou ham anahou hen lang,

chule hitobang thil kibolpi hi nang jah a kiseipeh jeng tale chun, nangman najahjah a chu phatecha nakhol chit dim dema, athil chu adih mong mong ahiya, hitia hi mikhat chun Israel sunga hi to bang thet umtah thil hi aboldoh jeng ahileh,

nangman hitobang thilse boldoh mi chu pasal hihen lang numei hijongle nakelkot phung dunga nahin kaidoh jeng ding, hitobang mi hi pasal hihen numei hijongle athi kahseuva songa nase se jenga naselih hel ding ahiye.
Hettohsah mi ni hettohsah jeh ham mithum hettohsah jeh ham jeh a athi ding mi chu tha ding ahi; mihem khat chu hettohsah mi khatseh thusei vanga tha louhel ding ahi.
Hettohsah a pang pen pen chun tha ding mi chunga akhut alha masah ding, ama bana hi mipin akhut alha diu bou ahiye. Hitobanga hi nangman nalah a thilse hung lut chu nasuh theng ding ahi.

“Ijeh ham tia na masanga thusoh bolpeh ding khat tou ahung umdoh khah a, athusoh chu nang dinga ahahsat behseh jenga, nang dia boljou hoi ahiloule, athusoh chu toltha thu hihen lang thudih kichuna hihen, kinahna le kibaona pou pou hita hen lang, ipi pi hijongle nakholen sung dunga hitobang thil hi asodoh a ahileh, chuleng nangma nakipatdoh a Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhenna ding mun chu najot ding ahi;

chujou teng Levi themput dola thempua pang ho heng leh chulaiya thutan vaihoma anapang ho henga chu nahunga amaho henga athu nalhut khum jenga nadoh toh ding, chule amahon athu lhuhna naphondoh peh diu ahiye.

Hiche phat chuleh Pakaiyin adeilhenna muna kona amahon najah a aphondoh-u chu asei bang banguva nangin nabol tei tei ding ahm, amahon nakopeh bang banguva nabol thei theina dinga nangma nachih thei ding angaiyin ahi.

Amahon nahilchah bang bangu leh nahenga athu lhuhna naphondoh peh bang banguva nangin nabol ding ahin, nahenga aphondoh sau thu lhuhna kona hi nakihei manga ajet a jong aveiya jong napel thei louhel ding ahi.

Ijemtia koi tobang ham khat’in thempupa, Pakai na-Pathen angsunga lhacha kin bol dinga ding jingpa thu ngai peh louvin, chule thutan vaihompa thusei jong ngaideh louvin ama matoh toh-in thil bol jeng ta leh, hitobang mihem chu tha tei tei ding ahi; hitobanga hi nangman Israel jah a kona thilse nasuh theng ding ahiye.
Chuti hen lang hileh mipin thu ngaiyuvin tin, kicha cheh diu, chutengleh amatoh toh a thil amoh bol bol lou dingu ahi.

“Ijemtia Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna gamsunga hi nahung lhun tah a, agam neiya napan a chule asunga chu nachen teng nangman hitia hi naseiya, ‘Keiman kakimvela cheng namtin vaipi hijat ho bol bang bang hin, kei chunga vaihom ding leng khat tungdoh jeng inge, natia ahileh;

tahbeh monga nangin Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhen pen pen chu koi hile nachunga lenga natundoh thei ding ahinai. Naso pite lah a khat pen pen hi nachunga lenga natundoh jeng thei ahi; nasopi hilou, gamchom mi vang nachunga natundoh thei louhel ding ahiye.

Lenga pang pen pen chun ama changseh a dinga sakol akiholbe be jenga ahiloule sakol kilambe be dinga jong Egypt gam lama mipi akitolsah kit louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin nang ho jah a anaseiya, ‘Nang ho hiche lampia khu nakile kit louhel diu ahi,’ tia aseisa ahitai.

Lengpa chun numei ji ding jong akiholbe be jeng lou ding ahi, achutilouva ahileh alungthim kihei mang ding ahi; ahilou jongle ama ding changseh seh a dangka le sana tamtah neidoh be be nading angaito lou ding ahiye.
“Lengpa chu aleng gamsunga laltouna atou teng, aman ama ding mong monga Levi thempupa kamsunga kiseidoh hiche danthua kona hi lekhabu khat akisutdoh ding;

hiche sutdohsa lekhabu hi amato kivop jing jeng ding, a man jong ahinkho sunga aniseh le asim jing ding, Pakai a-Pathen ginje kihil hil jenga, hiche danthua thu kisei jouse le chonna dan jouse anit jing ding, natoh a jong apoh doh thei ding ahin;

chuti hen lang hileh ama lungthim jeng jong chu asopite chungvuma kichoi sang thei lou ding, chujongle thupeh a kona jong jangkeiya chea ajet aveiya kiheidoh doh louhel ding ahi; hiti hi leh Israel lah a ama ahin achate ahiuvin agampoh aleng gamsunga thu nei sot thei diu ahiye.

“Levi themputdola thempua pang Levi phung pumpia thempuho hin Israel toh chan jong aneikhom thei lou diu, gou Jong alokhom thei lou diu ahi; amahon Pakai henga meiya govam thilto kitohdoh chengse hi kivahna aneiyuva, a ma chan ding dol chu chang ding ahiuve.
Levi’n asopite lah a chan ding gou anei thei lou ding ahi; Pakaiyin athutepsa banga Pakai chu ama goulo ahijengse.

Hijeh a chu mipia kon, kilhaina gantha a kona thempuse se chan ding dol chu bongchal hihen lang kelngoi hijongle hicheng hi ahi: mihon asa chu adah le akhalhang toh chule agilpi hi thempupa themsa apeh diu ahi.
Nangin thempupa nachang lhung masa, nalengpitwi lhung masa, nathaotwi lhung masa chule nakelngoi mul kivou masa chu napeh tei tei ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathenin naphung lah lah a kona ama hi alhendoh a, ama jong achapate jong, Pakai min a panga ding jing diu chule akinbola pang ding ahi, tia aitih chan geiya dinga akoi ahitai.
“Ijemtia Israel kholen dunga kona hoikom mun hijong leh achenna muna kona Levi mikhat tou Pakaiyin adeilhenna pang dinga adeichat’a ahung jeng tah a ahileh,
ama jong hin agoldang Levi miho bang banga Pakai a-Pathen min apat’a akinbola pang thei ahin, Pakai angsunga ding jing kinbola Levi miho banga aman jong abol ding ahiye.
Levi mi khat’in anei akijoh simlouva, amahon kibang cheh a anneh chan anei diu ahi.
“Ijeh ham tia nangma Pakai naPathenin napehna gamsunga nahung lut teng leh, nangman hiche namtin vaipiho chonna thet umtah tah ho khu najui louhel ding ahi.
Nalah a chu kilhaina dinga achapa hihen achanu hijongle meiya gouvam jeng mi um thei louhel ding, doithua gao theina bola jong, themka jong, ailhim them jong, phunsan them jong,
bumthu them jong, thilha gaochang mi jong, mitphel doithem jong chule thi-lha doithem jong um thei louhel ding ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itileh hitobang thil bolpen pen mi chu Pakai dinga thet umtah ahin, hitobang thet umtah tah thil ho hi anabol jeh uva Pakai na-Pathenin na masanga amaho hi adel mang ahi.
Nangma Pakai na-Pathen dinga mi kitah tah nahi tei tei ding ahiye.
Ajeh chu nangin gam neilouva nakoi ding hiche namtin vaipite hin themka ho thusei ana ngaiyuva, doithua gaotheina neiho thu angaiyu ahin, Pakai na-Pathenin hitobanga nabol ding hi aphalpoi.
“Pakai na-Pathenin nalah a kona hi nang ding thempu khat keima tobang bang hi, nasopite lah a ahintundoh tei ding ahin, nang hon ama thu na ngai diu nakhohsah diu ahiye.

Horeb molsanga Houbung kikhop nia nangman Pakai na-Pathen henga nadeichat’a naseisa chu hiche hi ahin hitin miseiye, ‘Pakai ka-Pathen thusei ogin chu neijah sah kit hih hel’in lang chujongle hitobang meikong nasa tah hi neimusah kit hih beh in, achutilouva ahileh kamoh thilo ding ahi,’ tia nasei ahi.
Hichun Pakaiyin keijah a anaseiyin, ‘Amahon asei jouseu hi asei dih lheh jenguve.

Ken amaho dinga hi asopiteu lah mama a kona nang tobang themgao khat katundoh peh ding ahiuve; chulengle keiman themgaopa kamsunga chu kathusei jouse kakhumpeh a kathumop ding, chulengle aman hiche thu jouse hi ama kathupeh bang banga amaho aseipeh son ding ahi.
Koi koi hijongle keima mina themgaopa thusei ho ngai lou chu keima mong mongin kahindoh chet jeng ding ahi.

Ahinla keiman kathupeh louhel thusei khat tou keima min pan’a acham chama moh seidoh jenga ham, ahilou jongleh pathen lim semthu achom chom min pat’a thusei jia ham themgao khat tou auma ahileh, hitobang themgao chu thi tei tei ding ahi,’ tin eiseipeh-e.
Nangin nalungthim sunga ‘Pakai thusei ahipoi, ti chu keihon iti kahetdoh thei diu ham?’ tia nagel leh,

hitobang hetdohna ding chu themgao khat’in Pakai min pan a thu aseiya, athusei chu ahung guilhun lou tengleh, hitobang thu kisei chu Pakaiyin asei khah lou ahi; themgao pan acham chama ageltoh thua asei ahibouvin, hitobang themgao chu nangin nagin louhel ding ahi.
“Ijemtia Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna gamsunga cheng nam-tin vaipi jouse hi asuhgam teng leh, chujongle nangin amaho hi gam neilou nasoa, akhopi sung dung jouseu le ain dung jouseuva nachen teng,
hiche Pakai na-Pathenin nachenna dinga napehna gamsunga chu nangman khopi thum achom beh a nakikhendoh ding ahiye.

Pakai na-Pathenin nachenna dinga napeh gamsungse se chu nangin khopi thum dinga chu kibanga hop thuma nahop khen ding, chule lampi nasemlut soh keiya, hikoma chu koi hijongle mithat auma ahileh jamlutna anei cheh thei ding ahi.

“Mithat kiselna khopia jamlut min ahinkho ahuhhing theina ding thilgon dan chu hitobang bang hi ahiye. Mihem khat chun masanga kimitmahna neipi lou hela aheng akom khat tou lung tupna beihela khutsoiya atha khah tah a ahileh,

kiti chu amipa hi gammang thing lah a thing phuh dinga aheng akompa chutoh kilhona che ahiya, thing phuh lhuhna dinga aheicha alap pet tah a aheichang alhoh lhah a akunga kona akikhodoh jenga, aheng akompa chu asekhah a athijeng tah a ahileh, mithatpa chu hiche khopi thum ho lah a hi khatpen pen’a jamlut a ahinkho akihuhhing thei ahiye.

Achutilouva ahileh amithatpa hin masang chun aheng akompa chutoh kitomona nei hih hen lang athi dinga kilom hi hih beh jongle, achena ding lampi agamlat behseh jeh a chu thisan phu lah nompan alunghan deuje ju pet tah a amithat pa hi ahindel pai paijenga lampia aphah tengleh athina bel theiya amavo jeng ding ahi.
Hichejeh a hi ken nangma thu kapeh a kaseiya, ‘Nangman kiselna ding khopi thum achombeh a nakhendoh ding ahi,’ kati ahiye.
Chule Pakai naPathenin napu napate henga akihahselna banga chu nagamgi akeh let’a, chujongle napu napate peh dinga athuptepsa tobanga chu agamsung hi aboncha napeh doh teng,

ijemtia nangin jong tuni nikhoa ken nang kathupeh hiche thupeh nitjingjeng dinga nachih theiya, Pakai naPathen hi na ngailut jinga, aitih chan geiya jong ama lampi jenga nache jing jenga ahileh, nangman hiche khopi thum chunga jong hi khopi thum ma kiselna dinga nabolbe kit nah lai ding ahi.
Achutilouva ahileh Pakai na-Pathenin goulo dinga napehna gamsunga hi themmona bei thisan kiso jing ding, chulengle thisan so jal a themmona chu nang chunga chu ding ahi.

“Amavang mihem khat’in aheng akom chu ahotbola, anachan lhih gunset’a, chulengle anokhum jenga, thina thei khopset’a amavoa, hijeh a hi ama athipai tah a ahileh, hiche mithatpa jong chu hiche kiselna khopiho khat pen pena jamlut ding;
ahivanga ama khopi sunga upa chengse kon ‘uva ajamlutna a kona amapa chu agaholdoh diu, amudoh tengu leh athi tei teina dinga, thisan phu lah nompa khut’a apehdoh jeng diu ahi.

Hiche tolthat chunga hi namit vet jeng cha navoujang natpi lou ding, Israel lah-a hitobanga hi themmona bei thisan kiso chu nasuh theng joh ding ahiye; chuti hen lang hileh nang dia jong thilpha hi ding ahi.
“Pakai na-Pathenin nachenna dinga nangma napehna gamsung nagoulona muna chu gollui laiya miten aphusau naheng nakompa gamgi song kitung chu nabodoh thei louhel ding ahi.

“Itobang themmona hijongle mi mosona dinga hettohsah mi khatseh seh thusei vanga mihem khat kithemmo sah thei lou ding ahi; hettohsah mi ni ham thum ham jeh a bou mi kimosona ding chu kisudet thei ding ahibouve.
Vetda man jen jen’a mi khat’in achom khat chu thilse adih lou bol ahi, tia moso ding agot’a ama douna thu ahettohsah a ahileh,
khat jong khat jong akina teni chu Pakai angsung le thempuho angsung, chule chulaiya thutan vaihoma pang ho angsunga hung ding cheh ding ahi.
Thutan vaihom hon achung chang hudol hi giltah in kholtoh uvin tin, hichea hi hettohsah a pangpa hin aheng akompa chu jouthua ahehset ahileh,
nang hon adih louva mi hehse pa chu aman mi kibolna dinga adei bang banga amajoh bol ding ahi; hitia nangman nalah a kona thilse chu nasuh theng ding ahiye.
Chutengle midang jousen ana jasoh hel’uvin tin, kichatna aneiyuva, nalah a hitobang thilse hi abol kit louhel diu ahi.

Namit vet jeng cha jong hi to bang mihing hi navoujang natpi louhel ding, hinkho khela hinkho suhmang ding, mit khela mit, ha khela ha, khut khel a khut chule kengphang khela kengphang suh mang ding ahi.

“Nangma namelmate douna galsat dinga nakondoh teng, nanga sanga tamjo sakolte leh kangtalai tampi chule sepai tamjo namu jong leh nangin hiche ho hi nakichat chom lou ding ahi: jeh-inem itileh Egypt gamsunga kona nahinpuidoh Pakai na-Pathen chun nangma naumpi jing jeng nai.
Gal kisatna mun nanai lut tengu leh thempupa chu mipi masanga machonjep’a ajah uva thu asei ding,

hitia hi miho jah a thu asei ding ahi, ‘Ngaiyin vo Israel, tu nin namelma te toh kisat din nang ho galmun nahung nailut tauve: hijeh chun nalungthim lhah dahsah dauvin, kichat nan ong neidauvin, gal mite ginna kitihot hih-uvin, amaho gin jong nagin louhel diu ahiye;
ijeh-inem itileh Pakai naPathenu chu nang ho gal najo sah dinguvin namelmateu toh kisat din nang ho masanga alamkai jing nai, ‘tia asei ding ahi.

Chutengle vaihom loiyin jong mipi ah a chu thu aseiyuva hitia asei diu ahi, ‘Mihem koipen tah hin inthah akisah a thenso louva akoi jam? Hitobang mihem chu auma ahileh ain lama kinungle kit tahen, achutilouva ahileh galmuna thiden na anei teng ain chu midangdia kithenso ding ahi.

Chujongle lengpilei hon kibola lengpithei nekha lou lai mihem koipen tah-um kham? Ama jong chu ainlama kile kitta hen, achutilouva ahileh ama jeng jong hi galmuna thi khan tin, midangin alengpitheiga aneh peh ding ahi.

Chutobanga chu pasal koi to bang khat jinei dia ji kiholsa uma, puila kipui loulai um am? ljem tin ama jong hi galmuna thiden jeng ta leh midangin akichenpi thei ahi, hijeh chun ainlama kilekit jeng hen,’ tia asei diu ahi.

Chujongle vaihom ho chun mipi jah a aseibe kit nah laiyuva hitia asei diu ahi, ‘Akichase behseh mihem um am, alungthim kihol lel hel a um ah? Ama jong hi ainlama kile kit jeng hen. Achutilouva ahileh ama lungthim bang banga aloi agol lungthim jong akihol lel sah ding ahi,’ ati diu ahi nailaiye.
Hitobanga hi vaihomse sen asei diu thu aboncha aseisoh hel tengu leh, mipi lamkai dinga achunguva thu nei dinga kipansah soh ding ahiuve.
“Nangin khopi khat tou kisatpi dinga nanai lut jeng tah jongle, amasan kichampi din tem masan.
Hichea hi akhopin kicham ding adeiya ahung lut a ahileh, nahenga kiphala hung lut ahitan, akhosunga cheng mihem jouse chu nangma natonga panguva, nang kin abol diu ahitai.
Amavang akhopi chun chamna naneipi nom louva, nang douna gal kisatpi ding nadeijoh leh, nangman jong akhopi chu naum pai jeng ding ahi;
hichea hi Pakai na-Pathenin nangma khut’a hiche khopi hi napeh doh jeng theiya ahileh, nangin jong pasala kai aboncha chemjama nasal lih soh hel ding,

akhopi sunga cheng numei le nunao chapangse se toh, gancha jouse le thilkeo dang jouse toh, chule athilkeo athangjouse chu gal a kichomdoh thilkeo kibolna bang banga nabola nakilah jeng ding ahi; hitobanga hi Pakai na-Pathenin nang napehsa khopi sunga namelmate thilkeo jouse chu nangin nopsah na naman jeng ding ahiye.
Nangman nahenga kona gamla behseh khopi jouse chu hitobanga hi nabol ding, chule hikom dunga namtin vaipite khopi hilou ho jong chutobang ma a nabol ding ahiye.
Ahin Pakai na-Pathenin nangma goulo dinga napehsa hiche mitin vaipi ho khopi chengse vang hi ahileh, nangman ahing thei kiti tapou chu khat’a khat cha jong nahing hoi louhel ding ahi;
Pakai na-Pathenin nathupeh bang banga Hit mite hi hen, Am or mite hileh, canaan mite hihen lang Periz mite hileh, Hivi kiti miho hihen lang chule Jebus miho hijongle abonchauva nathagam hel ding ahi;
chuti hen lang hileh Pakai na-Pathenu douna chonsetna dinga amahon apathen lim semthuu kin abol’uva thet umtah tah thil abol jiu to bang thilbol ho hi nangho nahil them khah thei lou diu ahiye.

“Nangman phat soh tah, nikho tamtah sunga khopi khat tou nauma, hiche khopi chu lah tei teina dinga gala nakisatpi teng leh amiho douna ahi, tia thing phung jouse chu heicha a naphuh lhuh louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu nangin jong athingga naneh thei ding ahin, hijeh a chu naphuh lhuh lou ding aphai. Hitobang tollhanga keh thing phung ho hi mihem hiya nangin hiche ho hi gal uma nauma nasuh gamhel ding ba ham?

Amavang nangin aga neh thei lou ahi, tia nahetsa thing phung ho auma ahivang leh, hiche tobang thing phung chu naphuh lhuh a akhopi umna a namanchah a akhopi alhuh kahsea galsatna manchah a nanei thei ahitai.
“Pakai na-Pathenin chenna dinga napeh gamsunga tolthi khat tou akimudoh a, tolthi chu tollhanga akijamden jenga, koi thapen ahi ding athatpa chu akimatdoh thei louva ahileh,
na upate le nathutan ho hung kondoh soh keiyuva tolthipa lupna le akimvel dunga khopi um chengse kikah chu agamlat anai atetoh diu,

chujou tengleh tolthipa kithana muna kona anailam pen tah khopi pen pen chun mo apoh diu, akhopia upa chengsen bonglagol natong khalou laihel, namkoljon jong pokha loulai hel khat agamat jeng diu ahi.

Chule khopia upate chun bonglagol chu twi lonna phaicham lai khat’a ahinkaisuh uva, hiche phaicham jeng jong hi louva bolsa ham muchi tunasa ham khat hithei lou ding, hiche phaicham muna hi amahon bonglagol chu alol aheboh peh diu ahi.

Hichea Levi chapate thempuho chu amasang lama hung masauva, Pakai na-Pathenin amaho ama kinbol ding le ama min vahchoi dinga alhendoh jeh a, amaho thusah dungjuiya kinahna jouse le kidel khumna jouse hi kichai ding ahiye.
Hitia hi hiche tolthipa lupna to kinailam pen tah khopia upa chengsen phaicham laiya alol kiheh bongsa bonglagol chunga hi akhut twiya akisil soh keiyuva,
chujou tah le amahon ahettohsah dingu asei diu ahi, ‘Keiho khut hin hiche thisan hi aso ahipon, athisan kisopet jeng jong keihon kamupouve.

O Pakai, nangman nalhatdohsa namite Israel hi ngaidam tei teiyin, chule namite Israel chate lah a hin themmona beiya thisan kiso chung changa themmona hi chuhsah hih hel’in; amaho hi thisan jal a mona auma ahileh ngaidam chansah tei teiyin,’ tia ataopeh diu ahi.
Hitobanga hi nangman themmona beiya thisan kiso mona hi nalah a kona nasuh theng ding ahi, Pakai mitmua thildih chu nabol tengleh nasuh theng ding ahiye.
“Nangma namelmate toh kisat ding a nakondoh teng, Pakai na-Pathenin namelmate chu nakhut’a apehdoh tah a ahileh nangin gal-hingin kai jeng theiyin nate;
ahin hiche gal-hing kikai lah-a hi nangman numei mel-hoi tah namudoh a amanu hi nangin nadeichat mong monga ahileh naji din kipui jeng theiyin nate.
Hiche numei hi nangman na inlama nakipuiya asam navochai peh ding, atin jouse jong natanpeh ding ahi.

Chule anumei nun jong asoh von akoiya nangma insunga cheng den ding, lha khat lhingset’a apa le anu pul adou ding ahi; hiche jou chuleh nang jong anumei nu henga nagalut thei ding, ama jong najinu hintin, nangma ajipa nahi ding nupa a naum lhon ding ahitai.

Ahivanga amanu chunga hi nalung alhai louva ahileh nangin ache na nom noma nasol thei ahiye; suma vang nakijoh thei louhel ding, soh kibolna banga nabol lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nangin amanu hi nasuh setsa ahitai.

“Pasal khat’in ji numei ni akop’a, khatnu adeiya khatjo nu adeimo ahiya, chule aji te nin anilhona, adeijo nu adeimo jo nu hijongle cha ahinpeh gel lhona, ijemtia adeimo jo nu cha apeng masa chu pasal ahileh,
hiche pasal chun khoununga achapate agou chan diu ahop peh nikho leh adeijo nu chapa apeng nukhahjo chu adeimojo nu chapa apeng masajo sanga apeng masa bol banga abol thei louhel ding ahin,

hisanga chu aman adeimojo nu chapa apeng masajo chu achapa tahjoa aphondoh a, anei jouse lah a chan jat chan ni apeh ding ahi, ajeh chu amajoh hi athahoi janga hung kondoh masajo ahin, mi upa chan ding dol chu ama chan ding ahijoi.
“Pakai khat touvin chapa mi louchal le doumah mah a chon, nu thu pa thu ngailou anei khah a, anule apan ahil vanga athu lhon ngaideh louva auma ahileh,
anu apan achapa lhon chu amat jeng lhona achenna khopi kelkot phunga thutan vaihoma pang upate henga ahinpui lut jeng lhon ding,

chule anule apan upaho jah a asei lhona, ‘Hiche kachapa lhon hi alouchal’in, doumah mah-in akisan, keini thu angai ta hih hel jenge; milop mi, neh hat tah le jukham jing mi ahitai,’ tia asei lhon ding ahi.
Chutah le khopi sunga mihon hitobang miphalou hi songa aselih jeng diu ahi; hitia hi nangin nalah a thilse chu nasuh theng ding ahin, hiche hi Israel pumpin jong mu uvin tin kicha soh keidiu ahi.
“Mihem khat touvin thina thei loma talen pehna ding chonset aboldoh a, ama chu akitha lou akhoh mong mong teng leh, hitobang mi hi nangin thing chunga nakhailih ding ahin,

atahsa along vang chu jan khovah hel-a thing chunga kikhai khovah den louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh mihem akikhailih-a chu Pathen gaosap chang ahi; nakhovah sah-a Pakai na-Pathenin nagoulo dia napehsa gam sung hi nasuh boh louhel ding ahiye.

“Nangman nasopi bongchal ham, akelngoi ham avah manga namua ahileh hitobang thil ho hi nakimu mo sah a kithopi lou, donlouva nakoi thei louhel ding, namu mu chu nasopi henga nahin kailut peh ding joh ahibouve.

Aneipa hi nangin nakinailampi ahi hih a, nangin jong koi ahi ding nahet louva ahileh, agancha chu nangman na-inlama nahin kailut jenga, nasopi aneipan ahung hol masangsea nachinpeh ding, ahung hol teng leh nanung peh ding ahi.

Hitobang banga hi asangan mu jongle chun nabolpeh a, aponsil mudoh jongle chun nabolpeh cheh ding ahi; ipi thil hita leh nasopi thil mansah nangin namudoh pou pou chutia nabol peh soh kei ding ahi; nangman kithopi louva nakoi thei lou ding ahiye.
Chujongle nangman nasopi sangan ham, abongchal ham lampia analhukam namupa a ahileh nakimu mo sah a kithopi louhela nakoi lou ding ahi; nasopi aganchate alhua chu naphoh dinghu ding ahiye.

“Numeiyin pasal chunga kaisa von, ponsil akivona akisil thei lou ding, pasal’in jong numei von, aponsil akivona akisil thei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hitobanga thilbol mi chu Pakai na-Pathen dinga thet umtah mi ahi.

“Ijemitia nangman vacha bu natokhah a, vabu chu thing chunga um hihen, tollhanga um hijongleh, abusunga atui ham anousen ham auma, achunga vapin a-opkhum pet anahileh, atui chung ham anousen chung ham a, ana-op vapi chu anousen pum puma namat tha thei louhel ding ahi;
vapi chu nadel manga chujou tengleh anousen chu nakilo thei ahinai; chutia nabola ahileh nang din jong phatheiyin tin, nang jong nahinsot thei ding ahi.

Nangman inthah nasah tengjong le inchunga kona mi ahung lhah mang louna dinga inchung nakhu teng min alhonal paia alhah manga na inchunga thisan jala themmona achuh louna din, bi-lha mong gola khu akol akidonna ding nasempeh ding ahi.

“Nalengpilei laiya jong muchi jat ni natuhal lou ding ahi, natuhal jeng junga ahileh namuchitu gasoh le nalengpileiga ahoi hoiya munthenga to dia khat’a khat cha jong kisang thei louhel ding, lah lou soh ding ahi.
Chule nangman bongchal le sa-ngan naman kop’a lou kaina naman khom thei lou ding;
patchom chom kihala kikhong, samul le tupat kihala kikhong jong nakisil thei lou ding ahiye.
“Nangin kihuina naman ding nasangkhol chol mong aning lia chun pat-hoi khat cheh kiban.
“Pasal khat touvin numei jia akipuiya, chujou teng leh anumei nu chu akitimat pia, ahivanga avetda a akenga apeh mang hel gottah a,

hitobanga chu amanu hi jachat chatna abol jenga, hiche numei chu minse tah ahisah a, ‘Keiman hiche numei hi kaji dia kapui ahin, ahivangin amanu hi kalup pi phat’in ama hi athenglou akisusesa ahitai, ti kamudoh bouve,’ tia aphondoh a ahileh,
hiche khangdong numei hi apa le anun nu-ngah theng mong mong ahinai, ti phot chetna hi khopi kelkot’a thutan vaihoma pang upa ho henga apoh doh lhon ding ahi;

hichea hi numei khangdongnu pan upa ho henga aseiya, ‘Keiman kachanu hi hiche pasal pa hitoh kicheng dinga ajinu hi dia kanapeh ahitan, ahinla amapa hin anumei hi avetdan akenga peh mang hel din agon,

chujongle vetan, ama hin amanu chunga jachat chatna thu jeng ama dou nan aseiyin hitin ati, “Keiman nachanu chunga hi nu-ngah theng ahimong nai, tina imacha kam’udoh tapoi,” tin aseiye. Ahinla kachanu hi nu-ngah theng mong mong ahina hichengse hi aphot chetna ahi,’ tia asei ding ahi. Hitobanga hi anu le apan upa ho masanga hiche khopi upa ho mu dia chu aponsil apha jeng lhon ding ahi.
Chutengle kho upa hon pasal pa chu amat’uva ajep diu,

chujongle ama chu dangka shekel ja khat’a aleosah uva agap diu, asum dangka chu numei khangdongnu pa chu apeh diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche pasal chun Israel lah a nu-ngah theng khat aminset sah ahitai; chule anumei jong chu aman jia anei tei tei ding ahin, ahinkho lhum keiya aman numeinu chu ada a apaidoh thei louhel ding ahinalaiye.
Ahinla ijemtia akisei chu adih ahiya, hiche numei khangdongnu chunga hi nu-ngah theng ahina laitah chu akimudoh hih-a abeisa ahitah leh,

amahon hiche nu-ngah khangdongnu chu apa in kotpi phunga kona ahin kaidoh diu, chutah le khopi sung mihon amanu hi songa aselih jeng diu ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh hiche numei hin ngol hoi tah-a noti chon athoa Isreal lah-a thu ngol hoi tah hi ahinpoh lut a apa insunga hitia hi chon ahiye; hitia hi nangman nalah a thilse kibol chu nasuh theng ding ahi.

“Pasal khat chun pasal chomdang khat jinu aluppi akimudoh a ahileh, anigel lhona, numeinu kitimatpi pasal chu ahin, chule anumeinu chu ahin, thadoh ding ahi lhone. Hitobanga hi nangman Israel lah-a kona thilse nasuh theng ding ahi.
“Ijemtia khopi sunga nu-ngah theng mito kikhamsa khat chu pasal dang khat’in atokhah-a kholai dunga amanu chu akitimatpi jeng tah-a ahileh,

nang hon hiche pasal le numei chu khopi kelkot phunga nahin kaidoh uva, amani chu songa naselih hel diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh numei khangdongnu jong chu khopi sung laitah-a uma min ahuh-a apanpi theina dingin apeng ging hih hel’in, chule pasalpan jong aheng akom numei asuhset jeng ahi; hitobanga hi nangin nalah-uva kona thilse nasuh theng ding ahiye.

“Amavang numei khangdong mito kikhamsa khat chu gamlah-a pasal khat touvin atokhah a, pasal chun numeinu chu thahatsana amat jenga, atuh chah dena akitimatpi jeng tah a ahileh, hiche thudola hi pasal pa changseh bou tha ding ahi, numei aluppi jeng chu.

Hitobang thudola hi hiche numei khangdongnu vang hi imacha nalo thei lou ding ahi; numei khangdongnu chunga hin thana thei loma talen pehna ding thil abol khel aumpoi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche thudol hi pasal khat’in aheng akom pasal chom khat adel khuma atha to bang ahibouve.
Ipijeh-inem itileh pasal pan anumeinu chu gamlah a abophaden jeng ahitan, hiche pasalto kikhamsa khangdong numei chun kithopi ding asap sap jeng vanga ama gahuhdoh ding koima anaum lou ahiye.
“Pasal khat touvin mito kikham loulai nu-ngah laipet khat atokhah a, atoh khapan amanu chu thahatsana akimat jenga chule aluppia, hichea hi apet tah a amani hi akimatdoh a ahileh,

hiche nu-ngah khangdong petcha kitimatpi pasalpa chun numei nu pa chu dangka shekel som nga apeh a, anumeinu jong aman jia anei ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh aman numeinu chu asuh thangsa ahitan, ahinkho lhum keiya ada a apaidoh thei louhel ding ahi.
“Pasal khat touvin jong apa jinu hisa chu jia nei dia akipui thei lou ding, chujongle apajia kisimsa chu anih ahopeh thei louhel ding ahi.
“Pasal atilchang kisugoisa ham, ahiloule ajang ki-attansa ham mi chu akipaidohsa ahitan, hijeh-a chu Pakai Houbung sunga kikhopna hung lut thei louhel ding ahi.
“Noti cha jong Pakai Houbunga lut thei lou ding; khangsom lhing ta jongleh noti chapa son le chilhah ho chu khat’a khat jeng cha jong Pakai Houbung khoppi sunga lut thei louhel ding ahiye.
“Ammon mi le Moab mi jong Pakai Houbung sunga lut thei lou ding; khangsom geiya jong amaho mi khat’a khat jeng cha jong Pakai Houbung sunga lut thei louhel ding, aitih chan geiya chuti ding ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh Ammon mite le Moab miten Egypt gamsunga kona nahung potdoh pet’uvin lampi dunga chun changlhah le twisih jeng chan jong nalamto pouve; chusangin nangma douna nagaosap dingin Mesopotamia gamsunga Pethor kiti muna Beor chapa Bala am agathalah jo uvin ahi.
Hijongle la Pakai na-Pathenin Bala am thusei ana ngaipon ahi; Pakai na-Pathenin agaosapna chu nang din phatthei kiboh nan aheidoh peh jon ahi, ajeh chu Pakai na-Pathenin nangma na ngailun ahi.
Itih chan gei hijeng jong leh nangman nahinkho lhum keiya amaho chamlenna thei le ahaodohna diu naholpeh louhel ding ahiye.
“Nangin Edom mi vang nanol thei louhel ding ahi, ajeh chu ama hi nasopi ahi; Egypt mi jong nangin nanol thei lou ding ahi, ajeh chu ama gamsunga khu nangma khopemsa nahibouve.
Edom le Egypt mite vang khangthum lhinna peng ho dinga Pakai Houbung sunga lut thei diu ahitai.
“Nangma namelmate toh kidouva nakondoh a ngahmun a naum teng leh nang le nang thilse jousea kona nakikangse doh ding ahi.
“Ijemtia namite lah a chu jankah a botwi chedoh aum khah a hijeh a chu aboh a akisim khah a ahileh, hitobang mihem chu ngahmun polama chedohjeng ding, ngahmun sunga hung vah lut kit louhel ding ahi:
amavang nilhah lam ahung hiya ahiphat chuleh ama le ama twiya kisil thengsel ding, nisa alhum lhum leh ngahmun sunga hung lut kit thei ding ahitai.
“Nangman ngahmun polama chu ehkhul nanei ding, hikoma chu ehtha napotdoh ji ji ding ahi;

chujongle gal manchah napoh lah a chu, lei laina thei tenggol khat nakigot tha jing ding, ehtha dinga natou teng, hiche tenggol a hi leiko nalaiya, ngahmun polama chu nathah ding, chujou tengle na-eh chu nakileheiya lei navuh khum cheh ding ahi.

Pakai na-Pathen chu ngahmuna nangma huhhing ding le namelmate chu nangma hinpedoh jeng dinga vahle le ahin, hijeh a hi nangma ngahmun chu theng tei tei ding ahi; chuti hen lang hileh Pakaiyin nalah uva chu imacha thil atheng lou aboh imacha amudoh thei louhel ding, nanga kona jong kiheimang thei lou ding ahi.
“Apu koma kona hung jamdoh soh chu nangin nahenga ahunga ahileh apupa henga nanung peh jeng thei lou ding ahi;

ama chu nangma jalah tah-a chenga nang to nachen khom lhon ding, hoilai mun hijongle aman alunga adei laitah, nakholen sung dung hoikom hijongle aman adeilhen nalai tah chenmun dia adeina a chu cheng ding ahi; ama chu nangin nabol genthei louhel ding ahiye.
“Israel chanute koimacha jong milim houna kineiya notia panga akijoh um thei louhel ding, chujongle Israel chapate lah-a jong milim houna kineiya notia panga akijoh um thei louhel ding ahi.

Nangman noti man le uicha thalo man chu ipi hijongle kitepna man a peh dinga Pakai na-Pathen insunga nahin choilut’a nato thei louhel ding ahi; ijehinem itileh hiche teni hi ahoi ahoi ahiya anigela Pakai na-Pathen henga thet umtah gel ahilhon bouve.

“Nangman nasopi chu sum akan dia nabatsah thei louhel ding, sum hijong le akan um thei lou ding, neh thei anneh hijongle um thei lou ding, akan umdia kibatsah kiti pou pou chu nabol thei louhel ding ahi.

Gamchom mi vang ahileh akan dinga napeh thei ahinai; ahin nasopi mong mong vang chu akan dinga napeh thei lou ding ahiye; akan nalah louva ahileh tua agamsunga cheng dinga najot lutna gamsunga khu ipi hijongle nakhut’a nabol chan chu Pakai na-Pathenin phatthei naboh peh ding ahi.

“Nangman Pakai na-Pathen henga peh dinga kitepna nabolsa uma ahileh, apeh ding phat leh nanung kihkit louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi Pakai na-Pathenin nang chunga adel tei tei ding ahi, napeh louva ahitengleh nang dia chonset hi ding ahitai.
Kitep louva nauma ahivangle nang dinga jong chonset hilou dingma ahinai.
Nakamsung sohsa chu naboldoh tei teina din ching theiyin, ijeh-inem itileh nangman nakam napat mong monga Pakai na-Pathen koma nachamtah a kitepsa nahi ahitai.
“Nangma naheng nakompa lengpilei laiya navalut teng nangin lengpithei chu nadujat jat navaset’a naneh thei ahin, amavang them’a themcha jeng jong napaipeh sunga nahet lut thei louhel ding ahi.

Chujongle naheng nakompa changkung ding laiya navalut khah a ahijongle nangman nakhut’a changvui nakisi si jeng thei ahinan, ahinla naheng nakompa changkung dinglai chu koite natoa na-at lhuh thei louhel ding ahiye.

“Pasal khat touvin numei khat jia akipuiya akichenpi tengleh a manu hin achunga nolna aneiya hijeh a chu aman ajipa alung lhaisah thei loule ajipan jong kidana lekha asutpeh a akhut’a akichoisah ding, ainsunga kona asoldoh ding ahi, amanun jong ajipa in chu adalhah ding ahitai;
ahin hichea hi anumeinu hi achea pasal dang khat toh akichen kit’a,

aji nukhah pan jong anumeinu hi adeimo kit’a ahileh abang banga chu kidana lekha asutpeh ding amanu khut’a akichoisah a ainsunga kona asoldoh ding ahi; ahilouva aji nukhahpa, amanu jia neipa chu athi tah a ahileh,

aji masapa, amanu da masa pa chun hiche numei hi akisuh boh nunga akipui kit’a jia anei thei lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hi to bang thil hi Pakai maiya thet umtah ahin, hijeh a chu nangman Pakai na-Pathenin napehna gamsunga hitobang themmona chonset hi nalhut khum lou ding ahi.

“Pasal khat tou ajinei thah pet’a sepaiya pang lou ding, ahiloule natoh ding dang danga jong nganse lou ding ahi; kum khat lhingset’a ahen oh beihela ina uma, adeiya akipui ajinu chutoh nom sa tah-a um lhon ding ahi.
“Mihem koiman changsum ahim, ahi loule sumhei song achunglam ahim chu thil bat man a alah thei louhel ding ahi; alah a ahileh aman mihem hinkho thil bat man a alah ahitai.

“Mihem khat chun asopite Israel mi khat tou aguh pet akimatdoh a, aman amiguh chu soh bola abola, ahiloule akijoh jeng tah a ahileh, hitobang migucha chu thadoh ding ahi; hitia hi nangin nalah a thilse nasuh theng ding ahi.

“Ching theiyin, phah natna chung chang thudola hin Levi themput dola themputen nang ho nahil bang banguva nabol tei teina din ching theiyin; keiman amaho kathupeh bang banga nang hon naboldoh theina diuvin ching theiyun.
Egypt gamsunga kona nahung potdoh laiyuva Pakai na-Pathenin Miriam abolna chung chang thudola chun ching theiyin.
“Ipi thil hijongle nangman naheng nakoma bat dia napeh teng, thil bat man a itobang lah thei ham, tia nangma mong mong ama insunga nalut’a nakhol thei lou ding ahi.
Nangma inpo lama nadindet ding, nangman thil nabatsah pa joh chu ainsunga lut’a nakoma thil bat man a atun ding chu ahin choidoh ding nahung peh ding ahi.
Amihem chu mivaicha ahileh, aman thil bat man a napeh thil chu lup pha thei hijongle lupna nanei lou ding ahi;

ama monga jong nisa alhum tengleh nangman athil bat man a atun thil jong chu nalepeh ding ahi, chuti hen lang hileh aman aponsil chol chu lupna aman thei ding, nang jeng jong phatthei naboh ding ahi; chujongle nang dinga hiche hi Pakai na-Pathen maiya thildih hi ding ahi.
“Nangman thalah soh chu nabolgenthei louhel ding ahi, hi to bang mivaicha angaicha ten ten-a um mi chu; nasopite lah a mi khat hihen lang, nagamsung nakholen dung khat a cheng, khopem mi hijongleh;

nangin akithalah man chu akithalah nikhoa nisa lhum masanga napeh joh ding ahi; ajeh chu ama hi mivaicha ahin, alungthim jouse atha man chunga hi um jeng ahibouve; nachutibol louva ahileh ama hin lhasetna neiyin tin Pakai henga nangma dou na thu hinsei jeng ta leh, nang dinga hiche hi chonset hi ding ahi.
“Mipate chu achate jeh a kithat thei louhel ding, chujongle apate jeh a jong achate kithat thei louhel ding ahi; mihem chu ama ama chonset jeh a bou tha ding ahiye.
“Nangman khopem mi le chaga palou dinga thu adih a kitan ding chu naheikon peh louhel ding, chujongle meithai ponsil jong thil bat man a nalah thei lou ding ahi;

chusanga chu nang jong Egypt gamsunga soh changsa nahin, Pakai na-Pathenin hichea kona chu nahin lhatdamsa ahibouve, ti nageldoh jing jeng ding ahi; hichejeh tah a jong hi keiman bol dinga kathupeh hiche hi nabol ding ahi.

“Nangman nalou laiya chang na-at teng, loulaiya chu changpal khat tou nadalhah khah a ahileh, changpal lhathang changkhai chu naga nung chomkhoh lou ding ahi; hiche changkhai chu khopem ho le chaga paloute ding, meithai ding ahitai. Chutia nabola ahileh Pakai na-Pathenin nakhut’a natoh jouse aboncha phatthei naboh thei joh ding ahi.
Nangin nangma olive thing navoh teng jongle atheiboh chengse chu avel vela nivei navoh louhel ding, khopem le chaga palou chule meithai dinga nakhenpeh ding ahibouve.
Nangman nalengpileiya lengpiga nalokhom tengleh, nadalhah anunga akhai nalokhom kit lou ding ahi; hiche chu khopem le chaga palou chule meithai chan ding ahi.
Nang jong Egypt gama chu soh changsa nahi, ti nageldoh jing jeng ding ahi; hichejeh a chu keiman hiche hi nabol dinga thu kapeh nahiye.

“Mi le mi kah a kinahna thu asoa, ami akina teni chu kihehna, thutanna ina ahung kiheh lhon leh, thutan vaihom hon akah lhona thu a tanpeh uva, themmona bei mi chu them achansah diu, themmona neijoh chu mo a peh diu ahi;

hichea hi mo changpa chu voh ding angai leh thutan pa chun mochang mi chu alupsah a them changpa angsung laitah a athemmona jat dungjuiya avohna ding ijatvei mol-a voh ding ham, ti dungjuiya avoh ding ahi.

Mol som li gei chana vang mi voh thei ahinan, aval a koima kivothei louhel ding ahi; achutilouva mihem khat chun ama chu hijat kalval hin jep jep jeng taleh, nangma mitmu laitah a nasopi chu kisu neo behseh jeng ding ahitai.
“Nangman bongchal chang chilpet akam natompeh louhel ding ahi.

“Insung khat’a sopi pasal ni cheng khom teni chu khatjoh joh chapa hing louva athi tah a ahileh, athipa jinu chu chuche insung hilou midang henga jinei thei lou ding ahi; numeinu jipa sopipa joh chu amanu henga lut ding, ama hi ajinu mong mong dia akipuiya, min asopipa ji avetpeh ngai banga abol ding dol abolpeh ding,
chulengle numeinun chapa ahinpeh masah pen chun asopipa thisa gui ajopmat peh a, hijeh-a hi Israel lah a kona ama min suh manga aumsah louhel ding ahi.

Amavang ahing nalai asopipan asopi athipa jinu chu akipui nom hih a ahileh, asopipa jinu chu chetouva kelkot phunga upa thutan vaihomho henga thu aga lhut a hitia agasei ding, ‘Kajipa sopipan Israel lah a asopi athisa pa min tundoh kit ding ago tapoi: aman kei hi, mi jipa khat sopi pasal tohpeh ding dol chu eibolpeh lou ding ahitai,’ agati ding ahi.
Chutah le hichepa chenna khopi sunga upa chengsen ama chu akoudoh uva ajah a aseipeh diu, hichea jong hi ama ada nah laiya, ‘Ken vang hiche nu kakipui nom poi,’ tia aseiya ahileh,

upa ho angsung laitah a asopi thisapa jinun amapa chu ajot touva, akengchot asut lhah peh ding, amaiya chil aset khuma chutah le ajah-a aseipeh a, hitia hi ahou ding ahi, Pasal koi koi hijeng jong leh asopipa insung tungdoh nomlou jouse chu hitia hi kibol soh kei ding ahi,’ ati ding ahi.
Chutengle hichepa insung chu amin Israel sunga hitia hi kisei ding, ‘Akengchot kisut lhah peh pa insung,’ tia kisei ding ahitai.
“Pasal khat le pasal khat akidel lhona pasal khat pen pen jinun ajipa dengpa khut’a kona ama jipa huhdoh ding agot’a, anailut jenga akhut apat’a pasal khatjo chu ahinpia amat’a aloiya ahileh,
nangin amanu khut chu nasat tanpeh jeng ding, namit vet jeng cha jong nadip dampi louhel ding ahi.
“Nangman nasakhao sunga jong thil tena jat ni, alen khat le aneo khat napoh kop thei louhel ding ahiye.
Na insunga jong thil tena jat ni, alen khat aneo khat nakoi khom thei lou ding ahi.
Nangman thilgih tena alhingset, adih nanei ding, thil tena jong alhingset, adih bou nanei ding ahi; chutia nabola ahileh Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna gamsunga chu nahinkho jong sot thei ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh hitobang thil dih a bol lou jouse, kitah louhela natong jouse hi Pakai na-Pathen dinga jong thet um tah ahiuve.
“Egypt gama kona nahung potdoh laiyuva chu Amalek chun itobanga nabolu hitam, lampi dunga nabolnau chu nangman geldoh jing jengin;
Itobang tah a lampia chu nadel khum jenguva, nachol nanan laitah a aman nanung jui miho, minung pha lel jouse itobanga asuhgam hel hitam; aman Pathen ging louhel’in thil anabole.

Hijeh chun Pakai naPathenin nangma choldona napeh a, nakimvela cheng namelmate chengsea kona nakicholdo sah teng, Pakai naPathenin nagoulo, nachenna dia napehsa gamsunga nachen teng leh, nangman vannoiya kona Amalek kihetna jouse nasuh beihel ding ahi; hiche hi nasuh mil louhel’in aphai.
“Pakai na-Pathenin goulo dinga napehna gamsung nahung lhuna, agamsung hi nalah a natoupha a, chenna nanei teng leh,

Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napeh, nalhosoh lhung masa, leiset ga masa chengsea kona nangman phabep nadon khom ding, pocha sung khat’a nakoikhoma, Pakai na-Pathenin ama min chensahna dia adeilhen ding muna chu nache ding ahi.

Chule chulaiya thempu natonga anapang thempupa henga chu nachea ama jah a chu nasei ding, ‘Tuni nikhoa hi keiman Pakai na-Pathen henga kaphondoh ahiye, Pakaiyin ipu ipateu peh dinga ahahselsa gamsunga hin keima kahung vah lut mong mong tai, ‘nati ding ahi.
Chutengle thempupan nakhut’a konin pocha chu nadop lhah peh pai paiyin tin, Pakai na-Pathen angsunga maicham maiya agatun doh ding ahitai.

“Chujongle nangman Pakai naPathen angsunga hi nadonbut’a nasei ding, ‘Kapu chu Aram mi vahthai le khat anahin; Egypt gamsunga agachesuh in, hikoma chu aga khopemin, mihem lhomcha bou anahi nalaiye; ahinla Egypt gama nam lentah ahung hidoh tan, nasa tah in ahung hatdoh jengin, mihem jong atama tam ahung phatai.
Chuin Egypt miten keiho huham tah in einabol’uvin, genthei tah in eimang chauvin, genthei hesoh tah in soh jengin einavul uvin ahi.
Chuphat’in keiho jong Pakai kapu kapateu Pathen henga kataovun ahileh, Pakaiyin keiho taona asangin, kagenthei nau eimupeh uvin, katohgim nau, eikibol genthei nau amusoh tai;
hichun Pakaiyin a ban thahat apanjengin, abanjang alhungdoh jeng tan, kichat tijat umtah tah le melchihna kidang dangin keiho Egypt gamsunga kon chun eihin puidoh tauve;
chujongle hichea hin eihin puiyuvin hiche koma eihin lhut’uvin, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gam hiche hi keiho eipetauvin ahi.

Hijeh chun tun vetan, Pakai nangman neipeh hiche leiset ga masa lhosoh hi kahin choilut tai,’ tia nasei ding ahi. Hitia hi nangman nathilto chu Pakai na-Pathen angsunga natuna chule Pakai na-Pathen angsunga hi chibai naboh ding ahi.
Pakai na-Pathenin nangle na insung ahinpeh thilkeo jouse chunga hi nakipa thanop ding, nangma nahin, Levi mi ahin, nalah a hung khopem midang ahin, nakipa cheh diu ahi.

“Hopsom peh kum, kum thum lhin phat’a nangman kum thum sunga hopsom nato ding dol nasimdoh soh keiya, hichu Levi mi le khopem mi, chaga palou chule meithai neh dinga napehdoh a, nakholen sung dunga cheng mi hijat hin anehva soh tengu leh,

nangman Pakai na-Pathen angsunga hitia hi nasei ding, ‘Keiman ka insunga kon hin thil thengse se chu katoldoh soh tan, hiche kalval hin jong nangin keima neithupehna thupeh chengse dungjuiyin athil theng ho chu Levi mi, khopem mi, chaga palou ho, chule meithai din kapedoh tai; keiman nangma thupeh chengse khat’ a khat jeng cha jong kasukhel pon, hiche ho chu kasu mil hih hele;

kalung gimpet’in jong hopsom kamang pon, aboh a kaumpet jengin jong hopsom halsi jeng cha jong kaladoh poi; chujongle hopsom hi mithi henga jong thi-an danin kapepon ahi; keima Pakai ka-Pathen thusei thun kanung jingin, nangin keima neithupeh bang bangin thil ijakai kabolsoh hel tai.

Nachenna van, nangma umna muntheng a konin neihin ven lang, nangman namite Israel chate le nangin keiho neipehsau hiche leiset hi phatthei hinboh tan, hiche bongnoi le khoiju lonna gam hi kapu kapateu peh dia nakitepnasa gam ahi,’ nati ding ahi.

“Tuni nikhoa hi Pakai na-Pathenin hiche chonna dan jouse le chondan jouse hi nabol cheh dinga thu napeh ahin, hijeh a chu nangman aboncha hi nalungthim pumpi le nahinkho pumpia natoh doh soh helna dinga nachih thei ding ahiye.

Tuni tah a hi nangman Pakai thudola hiche hi naseiya naphondoh ahitai; ama chu nangma dia Pathen hi jing ding, nangin jong ama lamlhah jeng najuiya, ama chonna dan jouse le athupeh chengse chule achondan jouse nanit jing jenga, ama thu thu na ngai ding ahi;

chule Pakaiyin jong tunin nangma chung changa hi tin aseiyin aphongdoh tai: aman nathutep bang banga nang hi ama lhentum amite mong mong nahi ding, hijeh a chu nangin ama thupeh aboncha nanit soh hel ding ahi;

chutengle aman asemsa namtin vaipi hijat chunga hi choi-at ding le minthang ding, chule jabol dinga natundoh ding ahi; chutah le aman aseisa bang banga, nang hi Pakai naPathen dinga nam mithengte nahi ding ahi,” ati.
Mose’n Israel upa chengse chutoh akilhonin, mipi chu thu apen aseiye, “Keiman tuni nikhoa nang ho thu kapeh chengse hi abonchan nitsoh keiyuvin.
Pakai na-Pathenin napeh gam-sunga lut dinga nang ho Jordan vadung nagalkai tengu leh nangman song len tah tah naphudoh a, song ho chu songlouva naloijol soh kei ding ahi.

Chutengle hiche song kiphut chunga chu Pakai, napu napateu Pathenin nathutepsau tobanga na galkaiya, Pakai na-Pathenin napehna gamsung, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gamsung nalut teng leh, danthua kisei thucheng jouse hi song chunga najihdoh soh hel ding ahi.

Chutobanga hi tunia keiman nang ho kathupeh bang banga Jordan vadung nagalkai tengu leh nang hon hiche song ho naphudoh uva, Ebal molsanga chu natundoh diu ahin, hiche ho chu nangin songlou naloijol a nasemjol sel ding ahi.
Hikom laitah chu nangin Pakai na-Pathen dinga maicham khat nasemdoh ding, amaicham chu song jeng jenga nasem ding ahi; ahin hiche song ho khenna dia chu thih manchah seh nalap thei louhel ding ahiye.
Pakai na-Pathen dinga nasemdoh maicham chu song kikhengpol louhel hi ding; hiche maicham chunga hi Pakai na-Pathen henga pumgo thilto natodoh din’g ahi.
Chujongle hikoma hi chamna thilto kilhaina gantha jong natodoh a, asa jong naneh den ding, Pakai na-Pathen angsunga nakipa thanop ding ahi.
Chutengle nangin hiche danthua kisei thuho hi aboncha kichen vel vula song kiphut chengse chunga najih doh soh hel ding ahi,” ati.
Mose’n Levi thempuho chutoh aseiyin, Israel pumpi jah a aseipeh in hitin ati, “Thip beh chan umin lang ngaiyin vo Israel: tuni nikhoa hi nangma Pakai na-Pathen dinga ama mite nahi ahitai.
Hijeh a hi nangman Pakai na-Pathen thusei jeng na ngaiya, athupeh chengse le achonna dan jouse, tunia keiman nang kathupeh son chengse hi nanit soh kei ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche nikho ma ma chun Mose’n mipi aphohsal jah jengin aseitai;

“Nang ho Jordan vadung nagalkai tengu leh mipi phatthei boh a pang dinga mi hijat hi Gerizim molsang chunga ding den diu ahi: Simeon le Levi to, Judah to, Issachar le Joseph toh, chule Benjamin toh ahiuve.
Hitia hi mi hijatma hi Ebal molsanga gaosap dinga ding den diu ahi: Reuben, Gad, chule Asher Je Zebulun toh, Dan Je Naphtali toh ahiuve.
Chule Levi miho chun Israel mite jouse henga aphondoh uva ogin sang tah a asap diu:

“Pakai dinga thet umtah, mihem khut themho khutsoh milim kilhajol, kikhengjol sel kisemdoh a, guh thim cha kitundoh ding goa hou noma mihem chu gaosap chang hen,’ tia asap diu ahin; chutah le mipinjong adonbut’uva, ‘Amen’ ati diu ahi.
“Koi hile anu apa jabollou mihem chu gaosap chang hen,’ tia asap’a ahileh, mipin aboncha adonbut’uva, ‘Amen’ ati diu ahiye.
“Koi hileh aheng akom gamgi song botdoh chan chu gaosap chang hen’ ati ding; chule mipin aboncha adonbut’uva ‘Amen’ ati diu ahi.
“Lampi dunga mitcho pui chavaiya mihem chu gaosap chang hen,’ ati leh; mipin jong aboncha adonbut’uva ‘Amen’ ati diu ahi.
“Khopem le chaga palou, chule meithai dinga thu adih a kitan ding leheipeh mihem chu koi hileh gaosap chang hen,’ tia asei leh; mipin abonchauva adonbut’uva, ‘Amen’ ati diu ahi.
“Pasal koi hileh apa jinu luppi pen pen chu gaosap chang jeng hen, ajeh chu aman apa jinu anih ahopeh jengin ahi,’ tia aseileh; mipin abonchauva, ‘Amen’ ati diu ahi.
“Itobang hijongle gancha pou pou toh luppi mihem chu gaosap chang hen,’ tia asei teng, mipin abonchauva ‘Amen’ ati diu ahiye.
“Pasal koipen hijongle asopinu, apa mong mong chanu hihen lang ahiloule anu chanu hijongle, luppi pen pen gaosap chang hen ‘ tia asei teng, mipin abonchauva, ‘Amen’ atisoh kei diu ahi.
“Pasal koipen hijongle ajinu nu toh lumkhom tapou gaosap chang hen, ‘tia asei teng, mipin abonchauva ‘Amen’ tia adonbut cheh diu ahi.
“Mihem koipen hijongle aheng akompa guh thima that’a philmang pen pen gaosap chang hen’ tia aseiya ahileh, mipin abonchauva, ‘Amen’ tia adonbut cheh diu ahiye.
“Koi koi hijongle themmona bei mihem tha nadinga nehguh kilah chan chu gaosap chang jeng hen,” tia asei teng mipin aboncha a donbut’uva “Amen” ati diu ahi.
“Mi koipen hinjongle hiche danthu hi athusei jouse natohna molso louva boldoh louva chu gaosap chang hen,’ tia asei teng, mipin abonchauva, ‘Amen’ tia adonbut soh kei diu ahi.

“Nangma Pakai na-Pathen thu thua nanun jenga, ching thei tah a tunia keiman nang kathupeh chengse hi aboncha boldoh tei ding nagot’a ahileh, Pakai na-Pathenin leiset namtin vaipi jouse sanga nachoi sang ding ahi.
Hitia hi nangman Pakai na-Pathen thusei ogin na ngaipou pouva ahileh, phatthei hijat hin nahin phah a navuh hel ding ahi.
Khopi sunga jong nangma phatthei boh nachan khah a, loujao lah jenga jong nangma phatthei boh nachan ding ahi.

Nacha nanao jong phatthei boh chang in tin, naleisetga jong phatthei boh chang ding, nagan chate jong achilhah phatthei chang a phathei ding, nagancha jong phatthei changa hung pungjal ding, chule nakelngoi nou te jong phatthei changa um diu ahi.
Napaipeh jong phatthei chang ding, nachang bong goina jong phatthei chang ding ahi.
Navailhun tengjong le phatthei changin natin, navaikon teng jong le phatthei nachan ding ding ahi.

“Nangma dou dia hung vaikon namelmate chu nang angsung laitah a Pakaiyin gal alel sah ding ahi; lampi khatseh seh a nang dou dinga hung kitol diu ahin, na masanga lampi sagi jena jamcheh soh hel ding ahiuve.

Pakaiyin nachunga lhung dinga nachangpang jouse phatthei aboh a, nangman nabol chan chu ipi hijongle aman phatthei naboh peh ding; Pakai na-Pathenin napehna gamsunga jong chu aman phatthei naboh ding ahi.
Nangin Pakai na-Pathen thupeh aboncha nanit soh keiya, ama lampi jenga nache jing leh, ama nahenga akihahselsa bang banga, Pakaiyin nang hi ama ding tumbeh a namtheng mite khat a natundoh ding ahi.
Chutengle leiset’a mitin vaipi hijat hin nang hi Pakai min a kikou nahi, ti amudoh soh hel diu, hijeh a chu nagin soh hel diu ahi.

Chujongle Pakaiyin neng jeng junga nang nahao doh sah ding, nacha na nao phatthei aboh a, nagancha nou phathei ding, naleisetga jeng jong phathei ding, Pakaiyin napu napate, chule nang dia kapeh ding ahi, tia kihahsel abolsa gamsunga nahaodoh ding ahi.

Pakaiyin van munjousea agou kholna hin hongdoh jengin tin, hitobang agou kholna phatah a kona hi nagamsung dinga kum kihei phat cha gotwi alhah sah a, nakhut’a natoh chan phatthei bohna dinga abol ding ahi; chulengle nangin namtin vaipi tamtah natoa thil bat’a nahop ding, nangin mia naga lah bat louhel ding ahi.

Hitia hi Pakaiyin nangma aluchanga napansah a amei nahisah louhel ding ahi; hijeh a hi nakhantou tou jeng ding, nalhahsuh louhel ding ahiye; tuni nikhoa keiman nang kathupeh Pakai na-Pathenin nathupeh chengsea hi nanuna, hicheng hi boldohna tei dinga nachih theiya ahileh chuta chu umdoh ding nahi.

Chujongle tunia keiman nang kathupeh thu kisei chengsea kona hi nakiheidoh hih hel a, jetlam veilam jong najot hih hel a, pathen lim semthu ho nung pou najuida a hiche tobang ho hi jenle dia jong nagot da jeng theiya ahileh, chutobanga hi umdoh ding nahi.

“Nangin Pakai na-Pathen thusei ogin na ngai hih a, tunia keiman nang kathupeh ama thupeh chengse le achonna dan jouse hi boldoh theina dinga nachih thei louva ahileh, anoiya gaosapna chengse hin nalhun den ding, nachup hel thei ding ahi.
Khopi sunga jong gaosap nachan ding, loumun jenga jong gaosap nachan ding ahi.
Napaipeh jong gaosap changa, nachang bong goina jong gaosap chang ding ahi.
Nacha nanao jong gaosap changin tin, naleisetga jeng jong gaosap chang ding; nagancha jong pung thei louva, chule nakelngoi nou kikeh thei lou ding ahi.
Navai lhun teng jongle gaosap nachan a, navaikondoh teng jong leh gaosap nachan ding ahi.

“Pakaiyin nang chunga gaosapna gaosapna jeng ahin lhalut a, kisuh noh phah na, lung doina, ijakai napeh ding, nangin keima neidonda jeh a nangin nabol jouse chu nathilse boldoh ho jeh a hi nakisuh mang hel a het manlouhela namanthah masangsea nachunga hijat hi hung lhung ding ahi.
Nangin najot lut’a nangma gam hisah ding nagotna gamsunga khu nangman nabah gamhel kahsea Pakaiyin nachunga gamna hise nachen den sah ding ahi.

Pakaiyin hihet nat nalhun den sah ding, khosih nat’ a nanatsah a, tipat nat naveisah ding, tisat vala natna na nat sah ding, chemjama natha gam ding, nget le thing lung nalhun khumsah a, hijat pi hin nangma namanthah hel masanga nadel le le jeng diu ahiye.
Nalu chung lama van hi sum-eng hung soh doh intin, chule nanoi lama leiset hi thih hung soh doh ding ahi.
Pakaiyin nagamsunga gotwi hung ju jong chu leivui le neldi jeng ahisah ding, nangma nasuh mang hel masangsea vana kona hung leng lha lha jeng ding ahi.

“Na melmate angsunga jong Pakaiyin nangma gal nalel sah ding, namelmate sat dinga nang lampi khat seh a nakitol ding ahin, amaho masanga lampi sagi jena nahung jamcheh soh hel ding ahiye; chujongle leiset lenggam jouse henga nang hi timul kitho tho na nahidoh ding ahi.

Chule namithi long tahsa jouse chu chunga leng vachaten kivahna aneiyuva, leiset’a gamsa jousen kivahna anei diu ahi; aneh tengu leh ahoh dal a ahoh jam ding mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong beihel ding ahiye.
Pakaiyin Egypt gama uilut nat chu nahin lhun den sah ding, nakhal akhousah ding, thisan phula nanasah ding, nakibol dam thei louhelna ding tithah naveisah ding ahi.
Pakaiyin namit suchon tin, na ngolsah ding, nalunggil asuh noh phah den ding ahiye;

hijeh a chu sun lai jenga jong nangma mitcho muthim lah a akimai banga nakimaile le ding ahin, ipi bol jongle chun nakhantou thei louhel ding ahi; min nangma nabol genthei bep’in tin, min nachom gam gam jeng ding, nakithopi ding koimacha um lou ding ahitai.

Naji dinga numei jong pakiholji ding, ahivanga ama chu pasal dang khat’in aluppi ding ahi; in jong nakisah ding, ahiya asunga nachen lou ding ahi; lengpilei jong nakibol ding, ahivanga lengpitheiga naneh deh lou ding ahiye.

Nangma mitmu laitah a nabongchal min atha ding ahin, hijongle asa naneh khah louhel ding ahi; namaikoh tah a pumhat changsana nasangan nakilahpeh ding, nangma nakilepeh kit louhel ding ahi; nakelngoi jong namelmate kipedoh ding ahin, nangma panhu dingla koimacha um louhel ding ahiye.

Nachapa jouse le nachanu jouse aboncha namdang mi kipedoh ding ahitan, nilhum lhumin namit te nin amaho chu ve ve jeng jong le chun nachudoh deh louhel ding, nangma thahat’a amaho huhdoh jouna banthahat nanei lou ding ahibouve.
Nangin nahet khah louhel nam khat chun naleiset ga le nacholman aboncha abahgam hel diu ahin, aki ngahna beihela nangma la nakigoi goi jeng ding ahi;
chujongle namit te nia namu phah ding mong monga mi ngol del a nakidel mang hel ding ahi.
Pakaiyin nakhup buh dung le nakeng dunga duldoh chet chut jenga natipat sah ding ahin, nakhotaljuma pat naluvum geiya chutia chu nanat ding ahitan, nadamdoh kit thei louhel ding ahiye.

“Pakaiyin nangjong nachunga leng chang dinga atun nalengpa jong chu nangin jong napu napaten jong ahet khah louhel nam mite heng khat’a nahin puilut diu ahi; hikoma chu nangman thing le songa kisemthu pathen lim kisemho kin jeng nagabol ding ahi.
Hikoma Pakaiyin napui mang na ding mun, mitin vaipi lah a chu timul kitho thona leh thuchih a pang ding, seichah ding bep’a naga umdoh ding ahiye.
Nangman loulaiya tu ding muchi chivo tamtah napoh a navaikondoh jing ding, ahivanga themcha bou na-atdoh ding ahibouve; ajeh chu khaokhopin a bahgam ding ahitai.
Lengpilei jong nabol bola, aham jong natuh jol jing ding, ahivanga la lengpitwi jong nadon louhel ding, alengpitheiga jong naneh khah louhel ding ahiye; ajeh chu lungin aneh gam ding ahi.
Nagamgi sung dimset’a olive thing nanei ding ahinan, ahinla nangma tah olive thao kinu louva naum ding ahibouve; ajeh chu nangma olive thing phung jouse kiphuh gamhel ding ahitai.
Chapa tampi jong nahin ding ahinan, ahinla amaho hi nangma nachan khah louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu abonchauva soh changa chesoh hel ding ahiuve.
Nathing phungjouse le naleisetga aboncha khaokhoten chenna anei den jeng diu ahiye.
Nalah a hung khopem mi chu nang sanga sangjoa kikhang sang cheh ding ahin; nang vang nahung kum suh cheh cheh ding ahibouve.
Aman ijakaiya nangma thil bat’a napeh ding, nangin thil imacha ama nabat sah jou ding ahi; hitia hi nangma ameiya napan ding, ama aluchanga pang ding ahitai.

Gaosapna hichengpi hi nachunga hung lhungin tin, nanung nung ahindela, naphah thu jingjeng ding, nakisuh mang hel masanga najui ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nangman Pakai na-Pathen thusei ogin na ngaipon, aman nathupehsa ama thupeh chengse le achonna dan jouse nit din nagel tapoi.
Hiche gaosapna chengse hi nangma chunga melchihna le datmo umtah thil kidanga uma, chule nason nachilhah mite chungajong atonsot geiya umden jing jeng ding ahitai.
“Thilse hijatjeh hin nangman lungthim thanom tah le kipah thanom seuvin Pakai na-Pathen kin nabol tapoi;

hijeh a chu nangman gilkel le dangchah thoh a, ponsil bei le thil hijatpi ngai cha geova hi, Pakaiyin nangma dou dinga ahinsol ding namelmate kin nabola soh na natoh ding ahi; chujongle aman nang hi namanthah hel kahsea nangong changa thih namkol napoh sah ding ahiye.

Nangma dou dinga Pakaiyin hetphah lou gama kon, leiset mong langpeh a kona mihem nam khat ahinpui peh ding, muvanlai banga eojela hung leng lut jeng ding, hiche nam mite chu nangin apaovu jong nahetpeh lou ding ahiye.
Hiche nam mite chu maingal tah ahiuvin, upa jong ging chomdeh lou, khangdong jong lungset chom lou ahiuve;

amaho hin nagancha noute akithagam hel diu, naleisetga jong abahgam hel diu ahin, nasuh mang hel kahseuva abol diu ahiye, hiche mite hin nang dinga chang themcha jong nakhenpeh lou diu, lengpitwijong thaotwi jong, nakhenpeh deh lou diu, nagancha noute hihen lang nakelngoi noute hijongle, amaho hin nangma nasuh kanghel masang seuva nadalhah lou diu ahi.

Nangman kisonna tah a nanei nagamsunga nakholen dung jousea kulpi sang tah tah a kikaikhum jouse avoh lhuh soh kahseuva naum khum khum jeng diu; hitobanga hi Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna gamsung khokhong soh hela nakholen dung jousea naum khum khum jeng diu ahi.
Nangin nasung peng natahsa a pengdoh, nachapate leh nachanu jouse jong, Pakai na-Pathenin napehsa ahivangin, namelmaten naumkhum ‘uva nagim hesoh behseh tengu leh nakitha a naneh jeng ding ahi.

Nalah a milung nengpen tah le hongphal pen tah jong chun apenpi asopi hihen aki-angkoipi ajinu hijongle naneh diu anneh chung changa ahinvetset’a, achate lah a athi nukhah pen jeng jong chu anneh kichupi jeng ngam ding ahiye.

Masanga chutobang mipha chun hitobanga akinaipi tah miho jeng chu achate akitha a aneh teng, ait behseh jeh a atahsa chu ahop louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh namelmaten naum sot behseh a nakholen sung dunga nakoi ahijeh chun imacha cha neilou nahitan, nagimna nasaval jeng ahitai.

Numei lung neng pen tah a kiseinu leh lungnem chung nunga kithangnu, alung neh behseh jeh le alungnem val jeh-a akeng khotaljum jeng cha jong tola chuhsah nom lou numei jong chun aki-angkoipi ajipa le achapa le achanu jeng jong anneh-a akithangsetpi jeng ding ahi;

hitobang numei hin cha ahindoh jou jongle akal kah-a hung lenglha mong mong anaobua hung peng acha chu guhthim cha akineh jeng ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nakholen dungjousea namelmaten nasuh gim behseh jenga, naum khuma neh le chah thil ima alhahsam behseh phat“a hita hi um ding ahibouve.
“Nangman hiche lekhabua kijih lut danthua kisei thu jouse hi aboncha naboldoh theina dinga nachih thei louva, Pakai na-Pathen min loupi tah le kichat umtah chu nagina najabol thei lou leh,
Pakatyin nang chunga hihen nason nachilhah mite chung hileh gim gentheina khoh chung nung tah gentheina nasa tah le beitih nei thei lou, natna khoh tah le beithei louhel ahinpoh lut ding ahi.
Chujongle Egypt gama nangin nagin jingsa natna jouse jong chu nachunga ahinlhut kit’a, anatna jouse chun nangma nalhakang louhel ding ahi.
Nangma nakisuh beihel kahsea, hikoma danthu lekhabu sunga kijih lut lou natna tintang le gentheina jatchom chom Pakaiyin nachunga ahinpoh lut ding ahiye.
Nang ho tam lheh jenguvin lang vana ahsi jat phajong leu chun themcha chabou nakikhendoh diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nangman Pakai na-Pathen thusei ogin na ngaipoi.

Pakaiyin thilpha nabolpeh a napunsah teng kipa thanom na anei banga chu, Pakaiyin nachunga manthahna ahinlhut a nasuh mang ding jong akipapi ding ahi; nangman chenna dinga najot lutna gamsunga kona hi nang ho naphet mang hel diu ahiye.

Chutah le Pakaiyin leiset mong langa pat among lang khat geiya mitin vaipi lah a nathe thangsoh hel ding ahin; hikoma muntina chu nangin jong nahet khah lou, napu napaten jong ahet khah louhel, thing le songa pathen lim kisemthu jatchom chom kin nagabola alhacha nagapan ding ahi.

Namtin vaipi hijat lah a chu nangin lhavang heuva umna namu louhel ding, nakeng khotaljumin jong kicholdo tih anei lou ding ahi; chujongle Pakaiyin jong nalungthim ameidoi sah a aling laosah ding, namit teni jong hung phamo ding, nahinkho jong hung gentheiya mao mao jeng ding ahiye;
namaiya nahinkho dia lung kichi-ah na uma, sun le jan a kicha jing jenga naum ding, nahinkho dinga det tah a lung ngamna nanei thei louhel ding ahi.

Jingkah teng, ‘O nilhah hiloi taleh,’ natia; nilhah teng leh, ‘O jingkah hiloi jeng ta leh ong,’ nati ding; nalungthim sunga kichatna jeh le namit te nia navet ding hahsatna jeh-a hitia hi naum ding ahi.

Chutengle Pakaiyin kong inneiya nahin poh kit’a Egypt gam langa nahin nung tol kit ding, keiman hiche lampi hi nanung jot kit louhel di ahi, tia kathu tepsa lampi chu nale jotpeh kit ding ahi; hikoma chu nang ho le nang ho namelmateu henga soh pasal le soh numeiya vul dia nakikhum’uva nakijoh diu, ahivanga koimachan nang ho nakichoh lou diu ahibouve,” ati.
Horeb molsanga kitepna thu anasei kalvala Pakaiyin Moab gamsunga Israel chate jah a Mose’n aseipeh dinga athupeh kitepna a thu aseiho chu hicheng hi ahi.

Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Israel kiti tapou abonchan akouvin ajah uva aseitai, “Nang hon Egypt gamsunga namitmu pet tah uva Pakaiyin Pharaoh abolna, asohte abolna chule agamsung pumpi abolna jouse namusoh keiyu ahitai.
Patepna hahsa tah tah le melchihna tampi chule thil kidang tamtah pi namit’uva namusau ahitan ahi;
ahivangin tuni geiyin Pakaiyin nang ho hi hetkhenna thei lungthim nape hih laiyun, muchetna thei mit jong nape pouvin, jah theina ding nakhang jong nape hih laiyuve.
Keiman nang ho hi gamthip noiya kum som li sungin kapuileu vin, nachunguva kai naponsil jouseu jong a-eh pon, nakeng phanguva konin jong nakengchot jouseu khat’a khat jeng cha jong asepoi;
kei hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahi nahetdoh theina diuvin, nang ho changlhah nelouvin naum’uvin, lengpitwi don louvin naum ‘uvin chule khamna thei jong donkha louhel’in naumuve.
Ahin hikom nahung lhun phat’uvin Heshbon lengpa Sihon le Bashan lengpa Og chu eiho kisat pi dingin ahung kon jeng lhontan, hijongle eihon amani chu ijoutauve.
Amani gam ilahpeh-uvin gouva alo diuvin Reuben chate le Gad chate chule Manasseh phung keh khat ipedoh tauve.
Chuti ahijeh chun hiche kitepna thudola kisei thu ho hi aboncha naboldoh soh hel theina diuvin ching theiyun; chutin bol leu chun nakhut’a nathilbol jouseu khantouna nanei thei diu ahiye.
“Tunin nang ho nabonchauvin Pakai na-Pathenu angsunga ding soh keiyuvin; naphung sunguva nalamkaiyu chule na-upa ho jouse jong, navaihom’uva pang ho ahiuvin, chule Israel mi kiti jouse ahiuvin,
na nunao chapangjouseu, najiu numei jouse, nangahmun sunga cheng khopem mi hihen nathing choma pang hihen lang natwi thal a pang hijongleh,
hitia hi nangma Pakai na-Pathen kihahselna kitepna a chu nalut theiya ahina dingin, tunia Pakai na-Pathenin nang to kitepna asema hin lut theina ngaiton;

chuti hen lang hi leh aman tunia hi nangma ama dinga nam khat hi dia natundoh ding, aman nahenga aseisa bang le napu napate Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga akihahselna bang banga chu ama jong nangma Pathen hi ding ahi.
Hiche kitepna keiman nang ho changseh to kasemdoh a kagondoh ahipoi;
tuni nikhoa hikoma eiho lah a pang lou pa gei, chule tu nia Pakai i-Pathenu angsunga, hikoma eiho lah a pangpa dinga jong kisemdoh ahiye.
“Itobanga Egypt gamsunga ichen’uva, nang hon najot pai paiyu namtin vaipi hijat lah hi ihin pal galkaiyu ham, ti nang hon naheuve;

hichea chun hiche namtin vaipi ho thilbol kidah dah um, thing le song amanchah uva milimdoi asem jouseu hihen, dangka le sana a aman’uva hitobang milimdoi asemjouseu hijongle alah uva um jouse chu namusoh keitauve.

Ijem itilou leh nalah uva pasal khat ham, numei khat ham, insung khat ham, phung khat ham. tunia hi alungthim kihei mang del jenga hiche namtin vaipite milimdoi semthu pathen lim asemthu hi anung juiya akin bol jeng ding goa jong um thei mai ahi; ijem itilouva ahijongleh nalah uva hi thilse abul hung dondoh jong um khantin, aga neh thei lou akhat’a kha ahinsodoh jeng thei jong ahi;

chule koipen ham khat chun hiche kihahselnasa kitepna thu kiseiho hi ajah doh teng leh ama le ama kichoian hen lang alungthim sunga hi tin sei jeng hen, ‘Keima lungthim sunga louchal tah in chon jong leng kahoidoh tei tei ding ahi,’ tin sei taleh; hiche asei hin adang chah jeng jong twi atambehseh teng alhoh mang banga, amanthahna aboldoh peh ding ahi.

Hitobang mihem hi Pakaiyin angai dam louhel ding, hiche mihem douna hi Pakai lunghan hung deujah jenga, atom ngaina jong meikhu banga hung kitungdoh jeng ding ahin, chujongle hiche danthu lekhabua kisun gaosapna thu kisei jouse jong amapa chunga hung busa den soh hel ding. chutah le Pakaiyin ama min chu vannoiya kona anoimang hel peh ding ahitai.
Hiche danthu lekhabua kisunsa kitepna chunga gaosapna kisei chengse dungjuiya hi gaosap dinga, hitobang mihem hi Pakaiyin Israel phung jouse lah a kona atumbeh a asedoh jeng ding ahi.

Khangthah ahung lhung ding le nang ho nunga hung kipatdoh ding nachateu ahin, hetphah lou gama kona hung kholgam min jong, Pakaiyin aveiset sahna hiche natna gitlou tah gentheina chung nung hin gamsung alhunden jeng hi amu tengu leh asei diu ahi;

gamsung pumpi katsong le chilhang abah jenga, gamkachai lah le muchi tuna louhel abah a chule imacha keh louhela alheng alhola akijam jenga, hamhing him him pou louhel, Sodom le Gomorrah banga akilekhup jenga, Admah le Zeboiim banga Pakaiyin alunghan jeh le alungsat jeh a alekhup jeng tobang ahi phat leh,
namtin vaipin abonchauva aseisoh hel diu, ‘Ipi pen tah a Pakaiyin hiche gamsung hi hitobang loma abol jeng hi tan tem? Ipi dinga hitobang loma nasa a hi lung hang jeng ahidem?’ ati cheh diu ahi.
Chutah le min hita asei diu ahi, ‘Amaho hin Egypt gama kona Pakaiyin apu apateu ahinpuidoh laiya apu apateu kitepna asuhmil jeh uva hitia uma ahiuvin,

chujongle amaho hi cheuva pathen lim kisemthu ho pou agajen leuva, hiche ho chu chibai aboh uva, Pakaiyin amaho dinga adeipeh louhel pathen lim kisemthu ho, amahon jong ahetkhah louhel’u ahou jeh uva khuti ahiuve;
hichejeh a hi agamsung douna a hi Pakai lunghanna hung deujah jenga, hiche lekhabu sunga kisun gaosapna tin tang hi ahin lhut khum jeng ahitai;

chujongle Pakaiyin amaho hi agamsunguva kona alunghan jeh le alung nat behseh jeh, chule alungsat val behseh phat’a abul akaldoh jenga, tulaiya aum banguva hi abonchauva mi gamdanga aselut jeng ahitauve,’ ati diu ahi.
’Thil akiselguh chengse chu Pakai i-Pathen’uva bou ahin: phondohsa thil ho vang hi hiche danthua kisei thu ho hi aboncha eihon iboldoh theina diuva, atonsot geiya eiho le ichateuva ding bou ahitai.

’Thil hijatpi hi nachunga ahung lhuna, na masanga kasimdohsa phattheina le gaosapna hin nahin phah phat leh, nangin aboncha hi Pakai naPathenin nadellutna gamsunga chu namtin vaipi lah a nalhah teng leh nalunggil sunga nageldoh soh hel ding ahi.
