Chutah le Pakai na-Pathen henga nahung kile kit ding, nangma nahin nachate ahiuvin, tuni nikhoa keiman nang kathupeh jouse hi Pakai ogin ahi tia nalungthim pumpi le nahinkho pumpia na ngai jeng ding ahiye.
Chuphat le Pakai na-Pathenin naham phatna jouse nasempha kit’in tin, nachunga lainatna aneiya, Pakaiyin nathe thangna gamtina kona mitin vaipi lah a nahin don khomsoh kei kit ding ahi.
Van mong geiyin anavah mang jeng ta jongle chun hikoma kona chu Pakai na-Pathenin nahin chop khom soh keiya, chua konajong a man naholdoh soh hel ding ahi;

chujongle Pakai naPathenin napu napate chenna gamsunga nahin nung pui lut kit tei tei ding, chutengle chenna nanei thei ding ahi; chujongle Pakaiyin napu napate sanga hao jong nahaosah joh ding, tam jong natam sahjoh ding ahi.

Chule Pakai na-Pathenin nangma le nachilhah te lungthim sung chep atanpeh a, chulengle nangin jong Pakai na-Pathen chu nalungthim pumpi le nahinkho pumpia na ngailut theiya, hinjong nahin thei ding ahi.
Chutah le Pakai na-Pathen chun nangma bolgentheiya pang namelmate chunga gaosapna hijatpi hi ahinlhun sah ding ahiye.
Hichea hi nangman Pakai thusei ogin na ngai kit ding, tuni nikhoa keiman nang kathupeh ama thupeh hijatpi hi nanit soh hel ding ahitai.

Pakai na-Pathenin nakhut’a natoh nabol jousea chu nasa tah a nahaodoh sah a natha lhin sah ding, nasung peng mi jong, nagancha nou peng jong, naleiset ga soh jong bulhing soh hel ding ahi: ipijeh-inem itileh napu napate ahaosah a akipa thanoppi bang chun Pakaiyin nangma haosah kit ding hi kipa thanopna akilah ding ahi.

Nangman Pakai naPathen thusei ogin na ngaipou pouva, ama thupeh jouse le achonna jouse, hiche danthu lekhabua kisun chengse hi nanit soh keiya, nalungthim pumpi mi jong, nagancha nou peng jong, naleiset ga soh jong bulhing soh hel ding ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh napu napate ahaole nahinkho pumpia Pakai na-Pathen henga nahung kiheilut kit’a ahileh, hitia hi um ding ahi.
“Ijeh-inem itileh tuni nikhoa keiman nangma kathupeh hiche thupeh hi nang dia thil hahsa behseh jong ahipon, gamla behseh jong ahipoi.
Hiche hi vana um hiya nangman, ‘Hiche eihon ijah-uva boljong iboldoh theina diuva koipen tah vana gakaldoh a eihin poh lhah peh diu ham?’ tia nasei ding jong ahipoi.

Chule hiche hi twikhanglen gal a um hiya nangman, ‘Eihon ijah uva boljong iboldoh theina diuva koipen tah hi twikhanglen galkaiya hiche hi eiho dinga ahinpoh galkai ding ham?’ tia nasei ding jong ahideh pon ahi.
Hiche thu hi nang koma naicha umjoh ahin, hiche hi nakamsung le nalungthim sunga umah ahibouve; hijeh a chu nangin naboldoh thei mong mong ahi.
“Ven, tunin keiman na masanga hinna le thilpha kakoipeh in, thina le thilse nakoipeh e.

Nangin Pakai naPathen thupeh chengse, tunia ken nang kathupeh hi nanit jinga, Pakai na-Pathen na ngailut’a, ama lamlhah jouse najui jinga, ama thupeh chengse le achonna dan jouse chule achondan jouse nanit soh keiya ahileh, nangma hing theiyin natin, napunbe ding, chule Pakai naPathen chun tua acheng dinga najot lutna gamsunga khu nangma phatthei naboh ding ahi.

Amavang nalungthim akihei mang del jenga, nangin jong kho najah hih a Pakai ogin na ngaida a, pathen lim chom chom kisemthuho chibai boh dinga min napui manga, hiche ho pi khu jenle dia nagot jeng tah a ahileh,
tunia hi keiman nahenguva kaphondoh ahi, nang ho namanthah tei tei diu ahi; tua Jordan galkaiya galut’a chenna dinga nagotna gamsunga khu nang ho nahinsot louhel dingu ahiye.

Tuni nikhoa hi keiman nang ho douna hettohsah a pang dinga van le lei kakou khom ahin, hitia hi na mansanga hinna le thina kakoipeh a, phattheina le gaosapna kakoipeh nahi; hichejeh hin nangman hinna hi kilhen jengin, chuti hen lang hileh nang jong nason nachilhah jong nahin thei diu ahi.

Pakai na-Pathen ngailun lang, athusei ogin ngaiyin, chule ama jeng kolchah jing jeng le chun aphai; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi nang dinga hinna le hin nikho sotna ahin, chutihen lang hileh Pakaiyin napu napate Abraham Isaac chule Jacob henga aklhahsela, amaho peh dinga aseisa gamsunga khu nangma nachen thei tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Mose’n thu hijatpi hi Israel pumpi jah a aseipai paiyin;

hijeh chun aman ajah uva aseitai, “Tuni hin keima kakum kum ja khat le kum som ni kalhing tai; keima vaikon doh thei le vailhung le thei jong kahi behseh tapoi Pakaiyin jong keijah a aseitai, ‘Nangma hiche Jordan vadung hi nagalkai lou ding ahi,’ tin aseitai.

Pakai na-Pathen chu na masanga lamkaiyin tin, na masanga namtin vaipi hijat hi Pakaiyin asuh mang hel ding, hijeh a chu nang masanga mite hi gam neilou aso ding ahi; chujongle Pakaiyin aseisa to bang banga Joshua hin nang nalamkaiya nagalkaipi ding ahinai.
Chule hiche namtin vaipi khujat khu Pakaiyin Amor mite leng teni Sihon le Og asuh mang pet’a amani le agamsung lhon abolna bang banga abol ding ahinauve.
Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin amaho khu nang ho napeh doh tengu leh, nang hon abonchauva hi keiman nang ho kathupehsa hiche thupeh bang banga hi nabol diu ahiye.

Hat jinguvin lang hang jinguvin, amaho khu kicha hih hel’uvin, ging jong ging hih hel’uvin; ijeh-inem itileh nangma nakilhonpi jing jeng hi Pakai na-Pathen ama ahijing nai; aman nathonsah louhel ding, dajong nadalhah louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun Mose’n jong Joshua akouvin, Israel pumpi mitmun Joshua ajah a aseitai, “Hat jing jengin lang chule hang jing jengin; ajeh chu mipi hijat hitoh nangma nakilhona, Pakaiyin apu apateu peh dinga ahahselsa gamsunga chu nalut tei tei ding ahi; chujongle nan gin amaho hi agamsunga nachensah tei tei ding, nalo sah cheh ding ahiye.

Nangma masanga lamkaiya pang jong hi Pakai ama ahibouve; aman nalhonpi jing ding, nathonsah louhel ding, dajong nadalhah louhel ding ahi; miho khu kicha hih hel’in lang lungthoi nan jong nei hih hel’in,” ati.
Mose’n hiche danthu hi asundoh in, alekhabu chu Levi chapate thempuho, Pakai kitepna thingkong pua pang ho le Israel lah a upa jouse apetai.
Chujongle Mose’n amaho hi thu apen hitin ati: “Kum sagi akichai phat phat, kilhadohna ding phat kitep phat alhin teng, lhambuh kut bol phat ahiya,
Israel pumpi hi Pakai na-Pathenin adeilhenna ding muna chu kimailah dinga ahung teng leh, nangman hiche danthu lekhabu hi Israel pumpi jah dinga anabenguva nasimpeh ding ahi.

Mipi chu khomsoh keiyin lang, pasal jouse, numei jouse, nunao chapang ahin, nakholen sung dunga thamden khopem ahin, amahon ajah soh keiyuva Pakai na-Pathenu ginje akihil themuva, chule hiche danthua kisei jouse hi aboldoh theina dinguva achih theina diuvin simpeh jin;
chulengle ahe khalou lai achateuvin ajah doh theiya, Jordan galkaiya agamsung lo dinga najot nau gamsunga nachen laiseuva Pakai naPathenu ginje akihil themna diuvin simpeh jin,” ati.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin. “Ven, nathi tei tei na ding nikho chu ahung naitul tul jeng tai; Joshua chu kouvin lang kikhopna ponbuh sunga khun hung lut lhon temin; chulengle keiman Joshua hi tha kapeh thei ding ahi,” ati. Hijeh chun Mose le Joshua jong ache lhonin ama ni le ama ni chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga aga ding lhontai.

Chuin kikhopna ponbuh sunga chun Pakai jong meibang lhang khat hin khom kitung bangin ahung kitung jengin ahung kilah pai pai tan ahi; hiti chun ponbuh kotpi phungbula chun meibang lhang chu khom kitung bangin akitung den jengin ahi.

Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, nangma hi napu napate toh lumkhom vah ding nahitai; chulengle hiche mite hi hung kipatdoh uvin tin hiche gamsunga het phah lou pathen lim kisemthu ho nung nunga hi notia hung pang soh hel ‘uva, agam miho lah a vah lut jenguva, abonchauva keima eidalhah gamhel diu, keiman amaho toh kasemdoh keima kitepna jeng jong asuh keh diu ahi.

Chutah le keima lunghanna hi hiche abolni niu chuleh amaho douna hung deujah jeng ding ahin, keiman jong amaho hi kadalhah a kamai kasel mang ding, chuphat le min amaho abahgam ding ahiuve; chujongle thilse tamtah le gimna tamtah amaho chunga lhung ding, hijeh a chu amahon hiche nikho hileh asei diu, I-Pathenu eiho lah a aumlou phat’a hiche thilse hijat hi eiho chunga hung lhung hi lou ham?’ ati diu ahi.
Hiche nikho ahung lhun ni chuleh keiman jong amaho thilse bol jeh a chu kamai kasel mang ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi pathen chom chom henga akihei mang tauvin ahi.
Hijeh chun tu hin nang hon hiche la hi sundoh uvin lang chule Israel chate hil themuvin: hiche la hi Israel chate douna keima dinga hettohsah a pang din akamsunguva khumpeh tan.

ipijeh-inem itileh keiman apu apateu peh dinga kakihahselnasa gamsunga, bongnoi le khoiju lonna gamsunga kahin puilut phat’uvin, amahon an anevaset tauvin, athao soh tauvin, tua hi kihei mang soh hel’uva pathen lim semthu achom chom ajot diu, hiche ho hi agajen leuva, keima donlou dailouva eikoiyuva, kakitepna asuh keh diu ahi.

Chutengle thilse tamtah le gimna tamtah chun amaho ahinphah teng, hiche la hin alamdot jenguva hettohsah a hung pang ding ahi, ajen chu hiche la suhmil louhela ason achilhah teu kamsunga cheng jing jeng ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keiman peh dinga kahahselnasa gamsunga amaho kahin puilut masanga pat’a angaitou athilgonu kahetsa ahitai,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong hiche nikhoma man hiche la hi asundoh pai paiyin, ala hi Israel chate anahiltai.

Chuin Pakaiyin Nun chapa Joshua chu tha apen aseitai, “Hat jingin lang, hangjing jengin; ijeh-mem itileh nangman Israel chate hi amaho peh dinga kakihahselnasa gamsunga khu abonchauva nahin puilut ding ahi; keiman naumpi jing jeng nange,” ati.
Mose’n hiche danthua kisei thu jouse hi aboncha lekhabu khat’a asutdoh soh keiya ajona geiya asut chaihel phat chun,
Mose’n jong Pakai kitepna thingkong pua pang Levi ho chu thu apen hitin ati:
“Hiche danthu lekhabu hi lauvin lang, Pakai na-Pathenu kitepna thingkong sunga chun koitauvin; hiche hi thingkonga chu nangma douna hettohsah a pang ding ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh itobang tah a doumah mah a chon mi nahiya, louchal mi nahim, ti keiman kahetsa nahi; ven, tunia keima nang ho toh hing khom nalaiya bon nang hon Pakai douna doumah mah nabol jengu ahin, kathi nungle ijat nabolbe kit diu hi tam!

Keima henga hin nalah uva naupa jouse, naphung phunguva konin hinkou khom ‘uvin lang, nalah uva vaihom ho jong hinkou khom’uvin, keiman thu hijat hi amaho nakhanga seipeh ing ting, amaho douna hettohsah a pang dia van le leiset kakou khom ding ahi.

Ipijeh inem itileh keima thi nungle nang hon melse tah tah a thil nabol’uva, keiman nang ho kathupeh lampia kona nakihei mang diu ahi, ti keiman kahei; ni nu nung lam leh nachunguva thilse hung lhung ding ahi; ajeh chu nang hon Pakai mitmua thilse jeng nahinbol diu, nakhutsoh thilbol’uva kona Pakai chu nahin phin lung hang diu ahiye,” ati.
Chutah chun Mose’n jong hiche la a thu kisei jouse chu aboncha asei jousoh hel kahsen Israel Houbung pumpi nakhanga aseipeh tai:

Mose chu Nun chapa Joshua chutoh ahung kilhonin, ama ahin Joshua ahin, hiche la a thu kisei jouse hi mipi jah cheh dingin anabenguva lungchin in asei jengin ahi.
Mose’n thu hijat hi Israel pumpi jah a asei jouhel phat’in,

aman miho jah a aseiyin, “Tunia keiman kasei thu hijatpi hi nang hon nalungthim sunguva nakoisoh kei diu, chulengle nang hon jong nachate henga napehson theiyuva, amahon jong hiche danthua kisei jouse hi aboldoh theina diuva ching thei diu ahi.

Ajeh chu nang ho dinga hiche thasetna ding ahipon, nahin theina diu joh ahi bouve; hichea kona hi agamsunga cheng dia Jordan galkaiya najot lut nau gamsunga khu nahinkhou sot thei ding ahiye,” atipeh in ahi.
Hiche nikho ma ma chun Pakaiyin Mose jah aseiyin, hitin ati:
“Jericho to kigalsai, Moab gamsunga um, Nebo molsang, Abarim molsang kitilaiya khun kaltouvin; hichea kon khun keiman Israel chate chenna dia kapeh gam, Canaan gam khu gaven,
chulengle hiche nakaltouna molsang chunga khun hung thidenin lang, namite toh hung kigomtan; Hor molsang chunga nasopipa Aaron athia amite toh ahung kigop khomden bang chun;
Ijeh-inem itileh nangman Zin gamthip noi, Meribath-kadesh twi phunga Israel chate lailung tah a keima tahsanna thu napal keh in; hichea chun Israel chate lah a keima hi athengin neinabol tapoi.
Hijeh a chu nangman na masanga agamsung khu namit’a namu bep ding ahin, keiman Israel chate dinga kapeh gamsunga vang khu nangma nalut thei lou ding ahitai.” ati.
Athi masanga Pathen mi Mose’n Israel chate alhah a phatthei abohna phatthei thu chu hiche hi ahiye.

Moab phaicham dunga konin Mose chu Jericho toh kigalsai, Nebo molsanga Pisgah molvum laitah chun akaltou tai. Chuin Pakaiyin Mose chu gamsung abonchan avetsah soh keiyin, Gilead a pat Dan gam chan gei,
Naphtali gamsung jouse ahin, Ephraim le Manasseh gamsung ahin, Judah gamsungse se, nilhum lam twikhanglen chan gei ahin,
Negeb gamsung, phaicham lai, hiche tum thing ke-na khopi Jericho khopi phaichama pat Zoar chan gei ahi.

Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseitai, “Keima Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga kakihahsela, ‘Keiman nason nachilhah kapeh ding ahi,’ tia kaseisa chu hiche gamsung hi ahi; keiman nang hi namit’a vang kamusah nahitan, agamsunga vang khu nalut thei lou ding ahitai.” ati.
Hiti hin hikoma chun Pakai lhacha Mose chu Pakai thusei dungjuiyin, Moab gamsunga athitai;
Pathenin Mose chu Beth-peor gal a, Moab gamsung phaicham laiya chun avuitai; ahinla tuni geiyin koimachan ama kivuina lhan phung chu ahedoh hih laiye.
Athi chun Mose kum ja khat le kum som ni alhingtai; a mit jong athim hih laiyin, athakang alha hih laiye.
Chutah chun Israel mipi chu Moab phaicham sunga nisom thum sungin Mose pul adouvun akaptauve; chuti chun Mose dinga thi opna ka na ding nikho alhingtan ahi.
Nun chapa Joshua chu Mose’n achunga akhut angap jeh chun lhagao le chihna adimset tai; hijeh chun Israel chaten jong ama thu jeng angaiyuvin ahi, Pakaiyin Mose thu anapeh bang bangin.
Hiche kalse hin Mose tobanga Pakaiyin kimaitoa akihetpi mong mong Israel lah a themgao ahung pengdoh kha tapon ahi;

Mose tobanga Egypt gamsunga melchihna chujat abolsah a, thil kidang chujat abolsah tobang, Pharaoh le asohte henga abolsah tobang, Pharaoh gamsunga aboldoh jouse abolsah tobanga bolthei him him ahung pengdoh kha tapon.
chujongle thahatna nasa tah tah chujat le tijat umtah tah thilbol kidang chujat boldoh a, Mose’n Israel pumpi mitmu chang tah a abolthei tobang boldoh jong aum kha tapoi.
